FORMAT_VERSION.d: This value is incremented when changes are made to the eeprom format

FRAME_CLASS.d:
控制多旋翼组件的主要框架类

取值：
  0：未定义
  1：四边形
  10：双旋翼飞行器
  11: 直升机_双
  12：十二十六进制
  13：四轮直升机
  14：德卡
  15：脚本矩阵
  16：6DoF 脚本
  17：动态脚本矩阵
  2：六角形
  3：八角
  4：八角形
  5：Y6
  6：直升机
  7：三
  8：单轴飞行器
  9：同轴直升机

FRAME_TYPE.d:
控制多旋翼飞行器的电机混合。  不用于三轴或传统直升机。

取值：
  0：加
  1：X
  10：Y6B
  11：Y6F
  12：BetaFlightX
  13：道琼斯指数
  14: 顺时针X
  15：我
  18：BetaFlightX反转
  19: Y4
  2：V
  3：H
  4：V型尾翼
  5：A尾

FSTRATE_DIV.d:
快速线程除数用于控制最大快速更新速率。实际速率是陀螺仪速率（以 Hz 为单位）除以该值。该值根据 FSTRATE_ENABLE 的配置进行调整。

范围：1 … 10

FSTRATE_ENABLE.d:
启用快速线程。在默认情况下，控制线程更新频率的快速除数从 FSTRATE_DIV 动态缩放，以避免陀螺仪采样缓冲区溢出和主循环减慢。可以选择其他值以在启用或始终将除数固定为 FSTRATE_DIV。

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：启用-动态
  2：启用-武装时固定
  3：启用-固定

FS_CRASH_CHECK.d:
This enables automatic crash checking. When enabled the motors will disarm if a crash is detected.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Warn only
  2: Disarm

FS_DR_ENABLE.d:
航位推算开始后立即采取故障保护措施。当 EKF 失去位置和速度源并仅依赖风估计时，航位推算开始

取值：
  0：禁用/无操作
  1：土地
  2：RTL
  3：SmartRTL 或 RTL
  4：SmartRTL 或陆地
  6：自动 DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START 或 RTL

FS_DR_TIMEOUT.d:
在失去位置和/或速度源后，航位推算可以持续这么多秒。  超时后，EKF 故障保护将在需要位置估计的模式下触发

范围：0 … 120

FS_EKF_ACTION.d:
控制调用 EKF 故障保护时将采取的操作

取值：
  0：仅报告
  1：如果当前模式需要定位，则切换到陆地模式
  2：如果当前模式需要位置，则切换到 AltHold 模式
  3：从所有模式切换到陆地模式

FS_EKF_FILT.n: EKF 故障保护过滤器截止
FS_EKF_FILT.d:
EKF 故障安全滤波器截止频率。使用此值过滤 EKF 方差，以避免因瞬态高方差而产生虚假故障保护。值越高意味着故障保护更有可能触发。

范围：0 … 10

FS_EKF_THRESH.n: EKF 故障安全方差阈值
FS_EKF_THRESH.d:
允许设置最大可接受的罗盘、速度、位置和高度变化。用于解锁检查和 EKF 故障保护。

范围：0.0 … 1.0
取值：
  0：禁用
  0.6：严格
  0.8：默认
  1.0：放松

FS_GCS_ENABLE.d:
控制当与地面站的连接丢失至少 5 秒时是否调用故障保护（以及采取什么操作）。请参阅 FS_OPTIONS 参数以了解其他操作，或在启用 GCS 故障保护时允许任务继续的情况。

取值：
  0：禁用/无操作
  1：RTL
  2：RTL 或在自动模式下继续任务（在 4.0+ 中删除 - 请参阅 FS_OPTIONS）
  3：SmartRTL 或 RTL
  4：SmartRTL 或陆地
  5：土地
  6：自动 DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START 或 RTL
  7：刹车或着陆

FS_GCS_TIMEOUT.d:
Timeout before triggering the GCS failsafe

范围: 2 … 120

FS_OPTIONS.d:
Bitmask of additional options for battery, radio, & GCS failsafes. 0 禁用所有选项。

位定义：
  bit0: Continue if in Auto on RC failsafe
  bit1: Continue if in Auto on GCS failsafe
  bit2: Continue if in Guided on RC failsafe
  bit3: Continue if landing on any failsafe
  bit4: Continue if in pilot controlled modes on GCS failsafe
  bit5：释放夹具

FS_THR_ENABLE.d:
The throttle failsafe allows you to configure a software failsafe activated by a setting on the throttle input channel

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled always RTL
  2: Enabled Continue with Mission in Auto Mode (Removed in 4.0+)
  3: Enabled always Land
  4: Enabled always SmartRTL or RTL
  5: Enabled always SmartRTL or Land
  6: Enabled Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Enabled always Brake or Land

FS_THR_VALUE.d:
The PWM level in microseconds on channel 3 below which throttle failsafe triggers

范围: 910 … 1100

FS_VIBE_ENABLE.d:
This enables the vibration failsafe which will use modified altitude estimation and control during high vibrations

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled

GCS_PID_MASK.d:
bitmask of PIDs to send MAVLink PID_TUNING messages for

位定义:
  bit0: Steering
  bit1: Throttle
  bit2: Pitch
  bit3: Left Wheel
  bit4: Right Wheel
  bit5: Sailboat Heel
  bit6: Velocity North
  bit7: Velocity East

GND_EFFECT_COMP.n: 地面效应补偿启用/禁用
GND_EFFECT_COMP.d:
地面效应补偿启用/禁用

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：启用

GPS_HDOP_GOOD.d:
GPS Hdop 值等于或低于该值表示位置良好。  用于预解锁检查

范围：100 … 900

GUID_OPTIONS.d:
可用于更改引导模式行为的选项

位定义：
  bit0：允许发射器布防
  bit2：忽略飞行员偏航
  bit3：SetAttitudeTarget 将推力解释为推力
  bit4：不稳定 PositionXY
  bit5: 不稳定 VelocityXY
  bit6：用于位置目标的航点导航
  bit7：允许风向标

GUID_TIMEOUT.d:
引导模式超时，如果没有收到呼叫者的更新，车辆将停止或返回水平。仅适用于速度、加速度、角度控制和/或角速率控制的任意组合

范围：0.1 … 5

INITIAL_MODE.d:
This selects the mode to start in on boot. This is useful for when you want to start in AUTO mode on boot without a receiver.

取值:
  0: Manual
  1: CIRCLE
  10: Auto
  11: RTL
  12: Loiter
  13: TAKEOFF
  14: AVOID_ADSB
  15: Guided
  17: QSTABILIZE
  18: QHOVER
  19: QLOITER
  2: STABILIZE
  20: QLAND
  21: QRTL
  22: QAUTOTUNE
  23: QACRO
  24: THERMAL
  25: Loiter to QLand
  26: AUTOLAND
  3: TRAINING
  4: ACRO
  5: FBWA
  6: FBWB
  7: CRUISE
  8: AUTOTUNE

LAND_REPOSITION.d:
在着陆模式、RTL 着陆阶段和自动模式着陆期间启用用户输入。

取值：
  0：不重新定位
  1：重新定位

LOG_BITMASK.d:
要启用的板载日志类型的位图。该值由您要保存的每种日志类型的总和组成。通常最好通过将其设置为 65535 来启用所有基本日志类型。请注意，如果您想减少日志大小，则应考虑使用 LOG_FILE_RATEMAX，而不是使用此参数禁用日志记录项。

位定义：
  bit0：快速态度
  bit1：中等态度
  位2：GPS
  bit3：系统性能
  bit4：控制调谐
  bit5：导航调整
  bit6：RC输入
  位7：IMU
  bit8：任务命令
  bit9：电池监视器
  bit10：RC输出
  bit11：光流
  位 12：PID
  bit13：指南针
  bit15：相机
  bit17：电机
  bit18：快速IMU
  bit19：原始 IMU
  bit20：视频稳定
  bit21：快速谐波陷波记录

PHLD_BRK_RATE.d:
PosHold 飞行模式制动期间的旋转速率（度/秒）

范围：4 … 12

PILOT_ACC_Z.d:
The vertical acceleration used when pilot is controlling the altitude

范围: 0.5 … 5

PILOT_SPD_DN.n: 飞行员最大垂直速度下降
PILOT_SPD_DN.d:
The maximum vertical descending velocity the pilot may request in m/s.  If 0 PILOT_SPD_UP value is used.

范围: 0 … 5

PILOT_SPD_UP.n: 飞行员最大垂直速度上升
PILOT_SPD_UP.d:
The maximum vertical ascending velocity the pilot may request in m/s

范围: 0.5 … 5

PILOT_THR_BHV.d:
包含各种油门杆选项的位掩码。带弹簧油门的 TX 可以将 PILOT_THR_BHV 设置为“1”，因此着陆时电机反馈从操纵杆中部开始，而不是从操纵杆底部开始。

位定义：
  bit0：中摇杆反馈
  bit1：高油门取消着陆
  bit2：陆地检测撤防

PILOT_THR_FILT.d:
Throttle filter cutoff (Hz) - active whenever altitude control is inactive - 0 to disable

范围: 0 … 10

PILOT_TKO_ALT_M.d:
当用油门杆触发起飞时，高度控制模式将爬升到的高度。

范围：0.0 … 10.0

PILOT_Y_EXPO.d:
先导控制的偏航博览会可在粘在边缘时实现更快的旋转

范围：-0.5 … 1.0
取值：
  0：禁用
  0.1：非常低
  0.2：低
  0.3：中
  0.4：高
  0.5：非常高

PILOT_Y_RATE.d:
飞行员控制的最大偏航率  用于除 Acro 之外的所有飞行员控制模式

范围：1 … 360

PILOT_Y_RATE_TC.n: 飞行员偏航角速度控制输入时间常数
PILOT_Y_RATE_TC.d:
飞行员偏航角速度控制输入时间常数。  数字越低，响应越敏锐，数字越大，响应越柔和

范围：0 … 1
取值：
  0.05：非常清脆
  0.1：清脆
  0.15：中
  0.2：软
  0.5：非常柔软

PLDP_DELAY.n: 有效负载地点爬升延迟
PLDP_DELAY.d:
释放后飞机开始爬升至起始高度之前的延迟（以秒为单位）。

范围：0 … 120

PLDP_RNG_MAX.n: 有效负载 放置最大测距仪高度
PLDP_RNG_MAX.d:
触发有效负载接地的最大测距仪高度（以米为单位），设置为零以禁用。

范围：0 … 100

PLDP_SPEED_DN.n: 有效负载放置速度不错
PLDP_SPEED_DN.d:
The maximum vertical decent velocity in m/s. If 0 LAND_SPD_MS value is used.

范围: 0 … 5

PLDP_THRESH.n: 有效载荷位置推力比阈值
PLDP_THRESH.d:
下降过程中的垂直推力比，低于该比将触发有效载荷着陆。

范围：0.5 … 0.9

RC_SPEED.d:
This is the speed in Hertz that your ESCs will receive updates

范围: 50 … 490

RNGFND_FILT.d:
测距仪滤镜可平滑距离。  设置为零以禁用过滤

范围：0 … 5

RTL_ALT_TYPE.d:
RTL 高度类型。  在 RTL 期间将地形跟随设置为 1，然后设置 WP_RFND_USE=1 以使用测距仪或 WP_RFND_USE=0 以使用地形数据库

取值：
  0：相对于主页
  1：地形

RTL_CONE_SLOPE.d:
在 home 上方定义一个圆锥体，确定最大爬升

范围：0 … 10.0
取值：
  0：禁用
  1：浅
  3：陡峭

RTL_LOIT_TIME.d:
Time (in milliseconds) to loiter above home before beginning final descent

范围: 0 … 60000

RTL_OPTIONS.d:
可用于更改 RTL 模式行为的选项

位定义：
  bit2：忽略飞行员偏航

SIMPLE.d:
位掩码保存哪些飞行模式使用简单航向模式（例如位 0 = 1 表示飞行模式 0 使用简单模式）。位掩码用于飞行模式开关位置。

位定义：
  bit0：开关位置1
  bit1：开关位置2
  bit2：开关位置3
  bit3：开关位置4
  bit4：开关位置5
  bit5：开关位置6

SUPER_SIMPLE.d:
用于为某些飞行模式启用超级简单模式的位掩码。将其设置为禁用（0）将禁用超级简单模式。位掩码用于飞行模式开关位置

位定义：
  bit0：开关位置1
  bit1：开关位置2
  bit2：开关位置3
  bit3：开关位置4
  bit4：开关位置5
  bit5：开关位置6

SURFTRAK_MODE.d:
set which surface to track in surface tracking

取值:
  0: Do not track
  1: Ground
  2: Ceiling

SURFTRAK_TC.d:
Time to achieve 63.2% of the surface altitude measurement change.  If 0 filtering is disabled

范围: 0 … 5

THROW_ALT_ACSND.n: Throw mode target altitude to ascsend
THROW_ALT_ACSND.d: Target altitude to ascend during a throw upwards (must be positive). This allows for rapidly clearing surrounding obstacles.

THROW_ALT_DCSND.n: Throw mode target altitude to descend
THROW_ALT_DCSND.d: Target altitude to descend during a drop, (must be positive). This allows for rapidly clearing surrounding obstacles.

THROW_ALT_MAX.d: 投掷模式将检测投掷或跌落的最大高度 - 0 禁用检查

THROW_ALT_MIN.d: 投掷模式将检测投掷或跌落的最低高度 - 0 禁用检查

THROW_MOT_START.n: Start motors before throwing is detected
THROW_MOT_START.d:
Used by Throw mode. Controls whether motors will run at the speed set by MOT_SPIN_MIN or will be stopped when armed and waiting for the throw.

取值:
  0: Stopped
  1: Running

THROW_NEXTMODE.d:
Vehicle will switch to this mode after the throw is successfully completed.  Default is to stay in throw mode (18)

取值:
  17: Brake
  18: Throw
  3: Auto
  4: Guided
  5: LOITER
  6: RTL
  9: Land

THROW_TYPE.d:
Used by Throw mode. Specifies whether Copter is thrown upward or dropped.

取值:
  0: Upward Throw
  1: Drop

THR_DZ.d:
The deadzone above and below mid throttle in PWM microseconds. Used in AltHold, Loiter, PosHold flight modes

范围: 0 … 300

TKOFF_RPM_MAX.d:
Takeoff is not permitted until motors report no more than this RPM.  Set to zero to disable check

范围: 0 … 10000

TKOFF_RPM_MIN.d:
Takeoff is not permitted until motors report at least this RPM.  Set to zero to disable check

范围: 0 … 10000

TKOFF_SLEW_TIME.n: Slew time of throttle during take-off
TKOFF_SLEW_TIME.d:
Time to slew the throttle from minimum to maximum while checking for a successful takeoff.

范围: 0.25 … 5.0

TKOFF_THR_MAX.n: Takeoff maximum throttle during take-off ramp up
TKOFF_THR_MAX.d:
Takeoff maximum throttle allowed before controllers assume the aircraft is airborne during the takeoff process.

范围: 0.0 … 0.9

TUNE.d:
Selects parameter (normally a PID gain) that is being tuned with an RC transmitter's knob. The RC input channel used is assigned by setting RCx_OPTION to 219.

取值:
  0: None
  1: Stab Roll/Pitch kP
  10: WP Speed (4.6 and earlier)
  12: Loiter Pos kP
  14: AltHold kP
  21: Rate Roll/Pitch kD
  22: Velocity XY kP
  25: Acro Roll/Pitch deg/s
  26: Rate Yaw kD
  28: Velocity XY kI
  3: Stab Yaw kP
  34: Throttle Accel kP
  35: Throttle Accel kI
  36: Throttle Accel kD
  38: Declination
  39: Circle Rate
  4: Rate Roll/Pitch kP
  40: Acro Yaw deg/s
  45: RC Feel
  46: Rate Pitch kP
  47: Rate Pitch kI
  48: Rate Pitch kD
  49: Rate Roll kP
  5: Rate Roll/Pitch kI
  50: Rate Roll kI
  51: Rate Roll kD
  52: Rate Pitch FF
  53: Rate Roll FF
  54: Rate Yaw FF
  55: Motor Yaw Headroom
  56: Rate Yaw Filter
  58: SysID Magnitude
  59: PSC Angle Max
  6: Rate Yaw kP
  60: Loiter Speed
  61: WP Speed (m/s)
  7: Throttle Rate kP

TUNE2.d:
Selects parameter (normally a PID gain) that is being tuned with an RC transmitter's knob. The RC input channel used is assigned by setting RCx_OPTION to 220.

取值:
  0: None
  1: Stab Roll/Pitch kP
  10: WP Speed (4.6 and earlier)
  12: Loiter Pos kP
  14: AltHold kP
  21: Rate Roll/Pitch kD
  22: Velocity XY kP
  25: Acro Roll/Pitch deg/s
  26: Rate Yaw kD
  28: Velocity XY kI
  3: Stab Yaw kP
  34: Throttle Accel kP
  35: Throttle Accel kI
  36: Throttle Accel kD
  38: Declination
  39: Circle Rate
  4: Rate Roll/Pitch kP
  40: Acro Yaw deg/s
  45: RC Feel
  46: Rate Pitch kP
  47: Rate Pitch kI
  48: Rate Pitch kD
  49: Rate Roll kP
  5: Rate Roll/Pitch kI
  50: Rate Roll kI
  51: Rate Roll kD
  52: Rate Pitch FF
  53: Rate Roll FF
  54: Rate Yaw FF
  55: Motor Yaw Headroom
  56: Rate Yaw Filter
  58: SysID Magnitude
  59: PSC Angle Max
  6: Rate Yaw kP
  60: Loiter Speed
  61: WP Speed (m/s)
  7: Throttle Rate kP

TUNE2_MAX.d: 当前使用发射机的 TRANSMITTER2_TUNING 旋钮调谐的参数的最大值将设置为

TUNE2_MIN.d: 当前使用发射机的 TRANSMITTER_TUNING2 旋钮调谐的参数的最小值

TUNE_MAX.d: Transmitter Tuning maximum value. The parameter being tuned will have its value set to this maximum value when the tuning knob is at its highest position

TUNE_MIN.d: Transmitter Tuning minum value. The parameter being tuned will have its value set to this minimum value when the tuning knob is at its lowest position

WP_NAVALT_MIN.d:
高度（以米为单位），高于该高度，自动起飞期间将开始导航

范围：0 … 5

WP_YAW_BEHAVIOR.d:
确定自动驾驶仪在任务和 RTL 期间如何控制偏航

取值：
  0：从不改变偏航角
  1：面向下一个航点
  2：面向下一个航路点（RTL 除外）
  3：沿着 GPS 航向行驶
  4：修正交叉轨迹错误

DDS_ENABLE.d:
启用DDS子系统

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：启用

DDS_MAX_RETRY.n: DDS ping 最大尝试次数
DDS_MAX_RETRY.d:
The maximum number of times the DDS client will attempt to ping the XRCE agent before exiting. Set to 0 to allow unlimited retries.

范围: 0 … 100

DDS_TIMEOUT_MS.d:
The time in milliseconds the DDS client will wait for a response from the XRCE agent before reattempting.

范围: 1 … 10000

DDS_UDP_PORT.d:
UDP port number for DDS

范围: 1 … 65535

DDS_USE_NS.d:
When enabled, ROS 2 topic and service names include a v<MAV_SYSID> segment

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled

DDS_IP0.d:
IPv4 地址。示例：192.xxx.xxx.xxx

范围：0 … 255

DDS_IP1.d:
IPv4 地址。示例：xxx.168.xxx.xxx

范围：0 … 255

DDS_IP2.d:
IPv4 地址。示例：xxx.xxx.144.xxx

范围：0 … 255

DDS_IP3.n: IPv4 地址第 4 个字节
DDS_IP3.d:
IPv4 地址。示例：xxx.xxx.xxx.14

范围：0 … 255

DID_BARO_ACC.d: 安装在车辆上时气压计的垂直精度。请注意，这取决于安装条件，因此默认情况下禁用

DID_CANDRIVER.d:
DroneCAN 驱动索引，0 禁用 DroneCAN

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：驱动程序1
  2：驱动程序2

DID_ENABLE.d:
启用 ODID 子系统

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：启用

DID_MAVPORT.d:
Serial port number to send OpenDroneID MAVLink messages to. Can be -1 if using DroneCAN.

取值:
  -1: Disabled
  0: Serial0
  1: Serial1
  2: Serial2
  3: Serial3
  4: Serial4
  5: Serial5
  6: Serial6

DID_OPTIONS.d:
OpenDroneID 子系统的选项

位定义：
  bit0：强制预武装检查
  bit1：允许非 GPS 位置
  bit2：锁定UASIDOnFirstBasicIDRx

EAHRS_OPTIONS.d:
外部 AHRS 选项位掩码

位定义：
  bit0：矢量导航对加速陀螺仪和磁力使用未补偿的值
  bit1：SBG使用EKF作为GNSS
  bit2：SensAItion 用作 AHRS

EAHRS_SENSORS.d:
外部 AHRS 传感器位掩码

位定义：
  位0：GPS
  位1：IMU
  位2：巴罗
  bit3：指南针

EAHRS_TYPE.d:
Type of AHRS device

取值:
  0: None
  1: VectorNav
  11: SensAItion
  2: MicroStrain5
  5: InertialLabs
  6: Trimble GSOF
  7: MicroStrain7
  8: SBG

EFI_COEF1.d:
Used to calibrate fuel flow for MS protocol (Slope). This should be calculated from a log at constant fuel usage rate. Plot (ECYL[0].InjT*EFI.Rpm)/600.0 to get the duty_cycle. Measure actual fuel usage in cm^3/min, and set EFI_COEF1 = fuel_usage_cm3permin / duty_cycle

范围: 0 … 1

EFI_COEF2.d:
Used to calibrate fuel flow for MS protocol (Offset). This can be used to correct for a non-zero offset in the fuel consumption calculation of EFI_COEF1

范围: 0 … 10

EFI_FUEL_DENS.d:
Used to calculate fuel consumption

范围: 0 … 10000

EFI_TYPE.d:
What method of communication is used for EFI #1

取值:
  0: None
  1: Serial-MS
  2: NWPMU
  3: Serial-Lutan
  4: Loweheiser
  5: DroneCAN
  6: Currawong-ECU
  7: Scripting
  8: Hirth
  9: MAVLink

EFI_THRLIN_COEF1.d:
一阶多项式系数。 （=1，如果节流阀是一阶多项式趋势线）

范围：-1 … 1

EFI_THRLIN_COEF2.d:
Second Order Polynomial Coefficient (=0, if throttle is second order polynomial trendline)

范围: -1 … 1

EFI_THRLIN_COEF3.d:
Third Order Polynomial Coefficient. (=0, if throttle is third order polynomial trendline)

范围: -1 … 1

EFI_THRLIN_EN.d:
启用 EFI 油门线性化

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：启用

EFI_THRLIN_OFS.d:
油门线性化偏移

范围：0 … 100

EK2_ABIAS_P_NSE.d:
This noise controls the growth of the vertical accelerometer delta velocity bias state error estimate. Increasing it makes accelerometer bias estimation faster and noisier.

范围: 0.00001 … 0.005

EK2_ACC_P_NSE.d:
This control disturbance noise controls the growth of estimated error due to accelerometer measurement errors excluding bias. Increasing it makes the flter trust the accelerometer measurements less and other measurements more.

范围: 0.01 … 1.0

EK2_ALT_M_NSE.d:
This is the RMS value of noise in the altitude measurement. Increasing it reduces the weighting of the baro measurement and will make the filter respond more slowly to baro measurement errors, but will make it more sensitive to GPS and accelerometer errors.

范围: 0.1 … 10.0

EK2_ALT_SOURCE.d:
EKF 使用的主要高度传感器。如果选择 Baro 以外的传感器且变得不可用，则 Baro 传感器将用作后备传感器。注意：当靠近地面且 EK2_ALT_SOURCE = 0 或 2（Baro 或 GPS）时，EK2_RNG_USE_HGT 参数可用于切换到测距仪。

取值：
  0：使用气压计
  1：使用测距仪
  2：使用GPS
  3：使用范围信标

EK2_BCN_DELAY.n: 距离信标测量延迟（毫秒）
EK2_BCN_DELAY.d:
This is the number of msec that the range beacon measurements lag behind the inertial measurements. It is the time from the end of the optical flow averaging period and does not include the time delay due to the 100msec of averaging within the flow sensor.

范围: 0 … 127

EK2_BCN_I_GTE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the range beacon measurement innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK2_BCN_M_NSE.d:
This is the RMS value of noise in the range beacon measurement. Increasing it reduces the weighting on this measurement.

范围: 0.1 … 10.0

EK2_CHECK_SCALE.d:
This scales the thresholds that are used to check GPS accuracy before it is used by the EKF. A value of 100 is the default. Values greater than 100 increase and values less than 100 reduce the maximum GPS error the EKF will accept. A value of 200 will double the allowable GPS error.

范围: 50 … 200

EK2_EAS_I_GATE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the airspeed measurement innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK2_EAS_M_NSE.d:
This is the RMS value of noise in equivalent airspeed measurements used by planes. Increasing it reduces the weighting of airspeed measurements and will make wind speed estimates less noisy and slower to converge. Increasing also increases navigation errors when dead-reckoning without GPS measurements.

范围: 0.5 … 5.0

EK2_ENABLE.d:
This enables EKF2. Enabling EKF2 only makes the maths run, it does not mean it will be used for flight control. To use it for flight control set AHRS_EKF_TYPE=2. A reboot or restart will need to be performed after changing the value of EK2_ENABLE for it to take effect.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled

EK2_FLOW_DELAY.d:
This is the number of msec that the optical flow measurements lag behind the inertial measurements. It is the time from the end of the optical flow averaging period and does not include the time delay due to the 100msec of averaging within the flow sensor.

范围: 0 … 127

EK2_FLOW_I_GATE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the optical flow innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK2_FLOW_M_NSE.d:
This is the RMS value of noise and errors in optical flow measurements. Increasing it reduces the weighting on these measurements.

范围: 0.05 … 1.0

EK2_FLOW_USE.d:
控制光流数据是否融合到 24 状态导航估计器或 1 状态地形高度估计器中。

取值：
  0：无
  1：导航
  2：地形

EK2_GBIAS_P_NSE.n: 速率陀螺仪偏置稳定性 (rad/s/s)
EK2_GBIAS_P_NSE.d:
This state  process noise controls growth of the gyro delta angle bias state error estimate. Increasing it makes rate gyro bias estimation faster and noisier.

范围: 0.00001 … 0.001

EK2_GLITCH_RAD.n: GPS故障半径 闸门尺寸（米）
EK2_GLITCH_RAD.d:
This controls the maximum radial uncertainty in position between the value predicted by the filter and the value measured by the GPS before the filter position and velocity states are reset to the GPS. Making this value larger allows the filter to ignore larger GPS glitches but also means that non-GPS errors such as IMU and compass can create a larger error in position before the filter is forced back to the GPS position.

范围: 10 … 100

EK2_GPS_CHECK.d:
This is a 1 byte bitmap controlling which GPS preflight checks are performed. Set to 0 to bypass all checks. Set to 255 perform all checks. Set to 3 to check just the number of satellites and HDoP. Set to 31 for the most rigorous checks that will still allow checks to pass when the copter is moving, eg launch from a boat.

位定义:
  bit0: NSats
  bit1: HDoP
  bit2: speed error
  bit3: position error
  bit4: yaw error
  bit5: pos drift
  bit6: vert speed
  bit7: horiz speed

EK2_GPS_TYPE.d:
This controls use of GPS measurements : 0 = use 3D velocity & 2D position, 1 = use 2D velocity and 2D position, 2 = use 2D position, 3 = Inhibit GPS use - this can be useful when flying with an optical flow sensor in an environment where GPS quality is poor and subject to large multipath errors.

取值:
  0: GPS 3D Vel and 2D Pos
  1: GPS 2D vel and 2D pos
  2: GPS 2D pos
  3: No GPS

EK2_GSCL_P_NSE.n: 速率陀螺仪比例因子稳定性 (1/s)
EK2_GSCL_P_NSE.d:
This noise controls the rate of gyro scale factor learning. Increasing it makes rate gyro scale factor estimation faster and noisier.

范围: 0.000001 … 0.001

EK2_GSF_RST_MAX.n: 允许的 EKF-GSF 偏航估计重置最大次数
EK2_GSF_RST_MAX.d:
Sets the maximum number of times the EKF2 will be allowed to reset its yaw to the estimate from the EKF-GSF yaw estimator. No resets will be allowed unless the use of the EKF-GSF yaw estimate is enabled via the EK2_GSF_USE_MASK parameter.

范围: 1 … 10

EK2_GSF_RUN_MASK.n: EKF-GSF 偏航估计器运行的位掩码
EK2_GSF_RUN_MASK.d:
EKF2 实例运行独立 EKF-GSF 偏航估计器的位掩码，以提供不依赖于磁力计数据的备份偏航估计。该估算器使用 IMU、GPS 以及空速数据（如果有）。主 EKF2 实例的 EKF-GSF 偏航估计器数据将记录为 GSF0 和 GSF1 消息。该算法生成的偏航估计的使用由 EK2_GSF_USE_MASK 和 EK2_GSF_RST_MAX 参数控制。要仅在行驶和记录中运行 EKF-GSF 偏航估计器，请将 EK2_GSF_USE_MASK 设置为 0。

位定义：
  bit0：第一EKF
  bit1：第二EKF
  bit2：第三EKF
  bit3：第四EKF
  bit4：第五EKF
  bit5：第六EKF

EK2_GSF_USE_MASK.n: 使用 EKF-GSF 偏航估计器的位掩码
EK2_GSF_USE_MASK.d:
1 字节位图，其中 EKF2 实例将使用已由 EK2_GSF_RUN_MASK 参数打开的 EKF-GSF 偏航估计器的输出。如果惯性导航计算停止跟随 GPS，则车辆代码可以请求 EKF2 尝试解决问题，方法是通过切换到另一个 EKF2 实例来执行偏航重置（如果此参数启用）。

位定义：
  bit0：第一EKF
  bit1：第二EKF
  bit2：第三EKF
  bit3：第四EKF
  bit4：第五EKF
  bit5：第六EKF

EK2_GYRO_P_NSE.d:
This control disturbance noise controls the growth of estimated error due to gyro measurement errors excluding bias. Increasing it makes the flter trust the gyro measurements less and other measurements more.

范围: 0.0001 … 0.1

EK2_HGT_DELAY.d:
This is the number of msec that the Height measurements lag behind the inertial measurements.

范围: 0 … 250

EK2_HGT_I_GATE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the height measurement innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK2_HRT_FILT.n: 高度率滤波器交叉频率
EK2_HRT_FILT.d:
Specifies the crossover frequency of the complementary filter used to calculate the output predictor height rate derivative.

范围: 0.1 … 30.0

EK2_IMU_MASK.n: 活动 IMU 的位掩码
EK2_IMU_MASK.d:
在 EKF2 中使用的 IMU 的 1 字节位图。将为每个选定的 IMU 启动一个单独的 EKF2 实例。设置为 1 仅使用第一个 IMU（默认），设置为 2 仅使用第二个 IMU，设置为 3 使用第一个和第二个 IMU。如果内存和处理资源允许，最多可以使用 6 个附加 IMU。可能没有足够的内存和处理资源来运行多个实例。如果发生这种情况，EKF2 将无法启动。

位定义：
  bit0：第一IMU
  bit1：第二IMU
  bit2：第三IMU
  bit3：第四IMU
  bit4：第五IMU
  bit5：第六IMU

EK2_MAGB_P_NSE.n: 体磁场过程噪声（高斯/秒）
EK2_MAGB_P_NSE.d:
This state process noise controls the growth of body magnetic field state error estimates. Increasing it makes magnetometer bias error estimation faster and noisier.

范围: 0.00001 … 0.01

EK2_MAGE_P_NSE.n: 地磁场过程噪声（高斯/秒）
EK2_MAGE_P_NSE.d:
This state process noise controls the growth of earth magnetic field state error estimates. Increasing it makes earth magnetic field estimation faster and noisier.

范围: 0.00001 … 0.01

EK2_MAG_CAL.d:
This determines when the filter will use the 3-axis magnetometer fusion model that estimates both earth and body fixed magnetic field states, when it will use a simpler magnetic heading fusion model that does not use magnetic field states and when it will use an alternative method of yaw determination to the magnetometer. The 3-axis magnetometer fusion is only suitable for use when the external magnetic field environment is stable. EK2_MAG_CAL = 0 uses heading fusion on ground, 3-axis fusion in-flight, and is the default setting for Plane users. EK2_MAG_CAL = 1 uses 3-axis fusion only when manoeuvring. EK2_MAG_CAL = 2 uses heading fusion at all times, is recommended if the external magnetic field is varying and is the default for rovers. EK2_MAG_CAL = 3 uses heading fusion on the ground and 3-axis fusion after the first in-air field and yaw reset has completed, and is the default for copters. EK2_MAG_CAL = 4 uses 3-axis fusion at all times. NOTE: The fusion mode can be forced to 2 for specific EKF cores using the EK2_MAG_MASK parameter. NOTE: limited operation without a magnetometer or any other yaw sensor is possible by setting all COMPASS_USE, COMPASS_USE2, COMPASS_USE3, etc parameters to 0 with COMPASS_ENABLE set to 1. If this is done, the EK2_GSF_RUN and EK2_GSF_USE masks must be set to the same as EK2_IMU_MASK.

取值:
  0: When flying
  1: When manoeuvring
  2: Never
  3: After first climb yaw reset
  4: Always

EK2_MAG_EF_LIM.d:
This limits the difference between the learned earth magnetic field and the earth field from the world magnetic model tables. A value of zero means to disable the use of the WMM tables.

范围: 0 … 500

EK2_MAG_I_GATE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the magnetometer measurement innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK2_MAG_MASK.n: 始终使用航向融合的活动 EKF 核心的位掩码
EK2_MAG_MASK.d:
EKF 核心的 1 字节位图，将禁用磁场状态并始终使用简单的磁航向融合。此参数使指定的核心能够用作飞行到具有高水平外部磁干扰的环境的备份，这可能会在使用 3 轴磁力计融合时降低 EKF 姿态估计。注意：在不同的核心上使用不同的磁力计融合算法会使由于磁力计错误而导致不必要的 EKF 核心切换的可能性更大。

位定义：
  bit0：第一EKF
  bit1：第二EKF
  bit2：第三EKF
  bit3：第四EKF
  bit4：第五EKF
  bit5：第六EKF

EK2_MAG_M_NSE.d:
This is the RMS value of noise in magnetometer measurements. Increasing it reduces the weighting on these measurements.

范围: 0.01 … 0.5

EK2_MAX_FLOW.d:
This sets the magnitude maximum optical flow rate in rad/sec that will be accepted by the filter

范围: 1.0 … 4.0

EK2_NOAID_M_NSE.d:
This sets the amount of position variation that the EKF allows for when operating without external measurements (eg GPS or optical flow). Increasing this parameter makes the EKF attitude estimate less sensitive to vehicle manoeuvres but more sensitive to IMU errors.

范围: 0.5 … 50.0

EK2_OGN_HGT_MASK.n: EKF 参考高度校正的位掩码控制
EK2_OGN_HGT_MASK.d:
When a height sensor other than GPS is used as the primary height source by the EKF, the position of the zero height datum is defined by that sensor and its frame of reference. If a GPS height measurement is also available, then the height of the WGS-84 height datum used by the EKF can be corrected so that the height returned by the getLLH() function is compensated for primary height sensor drift and change in datum over time. The first two bit positions control when the height datum will be corrected. Correction is performed using a Bayes filter and only operates when GPS quality permits. The third bit position controls where the corrections to the GPS reference datum are applied. Corrections can be applied to the local vertical position or to the reported EKF origin height (default).

位定义:
  bit0: Correct when using Baro height
  bit1: Correct when using range finder height
  bit2: Apply corrections to local position

EK2_OPTIONS.d:
optional EKF2 behaviour. Disabling external navigation prevents use of external vision data in the EKF2 solution

位定义:
  bit0: DisableExternalNavigation

EK2_POSNE_M_NSE.d:
This sets the GPS horizontal position observation noise. Increasing it reduces the weighting of GPS horizontal position measurements.

范围: 0.1 … 10.0

EK2_POS_I_GATE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the GPS position measurement innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK2_RNG_I_GATE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the range finder innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK2_RNG_M_NSE.d:
This is the RMS value of noise in the range finder measurement. Increasing it reduces the weighting on this measurement.

范围: 0.1 … 10.0

EK2_RNG_USE_HGT.n: 测距仪开关高度百分比
EK2_RNG_USE_HGT.d:
当测距仪低于其最大范围的这个百分比时，可以用作主要高度源（参见 RNGFND*_MAX）。除非选择 Baro 或 GPS 高度作为主要高度源（分别通过 EK2_ALT_SOURCE = 0 或 2），否则此功能将不起作用。  此功能不应用于地形跟踪，因为它设计用于垂直起飞和着陆，在开始任务之前爬升至测距仪使用高度之上，并且低于该高度的水平位置变化仅限于起飞和着陆点周围的平坦区域。

范围：-1 … 70

EK2_RNG_USE_SPD.d:
The range finder will not be used as the primary height source when the horizontal ground speed is greater than this value.

范围: 2.0 … 6.0

EK2_TAU_OUTPUT.n: 输出互补滤波时间常数（厘秒）
EK2_TAU_OUTPUT.d:
Sets the time constant of the output complementary filter/predictor in centi-seconds.

范围: 10 … 50

EK2_TERR_GRAD.d:
Specifies the maximum gradient of the terrain below the vehicle assumed when it is fusing range finder or optical flow to estimate terrain height.

范围: 0 … 0.2

EK2_VELD_M_NSE.d:
This sets a lower limit on the speed accuracy reported by the GPS receiver that is used to set vertical velocity observation noise. If the model of receiver used does not provide a speed accurcy estimate, then the parameter value will be used. Increasing it reduces the weighting of the GPS vertical velocity measurements.

范围: 0.05 … 5.0

EK2_VELNE_M_NSE.d:
This sets a lower limit on the speed accuracy reported by the GPS receiver that is used to set horizontal velocity observation noise. If the model of receiver used does not provide a speed accurcy estimate, then the parameter value will be used. Increasing it reduces the weighting of the GPS horizontal velocity measurements.

范围: 0.05 … 5.0

EK2_VEL_I_GATE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the GPS velocity measurement innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK2_WIND_PSCALE.n: 高度比风过程噪声缩放器
EK2_WIND_PSCALE.d:
This controls how much the process noise on the wind states is increased when gaining or losing altitude to take into account changes in wind speed and direction with altitude. Increasing this parameter increases how rapidly the wind states adapt when changing altitude, but does make wind velocity estimation noiser.

范围: 0.0 … 1.0

EK2_WIND_P_NSE.d:
This state process noise controls the growth of wind state error estimates. Increasing it makes wind estimation faster and noisier.

范围: 0.01 … 1.0

EK2_YAW_I_GATE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the magnetometer yaw measurement innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK2_YAW_M_NSE.d:
This is the RMS value of noise in yaw measurements from the magnetometer. Increasing it reduces the weighting on these measurements.

范围: 0.05 … 1.0

EK3_ABIAS_P_NSE.d:
This noise controls the growth of the vertical accelerometer delta velocity bias state error estimate. Increasing it makes accelerometer bias estimation faster and noisier.

范围: 0.00001 … 0.02

EK3_ACC_BIAS_LIM.d:
The accelerometer bias state will be limited to +- this value

范围: 0.5 … 2.5

EK3_ACC_P_NSE.d:
This control disturbance noise controls the growth of estimated error due to accelerometer measurement errors excluding bias. Increasing it makes the flter trust the accelerometer measurements less and other measurements more.

范围: 0.01 … 1.0

EK3_AFFINITY.d:
These options control the affinity between sensor instances and EKF cores

位定义:
  bit0: EnableGPSAffinity
  bit1: EnableBaroAffinity
  bit2: EnableCompassAffinity
  bit3: EnableAirspeedAffinity

EK3_ALT_M_NSE.d:
This is the RMS value of noise in the altitude measurement. Increasing it reduces the weighting of the baro measurement and will make the filter respond more slowly to baro measurement errors, but will make it more sensitive to GPS and accelerometer errors. A larger value for EK3_ALT_M_NSE may be required when operating with EK3_SRCx_POSZ = 0. This parameter also sets the noise for the 'synthetic' zero height measurement that is used when EK3_SRCx_POSZ = 0.

范围: 0.1 … 100.0

EK3_BCN_DELAY.n: 距离信标测量延迟（毫秒）
EK3_BCN_DELAY.d:
This is the number of msec that the range beacon measurements lag behind the inertial measurements.

范围: 0 … 250

EK3_BCN_I_GTE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the range beacon measurement innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK3_BCN_M_NSE.d:
This is the RMS value of noise in the range beacon measurement. Increasing it reduces the weighting on this measurement.

范围: 0.1 … 10.0

EK3_BETA_MASK.n: 控制侧唇角度融合的位掩码
EK3_BETA_MASK.d:
1 字节位图控制侧滑角融合的使用，以估计“向前飞行”飞行器类型（例如固定翼飞机）操作期间的非风状态。通过假设侧滑角很小，只要 EKF 不是航位推算（例如具有独立的速度或位置传感器，例如 GPS），风速状态估计就会被校正。此行为默认启用且无法禁用。 EKF航位推算时，以风态为参考，利用小角侧滑假设来修正非风速状态（如姿态、速度、位置等），提高导航精度。此行为默认启用且无法禁用。该参数控制的行为是当 EKF 不进行航位推算时，使用小侧滑角假设来校正非风速状态。这主要有利于减少在没有偏航传感器（例如磁力计或双天线 GPS 偏航）的直线和水平飞行期间偏航角误差的累积，前提是不执行具有大侧滑角的特技飞行机动。当故意不安装或禁用偏航传感器时，可以使用“始终”选项。如果安装了偏航传感器，则可以使用“WhenNoYawSensor”选项，但需要防止飞行中故障和 EKF 持续拒绝。对于在操作员可视范围内进行频繁转弯操作的车辆，无需设置此参数。

位定义：
  位0：始终
  bit1：无偏航传感器时

EK3_CHECK_SCALE.d:
This scales the thresholds that are used to check GPS accuracy before it is used by the EKF. A value of 100 is the default. Values greater than 100 increase and values less than 100 reduce the maximum GPS error the EKF will accept. A value of 200 will double the allowable GPS error.

范围: 50 … 200

EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_X.d:
沿 X 体轴测量的质量与阻力系数之比。该参数能够估计具有钝体且在 X 和 Y 方向上没有推进力的车辆（例如多旋翼飞行器）的风漂移。这种效应产生的阻力与速度的平方成正比。设置为 > 1.0 的正值即可启用。起始值是质量（公斤）除以额面积。转子的预测阻力由 EK3_DRAG_MCOEF 参数单独指定。

范围：0.0 … 1000.0

EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_Y.n: Y 轴阻力的弹道系数
EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_Y.d:
沿 Y 体轴测量的质量与阻力系数之比。该参数能够估计具有钝体且在 X 和 Y 方向上没有推进力的车辆（例如多旋翼飞行器）的风漂移。这种效应产生的阻力与速度的平方成正比。设置为 > 1.0 的正值即可启用。起始值是质量（公斤）除以侧面积。转子的预测阻力由 EK3_DRAG_MCOEF 参数单独指定。

范围：50.0 … 1000.0

EK3_DRAG_MCOEF.d:
This parameter is used to predict the drag produced by the rotors when flying a multi-copter, enabling estimation of wind drift. The drag produced by this effect scales with speed not speed squared and is produced because some of the air velocity normal to the rotors axis of rotation is lost when passing through the rotor disc which changes the momentum of the airflow causing drag. For unducted rotors the effect is roughly proportional to the area of the propeller blades when viewed side on and changes with different propellers. It is higher for ducted rotors. For example if flying at 15 m/s at sea level conditions produces a rotor induced drag acceleration of 1.5 m/s/s, then EK3_DRAG_MCOEF would be set to 0.1 = (1.5/15.0). Set EK3_MCOEF to a positive value to enable wind estimation using this drag effect. To account for the drag produced by the body which scales with speed squared, see documentation for the EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_X and EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_Y parameters.

范围: 0.0 … 1.0

EK3_DRAG_M_NSE.n: 阻力加速度的观测噪声
EK3_DRAG_M_NSE.d:
This sets the amount of noise used when fusing X and Y acceleration as an observation that enables estimation of wind velocity for multi-rotor vehicles. This feature is enabled by the EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_X and EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_Y parameters

范围: 0.1 … 2.0

EK3_EAS_I_GATE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the airspeed measurement innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK3_EAS_M_NSE.d:
This is the RMS value of noise in equivalent airspeed measurements used by planes. Increasing it reduces the weighting of airspeed measurements and will make wind speed estimates less noisy and slower to converge. Increasing also increases navigation errors when dead-reckoning without GPS measurements.

范围: 0.5 … 5.0

EK3_ENABLE.d:
This enables EKF3. Enabling EKF3 only makes the maths run, it does not mean it will be used for flight control. To use it for flight control set AHRS_EKF_TYPE=3. A reboot or restart will need to be performed after changing the value of EK3_ENABLE for it to take effect.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled

EK3_ERR_THRESH.n: EKF3 通道相对误差敏感度阈值
EK3_ERR_THRESH.d:
lanes have to be consistently better than the primary by at least this threshold to reduce their overall relativeCoreError, lowering this makes lane switching more sensitive to smaller error differences

范围: 0.05 … 1

EK3_FLOW_DELAY.d:
This is the number of msec that the optical flow measurements lag behind the inertial measurements. It is the time from the end of the optical flow averaging period and does not include the time delay due to the 100msec of averaging within the flow sensor.

范围: 0 … 250

EK3_FLOW_I_GATE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the optical flow innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK3_FLOW_MAX.d:
The maximum optical flow rate in rad/sec that will be accepted by the filter.  Flow rates above this value will not be fused.

范围: 1.0 … 4.0

EK3_FLOW_M_NSE.d:
This is the RMS value of noise and errors in optical flow measurements. Increasing it reduces the weighting on these measurements.

范围: 0.05 … 1.0

EK3_FLOW_USE.d:
控制光流数据是否融合到 24 状态导航估计器或 1 状态地形高度估计器中。

取值：
  0：无
  1：导航
  2：地形

EK3_GBIAS_P_NSE.n: 速率陀螺仪偏置稳定性 (rad/s/s)
EK3_GBIAS_P_NSE.d:
This state  process noise controls growth of the gyro delta angle bias state error estimate. Increasing it makes rate gyro bias estimation faster and noisier.

范围: 0.00001 … 0.001

EK3_GLITCH_RAD.n: GPS故障半径 闸门尺寸（米）
EK3_GLITCH_RAD.d:
This controls the maximum radial uncertainty in position between the value predicted by the filter and the value measured by the GPS before the filter position and velocity states are reset to the GPS. Making this value larger allows the filter to ignore larger GPS glitches but also means that non-GPS errors such as IMU and compass can create a larger error in position before the filter is forced back to the GPS position. If EK3_GLITCH_RAD set to 0 the GPS innovations will be clipped instead of rejected if they exceed the gate size set by EK3_VEL_I_GATE and EK3_POS_I_GATE which can be useful if poor quality sensor data is causing GPS rejection and loss of navigation but does make the EKF more susceptible to GPS glitches. If setting EK3_GLITCH_RAD to 0 it is recommended to reduce EK3_VEL_I_GATE and EK3_POS_I_GATE to 300.

范围: 10 … 100

EK3_GND_EFF_DZ.n: 巴罗高度地面效应盲区
EK3_GND_EFF_DZ.d:
This parameter sets the size of the dead zone that is applied to negative baro height spikes that can occur when taking off or landing when a vehicle with lift rotors is operating in ground effect ground effect. Set to about 0.5m less than the amount of negative offset in baro height that occurs just prior to takeoff when lift motors are spooling up. Set to 0 if no ground effect is present.

范围: 0.0 … 10.0

EK3_GPS_CHECK.d:
This is a 1 byte bitmap controlling which GPS preflight checks are performed. Set to 0 to bypass all checks. Set to 255 perform all checks. Set to 3 to check just the number of satellites and HDoP. Set to 31 for the most rigorous checks that will still allow checks to pass when the copter is moving, eg launch from a boat.

位定义:
  bit0: NSats
  bit1: HDoP
  bit2: speed error
  bit3: position error
  bit4: yaw error
  bit5: pos drift
  bit6: vert speed
  bit7: horiz speed

EK3_GPS_VACC_MAX.d:
Vertical accuracy threshold for GPS as the altitude source. The GPS will not be used as an altitude source if the reported vertical accuracy of the GPS is larger than this threshold, falling back to baro instead. Set to zero to deactivate the threshold check.

范围: 0.0 … 10.0

EK3_GSF_RST_MAX.n: 允许的 EKF-GSF 偏航估计重置最大次数
EK3_GSF_RST_MAX.d:
Sets the maximum number of times the EKF3 will be allowed to reset its yaw to the estimate from the EKF-GSF yaw estimator. No resets will be allowed unless the use of the EKF-GSF yaw estimate is enabled via the EK3_GSF_USE_MASK parameter.

范围: 1 … 10

EK3_GSF_RUN_MASK.n: EKF-GSF 偏航估计器运行的位掩码
EK3_GSF_RUN_MASK.d:
1 字节位图，其中 EKF3 实例运行独立的 EKF-GSF 偏航估计器，以提供不依赖于磁力计数据的备份偏航估计。该估算器使用 IMU、GPS 以及空速数据（如果有）。主 EKF3 实例的 EKF-GSF 偏航估计器数据将记录为 GSF0 和 GSF1 消息。该算法生成的偏航估计的使用由 EK3_GSF_USE_MASK 和 EK3_GSF_RST_MAX 参数控制。要仅在行驶和记录中运行 EKF-GSF 偏航估计器，请将 EK3_GSF_USE 设置为 0。

位定义：
  bit0：第一EKF
  bit1：第二EKF
  bit2：第三EKF
  bit3：第四EKF
  bit4：第五EKF
  bit5：第六EKF

EK3_GSF_USE_MASK.n: 使用 EKF-GSF 偏航估计器的位掩码
EK3_GSF_USE_MASK.d:
EKF3 实例将使用已由 EK3_GSF_RUN_MASK 参数打开的 EKF-GSF 偏航估计器的输出的位掩码。如果惯性导航计算停止跟随 GPS，则车辆代码可以请求 EKF3 尝试解决问题，方法是通过切换到另一个 EKF3 实例来执行偏航重置（如果此参数启用）。

位定义：
  bit0：第一EKF
  bit1：第二EKF
  bit2：第三EKF
  bit3：第四EKF
  bit4：第五EKF
  bit5：第六EKF

EK3_GYRO_P_NSE.d:
This control disturbance noise controls the growth of estimated error due to gyro measurement errors excluding bias. Increasing it makes the flter trust the gyro measurements less and other measurements more.

范围: 0.0001 … 0.1

EK3_HGT_DELAY.d:
This is the number of msec that the Height measurements lag behind the inertial measurements.

范围: 0 … 250

EK3_HGT_I_GATE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the height measurement innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted.  If EK3_GLITCH_RAD set to 0 the vertical position innovations will be clipped instead of rejected if they exceed the gate size and a smaller value of EK3_HGT_I_GATE not exceeding 300 is recommended to limit the effect of height sensor transient errors.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK3_HRT_FILT.n: 高度率滤波器交叉频率
EK3_HRT_FILT.d:
Specifies the crossover frequency of the complementary filter used to calculate the output predictor height rate derivative.

范围: 0.1 … 30.0

EK3_IMU_MASK.n: 活动 IMU 的位掩码
EK3_IMU_MASK.d:
在 EKF3 中使用的 IMU 的 1 字节位图。将为每个选定的 IMU 启动一个单独的 EKF3 实例。设置为 1 仅使用第一个 IMU（默认），设置为 2 仅使用第二个 IMU，设置为 3 使用第一个和第二个 IMU。如果内存和处理资源允许，最多可以使用 6 个附加 IMU。可能没有足够的内存和处理资源来运行多个实例。如果发生这种情况，EKF3 将无法启动。

位定义：
  bit0：第一IMU
  bit1：第二IMU
  bit2：第三IMU
  bit3：第四IMU
  bit4：第五IMU
  bit5：第六IMU

EK3_LOG_LEVEL.d:
确定 EKF3 流式记录的详细程度。值为 0 提供完整日志记录（默认），值为 1 仅记录 XKF4 缩放创新，值为 2 则记录 XKF4 和 GSF，值为 3 则禁用 EKF3 的所有流式日志记录。

范围：0 … 3

EK3_MAGB_P_NSE.n: 体磁场过程噪声（高斯/秒）
EK3_MAGB_P_NSE.d:
This state process noise controls the growth of body magnetic field state error estimates. Increasing it makes magnetometer bias error estimation faster and noisier.

范围: 0.00001 … 0.01

EK3_MAGE_P_NSE.n: 地磁场过程噪声（高斯/秒）
EK3_MAGE_P_NSE.d:
This state process noise controls the growth of earth magnetic field state error estimates. Increasing it makes earth magnetic field estimation faster and noisier.

范围: 0.00001 … 0.01

EK3_MAG_CAL.d:
This determines when the filter will use the 3-axis magnetometer fusion model that estimates both earth and body fixed magnetic field states and when it will use a simpler magnetic heading fusion model that does not use magnetic field states. The 3-axis magnetometer fusion is only suitable for use when the external magnetic field environment is stable. EK3_MAG_CAL = 0 uses heading fusion on ground, 3-axis fusion in-flight, and is the default setting for Plane users. EK3_MAG_CAL = 1 uses 3-axis fusion only when manoeuvring. EK3_MAG_CAL = 2 uses heading fusion at all times, is recommended if the external magnetic field is varying and is the default for rovers. EK3_MAG_CAL = 3 uses heading fusion on the ground and 3-axis fusion after the first in-air field and yaw reset has completed, and is the default for copters. EK3_MAG_CAL = 4 uses 3-axis fusion at all times. EK3_MAG_CAL = 7 uses 3-axis fusion on the ground and after the first in-air field and yaw reset has completed. This allows the magnetic field to be learned on the ground before takeoff (useful when swapping batteries with different magnetic signatures) while inhibiting learning during the initial climb when motor magnetic interference is strongest. NOTE : Use of simple heading magnetometer fusion makes vehicle compass calibration and alignment errors harder for the EKF to detect which reduces the sensitivity of the Copter EKF failsafe algorithm. NOTE: The fusion mode can be forced to 2 for specific EKF cores using the EK3_MAG_MASK parameter. NOTE: limited operation without a magnetometer or any other yaw sensor is possible by setting all COMPASS_USE, COMPASS_USE2, COMPASS_USE3, etc parameters to 0 and setting COMPASS_ENABLE to 0. If this is done, the EK3_GSF_RUN and EK3_GSF_USE masks must be set to the same as EK3_IMU_MASK. A yaw angle derived from IMU and GPS velocity data using a Gaussian Sum Filter (GSF) will then be used to align the yaw when flight commences and there is sufficient movement.

取值:
  0: When flying
  1: When manoeuvring
  2: Never
  3: After first climb yaw reset
  4: Always
  5: Use external yaw sensor (Deprecated in 4.1+ see EK3_SRCn_YAW)
  6: External yaw sensor with compass fallback (Deprecated in 4.1+ see EK3_SRCn_YAW)
  7: On ground and after first climb yaw reset

EK3_MAG_EF_LIM.d:
This limits the difference between the learned earth magnetic field and the earth field from the world magnetic model tables. A value of zero means to disable the use of the WMM tables.

范围: 0 … 500

EK3_MAG_I_GATE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the magnetometer measurement innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK3_MAG_MASK.n: 始终使用航向融合的活动 EKF 核心的位掩码
EK3_MAG_MASK.d:
EKF 核心的 1 字节位图，将禁用磁场状态并始终使用简单的磁航向融合。此参数使指定的核心能够用作飞行到具有高水平外部磁干扰的环境的备份，这可能会在使用 3 轴磁力计融合时降低 EKF 姿态估计。注意：在不同的核心上使用不同的磁力计融合算法会使由于磁力计错误而导致不必要的 EKF 核心切换的可能性更大。

位定义：
  bit0：第一EKF
  bit1：第二EKF
  bit2：第三EKF
  bit3：第四EKF
  bit4：第五EKF
  bit5：第六EKF

EK3_MAG_M_NSE.d:
This is the RMS value of noise in magnetometer measurements. Increasing it reduces the weighting on these measurements.

范围: 0.01 … 0.5

EK3_NOAID_M_NSE.d:
This sets the amount of position variation that the EKF allows for when operating without external measurements (eg GPS or optical flow). Increasing this parameter makes the EKF attitude estimate less sensitive to vehicle manoeuvres but more sensitive to IMU errors.

范围: 0.5 … 50.0

EK3_OGNM_TEST_SF.n: 地面不动测试比例因子
EK3_OGNM_TEST_SF.d:
This parameter is adjust the sensitivity of the on ground not moving test which is used to assist with learning the yaw gyro bias and stopping yaw drift before flight when operating without a yaw sensor. Bigger values allow the detection of a not moving condition with noiser IMU data. Check the XKFM data logged when the vehicle is on ground not moving and adjust the value of OGNM_TEST_SF to be slightly higher than the maximum value of the XKFM.ADR, XKFM.ALR, XKFM.GDR and XKFM.GLR test levels.

范围: 1.0 … 10.0

EK3_OGN_HGT_MASK.n: EKF 参考高度校正的位掩码控制
EK3_OGN_HGT_MASK.d:
When a height sensor other than GPS is used as the primary height source by the EKF, the position of the zero height datum is defined by that sensor and its frame of reference. If a GPS height measurement is also available, then the height of the WGS-84 height datum used by the EKF can be corrected so that the height returned by the getLLH() function is compensated for primary height sensor drift and change in datum over time. The first two bit positions control when the height datum will be corrected. Correction is performed using a Bayes filter and only operates when GPS quality permits. The third bit position controls where the corrections to the GPS reference datum are applied. Corrections can be applied to the local vertical position or to the reported EKF origin height (default).

位定义:
  bit0: Correct when using Baro height
  bit1: Correct when using range finder height
  bit2: Apply corrections to local position

EK3_OPTIONS.d:
EKF 可选行为。位 0（JammingExpected）：设置 JammingExpected 将更改 EKF 行为，这样，如果可以进行航位推算导航，则需要通过 EK3_GPS_CHECK 和 EK3_CHECK_SCALE 控制的飞行前对准 GPS 质量检查，然后再恢复 GPS 使用（如果 GPS 锁定丢失超过 2 秒），以防止错误的位置估计。位 1（手动车道切换）：危险 – 如果启用，则会禁用自动车道切换。如果活动车道变得不健康，则不会发生自动切换。用户必须手动设置 EK3_PRIMARY 才能更改车道。不会对所选车道执行健康检查。请务必谨慎使用。  位 2（Optflow 可以使用地形 alt）：如果车辆爬升至测距仪范围以上，则将使用地形 SRTM 数据，从而允许在更高高度使用光流。位 3（用于 optflow 缩放的 AGL KF）：使用 2 状态 IMU 辅助 AGL 卡尔曼滤波器（高度 + 垂直速度，与测距仪融合）来计算用于光流速度缩放的地面高度，而不是地形状态 pd。这将光流缩放与主滤波器垂直位置状态的误差解耦。

位定义：
  bit0：预期干扰
  bit1：手动车道切换
  bit2：Optflow 可以使用地形替代
  bit3：用于 optflow 缩放的 AGL KF

EK3_POSNE_M_NSE.d:
This sets the GPS horizontal position observation noise. Increasing it reduces the weighting of GPS horizontal position measurements.

范围: 0.1 … 10.0

EK3_POS_I_GATE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the GPS position measurement innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted. If EK3_GLITCH_RAD has been set to 0 the horizontal position innovations will be clipped instead of rejected if they exceed the gate size so a smaller value of EK3_POS_I_GATE not exceeding 300 is recommended to limit the effect of GPS transient errors.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK3_PRIMARY.d:
The core number (index in IMU mask) that will be used as the primary EKF core on startup. While disarmed the EKF will force the use of this core. A value of 0 corresponds to the first IMU in EK3_IMU_MASK.

范围: 0 … 2

EK3_RNG_I_GATE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the range finder innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK3_RNG_M_NSE.d:
This is the RMS value of noise in the range finder measurement. Increasing it reduces the weighting on this measurement.

范围: 0.1 … 10.0

EK3_RNG_USE_HGT.n: 测距仪开关高度百分比
EK3_RNG_USE_HGT.d:
当测距仪低于其最大范围的该百分比（请参阅 RNGFNDx_MAX）时，可用作主要高度源，并且主要高度源是 Baro 或 GPS（请参阅 EK3_SRCx_POSZ）。  此功能不应用于地形跟踪，因为它设计用于垂直起飞和着陆，在开始任务之前爬升至测距仪使用高度之上，并且低于该高度的水平位置变化仅限于起飞和着陆点周围的平坦区域。

范围：-1 … 70

EK3_RNG_USE_SPD.d:
The range finder will not be used as the primary height source when the horizontal ground speed is greater than this value.

范围: 2.0 … 6.0

EK3_TAU_OUTPUT.n: 输出互补滤波时间常数（厘秒）
EK3_TAU_OUTPUT.d:
Sets the time constant of the output complementary filter/predictor in centi-seconds.

范围: 10 … 50

EK3_TERR_GRAD.d:
Specifies the maximum gradient of the terrain below the vehicle when it is using range finder as a height reference

范围: 0 … 0.2

EK3_VELD_M_NSE.d:
This sets a lower limit on the speed accuracy reported by the GPS receiver that is used to set vertical velocity observation noise. If the model of receiver used does not provide a speed accurcy estimate, then the parameter value will be used. Increasing it reduces the weighting of the GPS vertical velocity measurements.

范围: 0.05 … 5.0

EK3_VELNE_M_NSE.d:
This sets a lower limit on the speed accuracy reported by the GPS receiver that is used to set horizontal velocity observation noise. If the model of receiver used does not provide a speed accurcy estimate, then the parameter value will be used. Increasing it reduces the weighting of the GPS horizontal velocity measurements.

范围: 0.05 … 5.0

EK3_VEL_I_GATE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the GPS velocity measurement innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted. If EK3_GLITCH_RAD set to 0 the velocity innovations will be clipped instead of rejected if they exceed the gate size and a smaller value of EK3_VEL_I_GATE not exceeding 300 is recommended to limit the effect of GPS transient errors.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK3_VIS_VERR_MAX.d:
This is the 1-STD odometry velocity observation error that will be assumed when minimum quality is reported by the sensor. When quality is between max and min, the error will be calculated using linear interpolation between VIS_VERR_MIN and VIS_VERR_MAX.

范围: 0.5 … 5.0

EK3_VIS_VERR_MIN.d:
This is the 1-STD odometry velocity observation error that will be assumed when maximum quality is reported by the sensor. When quality is between max and min, the error will be calculated using linear interpolation between VIS_VERR_MIN and VIS_VERR_MAX.

范围: 0.05 … 0.5

EK3_WENC_VERR.d:
This is the 1-STD odometry velocity observation error that will be assumed when wheel encoder data is being fused.

范围: 0.01 … 1.0

EK3_WIND_PSCALE.n: 高度比风过程噪声缩放器
EK3_WIND_PSCALE.d:
This controls how much the process noise on the wind states is increased when gaining or losing altitude to take into account changes in wind speed and direction with altitude. Increasing this parameter increases how rapidly the wind states adapt when changing altitude, but does make wind velocity estimation noiser.

范围: 0.0 … 2.0

EK3_WIND_P_NSE.d:
This state process noise controls the growth of wind state error estimates. Increasing it makes wind estimation faster and noisier.

范围: 0.01 … 2.0

EK3_YAW_I_GATE.d:
This sets the percentage number of standard deviations applied to the magnetometer yaw measurement innovation consistency check. Decreasing it makes it more likely that good measurements will be rejected. Increasing it makes it more likely that bad measurements will be accepted.

范围: 100 … 1000

EK3_YAW_M_NSE.d:
This is the RMS value of noise in yaw measurements from the magnetometer. Increasing it reduces the weighting on these measurements.

范围: 0.05 … 1.0

  3：全球定位系统
  4：灯塔

EK3_SRC_OPTIONS.d:
EKF 源选项。位 0：融合 EK3_SRCx_VEL_ 中存在的所有速度源。位 1：使用光流时对齐外部导航位置。位 3：每个核心使用 SRC。默认情况下，EKF 源选择是通过 EK3_SRC 参数控制的，一次只允许一个源在所有内核上处于活动状态（可通过 MAVLink、Lua 或 RC 进行切换）。启用此位可将 EKF 核心 1 映射到 SRC1，将核心 2 映射到 SRC2，等等，从而允许每个核心使用专用源独立运行。

位定义：
  bit0：FuseAllVelocity
  位1：使用OptFlow时对齐ExtNavPos
  位 3：UsePerCoreEKFSources

ESC_TLM_MAV_OFS.n: ESC 遥测 mavlink 偏移量
ESC_TLM_MAV_OFS.d:
通过 MAVLink 报告为 ESC_TELEMETRY 数据包时应用于 ESC 编号的偏移量。这允许将高编号电机显示为低编号 ESC，以方便在 GCS 显示屏上显示。值 4 将在输出 5 上将 ESC 作为 ESC_TELEMETRY 数据包中的 ESC 编号 1 发送

范围：0 … 31

FENCE_ACTION.d:
What action should be taken when fence is breached

取值:
  0: Report Only
  1: RTL or Hold
  2: Hold
  3: SmartRTL or RTL or Hold
  4: SmartRTL or Hold
  5: Terminate
  6: Loiter or Hold

FENCE_ALT_MAX.d:
地理围栏触发前允许的最大高度。请参阅 FENCE_ALT_MAX_TP 作为参考框架。

范围：10 … 1000

FENCE_ALT_MAX_TP.n: 最大海拔高度 框架类型
FENCE_ALT_MAX_TP.d:
The altitude reference frame for the maximum altitude fence. Can be AMSL, home-relative, origin relative or AGL.

取值:
  0: Above sea level
  1: Above Home
  2: Above Origin
  3: Above Terrain

FENCE_ALT_MIN.d:
地理围栏触发前允许的最低高度。请参阅 FENCE_ALT_MIN_TP 作为参考框架。

范围：-100 … 100

FENCE_ALT_MIN_TP.d:
The altitude reference frame for the minimum altitude fence. Can be AMSL, home-relative, origin relative or AGL.

取值:
  0: Above sea level
  1: Above Home
  2: Above Origin
  3: Above Terrain

FENCE_AUTOENABLE.d:
自动启用围栏。自动起飞达到高度后，AutoEnableOnTakeoff 启用所有已配置的围栏，除了最低高度围栏（达到最小高度时启用）。自动着陆期间，围栏将被禁用。  在自动起飞达到高度后，AutoEnableDisableFloorOnLanding 启用所有配置的围栏，除了最低高度围栏（达到最低高度时启用）。在自动着陆期间，只有最低高度栅栏将被禁用。 AutoEnableOnlyWhenArmed 在布防时启用所有已配置的围栏，除了最低高度围栏（达到最小高度时启用），但在自动着陆期间不会禁用任何围栏。然而，在执行先前的违规恢复操作（可能包括自动着陆）时，围栏违规行为将被忽略。

范围：0 … 3
取值：
  0：自动启用关闭
  1：起飞时自动启用
  2：自动启用禁用楼层着陆
  3：仅在武装时自动启用

FENCE_ENABLE.d:
允许您启用 (1) 或禁用 (0) 栅栏功能。仍然可以通过 mavlink 或 RC 选项启用和禁用 Fence，但这些更改不会保留。

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：启用

FENCE_MARGIN.d:
自动驾驶仪与围栏应保持的距离以避免违规

范围：1 … 10

FENCE_MARGIN_XY.d:
自动驾驶仪与围栏在水平面上应保持的距离，以避免突破。如果设置为 0，则使用 FENCE_MARGIN。

范围：0 … 50

FENCE_NTF_FREQ.n: 栅栏边距通知频率（以赫兹为单位）
FENCE_NTF_FREQ.d:
When bit 2 of FENCE_OPTIONS is set this parameter controls the frequency of margin breach notifications. If set to 0 only new margin breaches are notified.

范围: 0 … 10

FENCE_OPTIONS.d:
When bit 0 is set disable mode change following fence action until fence breach is cleared. When bit 1 is set the allowable flight areas is the union of all polygon and circle fence areas instead of the intersection, which means a fence breach occurs only if you are outside all of the fence areas.

位定义:
  bit0: Disable mode change following fence action until fence breach is cleared
  bit1: Allow union of inclusion areas
  bit2: Notify on margin breaches

FENCE_RADIUS.d:
圆形围栏半径，突破时将导致 RTL

范围：30 … 10000

FENCE_TOTAL.d:
eeprom中保存的多边形点数（不要手动更新）

范围：1 … 20

FENCE_TYPE.d:
配置的栅栏类型保存为位掩码。如果配置，最大高度、圆形和多边形围栏将立即启用。只有达到最低高度后，最低高度围栏才会启用。

位定义：
  bit0：最大高度
  bit1：以 Home 为中心的圆
  bit2：包含/排除圆+多边形
  bit3：最低海拔高度

FFT_ATT_REF.n: 用于带宽计算的 FFT 衰减
FFT_ATT_REF.d:
用于带宽计算和峰值检测的 FFT 衰减级别（以 dB 为单位）。通过将峰值功率输出与衰减版本进行比较来计算带宽。默认值 15 已证明在模拟和实际飞行中都是一个很好的折衷方案。

范围：0 … 100

FFT_BW_HOVER.n: FFT 学习悬停时的带宽
FFT_BW_HOVER.d:
FFT 学习了悬停时衰减频率的带宽。

范围：0 … 200

FFT_ENABLE.d:
启用陀螺仪 FFT 分析仪

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：启用

FFT_FREQ_HOVER.d:
The learned hover noise frequency

范围: 0 … 250

FFT_HMNC_FIT.n: FFT 谐波拟合频率阈值
FFT_HMNC_FIT.d:
FFT 谐波拟合频率阈值百分比，在该百分比处，适当频率的信号被确定为另一个信号的谐波。为了选择谐波陷波频率，具有最多变化该百分比的谐波关系的信号被视为彼此的谐波。如果找到匹配，则始终使用较低频率谐波作为动态谐波陷波的基础。零值会完全禁用谐波匹配。

范围：0 … 100

FFT_HMNC_PEAK.d:
The FFT harmonic peak target that should be returned by FTN1.PkAvg. The resulting value will be used by the harmonic notch if configured to track the FFT frequency. By default the appropriate peak is auto-detected based on the harmonic fit between peaks and the energy-weighted average frequency on roll on pitch is used. Setting this to 1 will always target the highest energy peak. Setting this to 2 will target the highest energy peak that is lower in frequency than the highest energy peak. Setting this to 3 will target the highest energy peak that is higher in frequency than the highest energy peak. Setting this to 4 will target the highest energy peak on the roll axis only and only the roll frequency will be used (some vehicles have a much more pronounced peak on roll). Setting this to 5 will target the highest energy peak on the pitch axis only and only the pitch frequency will be used (some vehicles have a much more pronounced peak on roll).

取值:
  0: Auto
  1: Center Frequency
  2: Lower-Shoulder Frequency
  3: Upper-Shoulder Frequency
  4: Roll-Axis
  5: Pitch-Axis

FFT_MAXHZ.d:
Upper bound of FFT frequency detection in Hz. On smaller vehicles the maximum motor frequency is likely to be significantly higher than for larger vehicles.

范围: 20 … 495

FFT_MINHZ.d:
FFT 频率检测的下限（以 Hz 为单位）。在大型车辆上，最小电机频率可能明显低于小型车辆。

范围：20 … 400

FFT_NUM_FRAMES.n: 要保留和平均的 FFT 输出帧
FFT_NUM_FRAMES.d:
为了计算最终频率而要保留和平均的输出频率帧的数量。只要输入稳定，平均输出帧就可以大幅减少噪声和抖动，但代价是延迟。默认情况下不执行平均。对于快速变化的频率（例如较小的飞机），应平均较少的帧。

范围：0 … 8

FFT_OPTIONS.d:
FFT 配置选项。值：1：在滤波器组*之后*应用 FFT，2：使用 ESC 数据作为参考检查电机频率处的噪声

位定义：
  bit0：启用后置滤波器 FFT
  bit1：检查电机噪音

FFT_SAMPLE_MODE.d:
Sampling mode (and therefore rate). 0: Gyro rate sampling, 1: Fast loop rate sampling, 2: Fast loop rate / 2 sampling, 3: Fast loop rate / 3 sampling. Takes effect on reboot.

范围: 0 … 4

FFT_SNR_REF.d:
FFT SNR 参考阈值（以 dB 为单位），在此阈值下确定信号存在。

范围：0.0 … 100.0

FFT_THR_REF.d:
FFT 学习了悬停频率和 FFT 最小频率的推力参考。

范围：0.01 … 0.9

FFT_WINDOW_OLAP.d:
在处理另一帧之前要重叠的窗口的百分比。重启后生效。一个好的默认值是 50% 重叠。较高的重叠会导致更多的处理帧，但不一定会产生更高的时间分辨率。较低的重叠会导致帧边缘的信息丢失。

范围：0 … 0.9

FFT_WINDOW_SIZE.d:
Size of window to be used in FFT calculations. Takes effect on reboot. Must be a power of 2 and between 32 and 512. Larger windows give greater frequency resolution but poorer time resolution, consume more CPU time and may not be appropriate for all vehicles. Time and frequency resolution are given by the sample-rate / window-size. Windows of 256 are only really recommended for F7 class boards, windows of 512 or more H7 class.

范围: 32 … 1024

FHLD_BRAKE_RATE.d:
控制摇杆释放时的减速度

范围：1 … 30

FHLD_FILT_HZ.d:
流量数据的过滤频率

范围：1 … 100

FHLD_FLOW_MAX.d:
控制流量中的最大视在流量

范围：0.1 … 2.5

FHLD_QUAL_MIN.d:
使用流量位置保持的最低流量质量

范围：0 … 255

FHLD_XY_FILT_HZ.n: 输入上的 FlowHold 过滤器以进行控制
FHLD_XY_FILT_HZ.d:
输入上的 FlowHold（水平）过滤器以进行控制

范围：0 … 100

FHLD_XY_I.d:
FlowHold（水平）I 增益

范围：0.02 … 1.00

FHLD_XY_IMAX.d:
FlowHold（水平）积分器最大值

范围：0 … 4500

FHLD_XY_P.d:
FlowHold（水平）P 增益。

范围：0.1 … 6.0

FILT1_NOTCH_ATT.d:
陷波滤波器衰减（以 dB 为单位）。

范围：5 … 50

FILT1_NOTCH_FREQ.d:
陷波滤波器中心频率（以 Hz 为单位）。

范围：10 … 495

FILT1_NOTCH_Q.d:
陷波滤波器品质因数由陷波中心频率除以其带宽得出。

范围：1 … 10

FILT1_TYPE.d:
过滤器类型

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：陷波滤波器

FILT2_NOTCH_ATT.d:
陷波滤波器衰减（以 dB 为单位）。

范围：5 … 50

FILT2_NOTCH_FREQ.d:
陷波滤波器中心频率（以 Hz 为单位）。

范围：10 … 495

FILT2_NOTCH_Q.d:
陷波滤波器品质因数由陷波中心频率除以其带宽得出。

范围：1 … 10

FILT2_TYPE.d:
过滤器类型

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：陷波滤波器

FILT3_NOTCH_ATT.d:
陷波滤波器衰减（以 dB 为单位）。

范围：5 … 50

FILT3_NOTCH_FREQ.d:
陷波滤波器中心频率（以 Hz 为单位）。

范围：10 … 495

FILT3_NOTCH_Q.d:
陷波滤波器品质因数由陷波中心频率除以其带宽得出。

范围：1 … 10

FILT3_TYPE.d:
过滤器类型

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：陷波滤波器

FILT4_NOTCH_ATT.d:
陷波滤波器衰减（以 dB 为单位）。

范围：5 … 50

FILT4_NOTCH_FREQ.d:
陷波滤波器中心频率（以 Hz 为单位）。

范围：10 … 495

FILT4_NOTCH_Q.d:
陷波滤波器品质因数由陷波中心频率除以其带宽得出。

范围：1 … 10

FILT4_TYPE.d:
过滤器类型

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：陷波滤波器

FILT5_NOTCH_ATT.d:
陷波滤波器衰减（以 dB 为单位）。

范围：5 … 50

FILT5_NOTCH_FREQ.d:
陷波滤波器中心频率（以 Hz 为单位）。

范围：10 … 495

FILT5_NOTCH_Q.d:
陷波滤波器品质因数由陷波中心频率除以其带宽得出。

范围：1 … 10

FILT5_TYPE.d:
过滤器类型

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：陷波滤波器

FILT6_NOTCH_ATT.d:
陷波滤波器衰减（以 dB 为单位）。

范围：5 … 50

FILT6_NOTCH_FREQ.d:
陷波滤波器中心频率（以 Hz 为单位）。

范围：10 … 495

FILT6_NOTCH_Q.d:
陷波滤波器品质因数由陷波中心频率除以其带宽得出。

FILT6_TYPE.d:
过滤器类型

  1：陷波滤波器

FILT7_NOTCH_ATT.d:
陷波滤波器衰减（以 dB 为单位）。

FILT7_NOTCH_FREQ.d:
陷波滤波器中心频率（以 Hz 为单位）。

FILT7_NOTCH_Q.d:
陷波滤波器品质因数由陷波中心频率除以其带宽得出。

FILT7_TYPE.d:
过滤器类型

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：陷波滤波器

FILT8_NOTCH_ATT.d:
陷波滤波器衰减（以 dB 为单位）。

范围：5 … 50

FILT8_NOTCH_FREQ.d:
陷波滤波器中心频率（以 Hz 为单位）。

范围：10 … 495

FILT8_NOTCH_Q.d:
陷波滤波器品质因数由陷波中心频率除以其带宽得出。

范围：1 … 10

FILT8_TYPE.d:
过滤器类型

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：陷波滤波器

FLOW_ADDR.d:
This is used to select between multiple possible I2C addresses for some sensor types. For PX4Flow you can choose 0 to 7 for the 8 possible addresses on the I2C bus.

范围: 0 … 127

FLOW_FXSCALER.n: X axis optical flow scale factor correction
FLOW_FXSCALER.d:
This sets the parts per thousand scale factor correction applied to the flow sensor X axis optical rate. It can be used to correct for variations in effective focal length. Each positive increment of 1 increases the scale factor applied to the X axis optical flow reading by 0.1%. Negative values reduce the scale factor.

范围: -800 … +800

FLOW_FYSCALER.n: Y axis optical flow scale factor correction
FLOW_FYSCALER.d:
This sets the parts per thousand scale factor correction applied to the flow sensor Y axis optical rate. It can be used to correct for variations in effective focal length. Each positive increment of 1 increases the scale factor applied to the Y axis optical flow reading by 0.1%. Negative values reduce the scale factor.

范围: -800 … +800

FLOW_OPTIONS.d:
光流选项。如果传感器稳定（例如安装在万向节上），则应设置位 0

位定义：
  bit0：横摇/俯仰稳定

FLOW_ORIENT_YAW.d:
Specifies the number of centi-degrees that the flow sensor is yawed relative to the vehicle. A sensor with its X-axis pointing to the right of the vehicle X axis has a positive yaw angle.

范围: -17999 … +18000

FLOW_POS_X.d:
X position of the optical flow sensor focal point in body frame. Positive X is forward of the origin.

范围: -5 … 5

FLOW_POS_Y.d:
Y position of the optical flow sensor focal point in body frame. Positive Y is to the right of the origin.

范围: -5 … 5

FLOW_POS_Z.d:
Z position of the optical flow sensor focal point in body frame. Positive Z is down from the origin.

范围: -5 … 5

FLOW_TYPE.d:
光流传感器类型

取值：
  0：无
  1：PX4Flow
  10：SITL
  2：像素艺术
  3：波普
  4：CXOF
  5：MAV链接
  6：无人机CAN
  7：MSP
  8：上流

FOLL_ACCEL_D.n: 垂直运动输入整形的加速度限制
FOLL_ACCEL_D.d:
垂直运动路径生成的加速度限制，用于确定估计速度变化的速度

范围：0 … 2.5

FOLL_ACCEL_H.n: 航向运动输入整形的角加速度限制
FOLL_ACCEL_H.d:
航向运动路径生成的角加速度限制，用于确定估计角速度变化的速度

范围：0 … 90

FOLL_ACCEL_NE.n: 水平运动输入整形的加速度限制
FOLL_ACCEL_NE.d:
水平运动路径生成的加速度限制，用于确定估计速度变化的速度

范围：0 … 5

FOLL_ALT_TYPE.d:
跟随高度类型

取值：
  0：绝对
  1：相对
  3：地形

FOLL_DIST_MAX.d:
跟随距离最大。如果超出，则以下估算将被视为无效。如果为零，则没有最大值。

范围：0 … 1000

FOLL_ENABLE.d:
启用/禁用跟随目标

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：启用

FOLL_JERK_D.n: 垂直运动输入整形的加加速度限制
FOLL_JERK_D.d:
垂直运动路径生成的急动度限制用于确定加速度估计值变化的速度

范围：0 … 5

FOLL_JERK_H.n: 航向运动输入整形的角度加加速度限制
FOLL_JERK_H.d:
航向运动路径生成的角急动度限制用于确定角加速度估计值变化的速度

范围：0 … 360

FOLL_JERK_NE.n: 水平运动输入整形的加加速度限制
FOLL_JERK_NE.d:
水平运动路径生成的急动度限制用于确定加速度估计值变化的速度

范围：0 … 20

FOLL_OFS_TYPE.d:
跟随偏移类型

取值：
  0：东北向下
  1：相对于引导车辆航向

FOLL_OFS_X.n: 跟随向北/向前偏移（以米为单位）
FOLL_OFS_X.d:
遵循向北/向前以米为单位的偏移。如果为正，则该车辆在领头车辆前方或以北飞行。  取决于 FOLL_OFS_TYPE

范围：-100 … 100

FOLL_OFS_Y.n: 跟随东/右偏移（以米为单位）
FOLL_OFS_Y.d:
遵循东/右偏移（以米为单位）。如果为正，该车辆将飞至领头车辆的右侧或东部。  取决于 FOLL_OFS_TYPE

范围：-100 … 100

FOLL_OFS_Z.n: 跟随偏移（以米为单位）向下
FOLL_OFS_Z.d:
遵循向下米数的偏移。如果为正，则该车辆将飞到领先车辆下方

范围：-100 … 100

FOLL_OPTIONS.d:
遵循选项位掩码

取值：
  0：无
  1：进入模式时安装跟随引导车辆

FOLL_POS_P.d:
跟随位置误差P增益。将所需垂直速度与实际速度之间的差值转换为传递至油门加速度控制器的所需加速度

范围：0.01 … 1.00

FOLL_SYSID.n: 跟踪目标的 mavlink 系统 ID
FOLL_SYSID.d:
跟踪目标的 mavlink 系统 ID

范围：0 … 255

FOLL_TIMEOUT.d: 跟随领先位置更新 - x 秒后超时

FOLL_YAW_BEHAVE.d:
跟随偏航行为

取值：
  0：无
  1：面领车
  2：与主车相同
  3：飞行方向

FRSKY_DNLINK1_ID.n: 第一个下行传感器 ID

FRSKY_OPTIONS.d:
用于设置一些 FRsky 遥测特定选项的位掩码

位定义：
  bit0：启用空速和地速

GEN_OPTIONS.d:
生成器选项的位掩码

位定义：
  bit0：抑制需要维护的警告

GEN_TYPE.d:
发电机类型

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：IE 650w 800w燃料电池
  2：IE 2.4kW燃料电池
  3：励成动力
  4：洛海塞尔
  5：皮质

GEN_L_IDLE_TEMP.d: temperature required for generator to return to idle after having run

GEN_L_IDLE_TH.d: throttle value to use when idling

GEN_L_IDLE_TH_H.d: throttle value to use when warming up or cooling down

GEN_L_OVER_TEMP.d: threshold temperature for the cylinder head above which the mavlink over temperature message gets sent

GEN_L_RUNTIME.d: Total time this generator has run in seconds

GEN_L_RUN_TEMP.d: temperature required for generator to start producing power in deg celsius

GPS_AUTO_CONFIG.d:
控制自动驾驶仪是否应根据参数和默认设置自动配置 GPS

取值：
  0：禁用自动配置
  1：仅对串行 GPS 启用自动配置
  2：同时启用 DroneCAN 自动配置
  3：清除ardupilot未设置的所有配置（仅限UBlox）

GPS_AUTO_SWITCH.d:
自动切换到 GPS 报告最佳锁定，1：UseBest 选择状态最高的 GPS，如果两者相等，则使用卫星数最多的 GPS 4：如果 3D 修复或更好，则使用主设备，如果主设备上的 3D 修复丢失，将恢复为“UseBest”行为

取值：
  0：使用初级
  1：使用最佳
  2：混合
  4: Use primary if 3D fix or better

GPS_BLEND_MASK.d:
通过将 GPS_AUTO_SWITCH 设置为 2（混合）来选择软切换时，确定使用水平位置、垂直位置和速度中的哪一个精度测量来计算每个 GPS 接收器上的权重

位定义：
  bit0：水平位置
  bit1：垂直位置
  位2：速度

GPS_CAN_NODEID1.d: 首次发现的 GPS 的 GPS 节点 ID。在 4.6 及更高版本中重命名为 GPS1_CAN_NODEID。

GPS_CAN_NODEID2.d: 第二次发现的 GPS 的 GPS 节点 ID。在 4.6 及更高版本中重命名为 GPS2_CAN_NODEID。

GPS_COM_PORT.d:
The physical COM port on the connected device, currently only applies to SBF and GSOF GPS,Renamed in 4.6 and later to GPS1_COM_PORT.

范围: 0 … 10
取值:
  0: COM1(RS232) on GSOF
  1: COM2(TTL) on GSOF

GPS_COM_PORT2.d:
The physical COM port on the connected device, currently only applies to SBF and GSOF GPS.Renamed in 4.6 and later to GPS1_COM_PORT.

范围: 0 … 10

GPS_DELAY_MS.n: GPS 延迟（以毫秒为单位）
GPS_DELAY_MS.d:
控制自动驾驶仪补偿的 GPS 测量延迟量。设置为零以使用检测到的 GPS 类型的默认延迟。在 4.6 及更高版本中重命名为 GPS1_DELAY_MS。

范围：0 … 250

GPS_DELAY_MS2.n: GPS 2 延迟（以毫秒为单位）
GPS_DELAY_MS2.d:
控制自动驾驶仪补偿的 GPS 测量延迟量。设置为零以使用检测到的 GPS 类型的默认延迟。在 4.6 及更高版本中重命名为 GPS2_DELAY_MS。

范围：0 … 250

GPS_DRV_OPTIONS.d:
其他后端特定选项

位定义：
  bit0：使用 UART2 在 ublox 上移动基线
  bit1：在 SBF 上使用基站进行 GPS 偏航
  bit2：在 ublox 上使用波特率 115200
  位 3：使用专用 CAN 端口 b/w GPS 来移动基线
  bit4：使用椭球体高度代替 AMSL
  bit5：从 L1 健康状况覆盖 L5 频段的 GPS 卫星健康状况
  bit6：即使对于单个通道也启用 RTCM 完全解析
  bit7：当在多个通道上看到 RTCM 时，禁用自动完整 RTCM 解析
  位 8：强制 UBlox Config Get/Set 进行配置，然后仅针对串行 GPS 自动配置

GPS_GNSS_MODE.d:
第一个 GPS 上使用的 GNSS 系统的位掩码（全部未选中或为零以保留 GPS 配置）。在 4.6 及更高版本中重命名为 GPS1_GNSS_MODE。

位定义：
  位0：GPS
  位1：SBAS
  位2：伽利略
  bit3：北斗
  位 4：IMES
  位5：QZSS
  bit6：格洛纳斯

GPS_GNSS_MODE2.d:
用于第二个 GPS 上使用的 GNSS 系统的位掩码（全部未选中或为零以保留 GPS 配置）。在4.6及更高版本中重命名为GPS2_GNSS_MODE

位定义：
  位0：GPS
  位1：SBAS
  位2：伽利略
  bit3：北斗
  位 4：IMES
  位5：QZSS
  bit6：格洛纳斯

GPS_INJECT_TO.n: GPS_INJECT_DATA MAVLink 数据包的目的地
GPS_INJECT_TO.d:
The GGS can send raw serial packets to inject data to multiple GPSes.

取值:
  0: send to first GPS
  1: send to 2nd GPS
  127: send to all

GPS_MIN_ELEV.d:
This sets the minimum elevation of satellites above the horizon for them to be used for navigation. Setting this to -100 leaves the minimum elevation set to the GPS modules default.

范围: -100 … 90

GPS_NAVFILTER.d:
导航过滤引擎设置

取值：
  0：便携式
  2：固定
  3：行人
  4：汽车
  5：海
  6：空降1G
  7：空降2G
  8：机载4G

GPS_POS1_X.n: 天线 X 位置偏移
GPS_POS1_X.d:
X position of the first GPS antenna in body frame. Positive X is forward of the origin. Use antenna phase centroid location if provided by the manufacturer.Renamed in 4.6 and later to GPS1_POS_X.

范围: -5 … 5

GPS_POS1_Y.n: 天线 Y 位置偏移
GPS_POS1_Y.d:
Y position of the first GPS antenna in body frame. Positive Y is to the right of the origin. Use antenna phase centroid location if provided by the manufacturer.Renamed in 4.6 and later to GPS1_POS_Y.

范围: -5 … 5

GPS_POS1_Z.n: 天线 Z 位置偏移
GPS_POS1_Z.d:
Z position of the first GPS antenna in body frame. Positive Z is down from the origin. Use antenna phase centroid location if provided by the manufacturer.Renamed in 4.6 and later to GPS1_POS_Z.

范围: -5 … 5

GPS_POS2_X.n: 天线 X 位置偏移
GPS_POS2_X.d:
X position of the second GPS antenna in body frame. Positive X is forward of the origin. Use antenna phase centroid location if provided by the manufacturer.Renamed in 4.6 and later to GPS2_POS_X.

范围: -5 … 5

GPS_POS2_Y.n: 天线 Y 位置偏移
GPS_POS2_Y.d:
Y position of the second GPS antenna in body frame. Positive Y is to the right of the origin. Use antenna phase centroid location if provided by the manufacturer.Renamed in 4.6 and later to GPS2_POS_Y.

范围: -5 … 5

GPS_POS2_Z.n: 天线 Z 位置偏移
GPS_POS2_Z.d:
Z position of the second GPS antenna in body frame. Positive Z is down from the origin. Use antenna phase centroid location if provided by the manufacturer.Renamed in 4.6 and later to GPS2_POS_Z.

范围: -5 … 5

GPS_PRIMARY.d:
This GPS will be used when GPS_AUTO_SWITCH is 0 and used preferentially with GPS_AUTO_SWITCH = 4.

取值:
  0: FirstGPS
  1: SecondGPS

GPS_RATE_MS.n: GPS 更新率（以毫秒为单位）
GPS_RATE_MS.d:
控制 GPS 提供位置更新的频率。不允许低于 5Hz（默认）。将速率提高到 5Hz 以上通常没有什么好处，并且对于某些 GPS（例如 Ublox M9N）可能会严重影响性能。在 4.6 及更高版本中重命名为 GPS1_RATE_MS

范围：50 … 200
取值：
  100：10Hz
  125：8赫兹
  200：5赫兹

GPS_RATE_MS2.n: GPS 2 更新率（以毫秒为单位）
GPS_RATE_MS2.d:
控制 GPS 提供位置更新的频率。不允许低于 5Hz（默认）。将速率提高到 5Hz 以上通常没有什么好处，并且对于某些 GPS（例如 Ublox M9N）可能会严重影响性能。在 4.6 及更高版本中重命名为 GPS2_RATE_MS

范围：50 … 200
取值：
  100：10Hz
  125：8赫兹
  200：5赫兹

GPS_RAW_DATA.d:
处理记录原始数据；在支持原始数据的 uBlox 芯片上，这会将 RXM 消息记录到记录器中；在Septentrio上，这将登录设备的SD卡，当设置为2时，飞控将在撤防后尝试停止记录并在布防后重新启动

取值：
  0：忽略
  1：始终记录
  2：撤防时停止记录（仅限SBF）
  5：仅记录每五个样本（仅限 uBlox）

GPS_SAVE_CFG.d:
确定是否应将此 GPS 的配置写入 GPS 上的非易失性存储器。目前适用于 UBlox 6 系列及以上版本。

取值：
  0：不保存配置
  1：保存配置
  2：仅在需要时保存

GPS_SBAS_MODE.d:
This sets the SBAS (satellite based augmentation system) mode if available on this GPS. If set to 2 then the SBAS mode is not changed in the GPS. Otherwise the GPS will be reconfigured to enable/disable SBAS. Disabling SBAS may be worthwhile in some parts of the world where an SBAS signal is available but the baseline is too long to be useful.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled
  2: NoChange

GPS_SBP_LOGMASK.d:
使用 SBP msg_type 字段进行屏蔽以确定是否记录 SBR1/SBR2 数据

取值：
  -1：全部（0xFFFF）
  -256：仅限外部（0xFF00）
  0：无（0x0000）

GPS_TYPE.d:
第一个 GPS 的 GPS 类型。在 4.6 及更高版本中重命名为 GPS1_TYPE

取值：
  0：无
  1：自动
  10：SBF
  11：全球特种作战部队
  13：雇员退休金
  14：微型飞行器
  15：新星
  16: 半球NMEA
  17: uBlox-MovingBaseline-底座
  18：uBlox-MovingBaseline-Rover
  19：MSP

  23：DroneCAN-MovingBaseline-Rover

  25：UnicoreMovingBaselineNMEA
  26：SBF-双天线
  5：国家海洋环境管理局
  6：SiRF
  7：硬件在环
  8：快速导航
  9：无人机CAN

GPS_TYPE2.n: 第二个 GPS 类型。在 4.6 中重命名为 GPS2_TYPE
GPS_TYPE2.d:
第二个 GPS 的 GPS 类型

取值：
  0：无
  1：自动
  10：SBF
  11：全球特种作战部队
  13：雇员退休金
  14：微型飞行器
  15：新星
  16: 半球NMEA
  17: uBlox-MovingBaseline-底座
  18：uBlox-MovingBaseline-Rover
  19：MSP
  2：uBlox
  20：盟友之星
  21：外部 AHRS
  22：DroneCAN-MovingBaseline-基地
  23：DroneCAN-MovingBaseline-Rover
  24：UnicoreNMEA
  25：UnicoreMovingBaselineNMEA
  26：SBF-双天线
  5：国家海洋环境管理局
  6：SiRF
  7：硬件在环
  8：快速导航
  9：无人机CAN

GPS1_CAN_NODEID.n: 检测到 GPS 的 CAN 节点 ID
GPS1_CAN_NODEID.d: GPS 的 GPS 节点 ID。  除非设置了 CAN_OVRIDE，否则检测到节点

GPS1_CAN_OVRIDE.d: GPS 的 GPS 节点 ID。如果为 0，将按照先到先得的 GPS 原则自动选择 GPS。

GPS1_COM_PORT.d:
The physical COM port on the connected device, currently only applies to SBF and GSOF GPS

范围: 0 … 10
取值:
  0: COM1(RS232) on GSOF
  1: COM2(TTL) on GSOF

GPS1_DELAY_MS.n: GPS 延迟（以毫秒为单位）
GPS1_DELAY_MS.d:
控制自动驾驶仪补偿的 GPS 测量延迟量。设置为零以使用检测到的 GPS 类型的默认延迟。

范围：0 … 250

GPS1_GNSS_MODE.d:
要使用的 GNSS 系统的位掩码（全部未选中或为零以保留 GPS 配置）

位定义：
  位0：GPS
  位1：SBAS
  位2：伽利略
  bit3：北斗
  位 4：IMES
  位5：QZSS
  bit6：格洛纳斯
  bit7：导航

GPS1_POS_X.n: 天线 X 位置偏移
GPS1_POS_X.d:
X position of the first GPS antenna in body frame. Positive X is forward of the origin. Use antenna phase centroid location if provided by the manufacturer.

范围: -5 … 5

GPS1_POS_Y.n: 天线 Y 位置偏移
GPS1_POS_Y.d:
Y position of the first GPS antenna in body frame. Positive Y is to the right of the origin. Use antenna phase centroid location if provided by the manufacturer.

范围: -5 … 5

GPS1_POS_Z.n: 天线 Z 位置偏移
GPS1_POS_Z.d:
Z position of the first GPS antenna in body frame. Positive Z is down from the origin. Use antenna phase centroid location if provided by the manufacturer.

范围: -5 … 5

GPS1_RATE_MS.n: GPS 更新率（以毫秒为单位）
GPS1_RATE_MS.d:
控制 GPS 提供位置更新的频率。不允许低于 5Hz（默认）。将速率提高到 5Hz 以上通常几乎没有什么好处，并且对于某些 GPS（例如 Ublox M9N）可能会严重影响性能。

范围：50 … 200
取值：
  100：10Hz
  125：8赫兹
  200：5赫兹

GPS1_TYPE.d:
GPS类型

取值：
  0：无
  1：自动
  10：Septentrio（SBF）
  11：天宝（GSOF）
  13：雇员退休金
  14：MAV链接
  15：新星
  16：半球NMEA
  17: uBlox-MovingBaseline-底座
  18：uBlox-MovingBaseline-Rover
  19：MSP
  2：uBlox
  20： 国防之星
  21：外部AHRS
  22：DroneCAN-MovingBaseline-基地
  23：DroneCAN-MovingBaseline-Rover
  24：UnicoreNMEA
  25：UnicoreMovingBaselineNMEA
  26: Septentrio-双天线(SBF)
  5：国家海洋环境管理局
  6：硅射频
  7：硬件在环
  8：快速导航
  9：无人机CAN

GPS1_MB_OFS_X.n: 底座天线 X 位置偏移
GPS1_MB_OFS_X.d:
X position of the base (primary) GPS antenna in body frame from the position of the 2nd antenna. Positive X is forward of the 2nd antenna. Use antenna phase centroid location if provided by the manufacturer.This is renamed in 4.6 and later to GPSx_MB_OFS_X.

范围: -5 … 5

GPS1_MB_OFS_Y.n: 底座天线 Y 位置偏移
GPS1_MB_OFS_Y.d:
Y position of the base (primary) GPS antenna in body frame from the position of the 2nd antenna. Positive Y is to the right of the 2nd antenna. Use antenna phase centroid location if provided by the manufacturer.This is renamed in 4.6 and later to GPSx_MB_OFS_Y.

范围: -5 … 5

GPS1_MB_OFS_Z.d:
Z position of the base (primary) GPS antenna in body frame from the position of the 2nd antenna. Positive Z is down from the 2nd antenna. Use antenna phase centroid location if provided by the manufacturer.This is renamed in 4.6 and later to GPSx_MB_OFS_Z.

GPS2_CAN_OVRIDE.d: GPS 的 GPS 节点 ID。如果为 0，将按照先到先得的 GPS 原则自动选择 GPS。

The physical COM port on the connected device, currently only applies to SBF and GSOF GPS

范围: 0 … 10

  1: COM2(TTL) on GSOF

GPS2_POS_Z.n: 天线 Z 位置偏移

范围: -5 … 5

GPS2_RATE_MS.n: GPS 更新率（以毫秒为单位）
GPS2_RATE_MS.d:
控制 GPS 提供位置更新的频率。不允许低于 5Hz（默认）。将速率提高到 5Hz 以上通常几乎没有什么好处，并且对于某些 GPS（例如 Ublox M9N）可能会严重影响性能。

范围：50 … 200
取值：
  100：10Hz
  125：8赫兹
  200：5赫兹

H_COL_ZERO_THRST.d:

H_OPTIONS.d:
直升机选项的位掩码。  位 0 更改低速和起飞/着陆时俯仰、滚转和偏航轴积分器项的管理方式。在 AC 4.0 及更早版本中，方案针对地面速度低于 5 m/s 使用泄漏积分器，并且不会让稳态积分器构建在 ILMI 之上。积分器落地后可以构建 ILMI 值。  另一种积分器管理方案基于起飞和着陆的积分器限制。  每当飞机着陆时，积分器都会设置为零。  当飞机在空中时，积分器仅受IMAX限制。

  bit0：使用Leaky I

H_SW2_LIN_SVO.d:
This linearizes the swashplate 2 servo's mechanical output to account for nonlinear output due to arm rotation.  This requires a specific setup procedure to work properly.  The servo arm must be centered on the mechanical throw at the servo trim position and the servo trim position kept as close to 1500 as possible. Leveling the swashplate can only be done through the pitch links.  See the ardupilot wiki for more details on setup.

取值:

  1: Enabled

H_SW2_PHANG.d:
相位角补偿可用于纠正控制耦合问题。  如果向前倾斜斜盘会引起侧倾，这可以解决问题。

范围：-30 … 30

H_SW2_TYPE.d:
H3 是通用的，仅三伺服。 H3_120/H3_140 板有电机 1 左侧、电机 2 右侧、电机 3 升降舵在后部。 HR3_120/HR3_140 有电机 1 右侧、电机 2 左侧、电机 3 电梯在前面 - 使用 H3_120/H3_140 并根据需要反转伺服和集体方向。对于所有 H3_90 斜盘，请使用 H4_90，并且不要使用缺失伺服器的伺服输出。对于H4-90，电机1和2分别为左/右，电机3和4分别为后/前。对于 H4-45，电机 1 和 2 为 LF/RF，电机 3 和 4 为 LR/RR

取值：
  0：H3 通用
  1：H1非CPPM
  2：H3_140
  3：H3_120
  4：H4_90
  5：H4_45

  1：反转

H_SW_H3_SV2_POS.d:

H3 是通用的，仅三伺服。 H3_120/H3_140 板有电机 1 左侧、电机 2 右侧、电机 3 升降舵在后部。 HR3_120/HR3_140 有电机 1 右侧、电机 2 左侧、电机 3 电梯在前面 - 使用 H3_120/H3_140 并根据需要反转伺服和集体方向。对于所有 H3_90 斜盘，请使用 H4_90，并且不要使用缺失伺服器的伺服输出。对于H4-90，电机1和2分别为左/右，电机3和4分别为后/前。对于 H4-45，电机 1 和 2 为 LF/RF，电机 3 和 4 为 LR/RR
