This parameter sets the gain from forward accel/tilt to forward throttle in certain Q modes. The Q modes this feature operates in is controlled by the Q_FWD_THR_USE parameter. Vehicles using separate forward thrust motors, eg quadplanes, should set this parameter to (all up weight) / (maximum combined thrust of forward motors) with a value of 2 being typical. Vehicles that tilt lifting rotors to provide forward thrust should set this parameter to (all up weight) / (weight lifted by tilting rotors) which for most aircraft can be approximated as (total number of lifting rotors) / (number of lifting rotors that tilt). When using this method of forward throttle control, the forward tilt angle limit is controlled by the Q_FWD_PIT_LIM parameter.

范围: 0.0 … 5.0

Q_FWD_THR_USE.d:
This parameter determines when the feature that uses forward throttle instead of forward tilt is used. The amount of forward throttle is controlled by the Q_FWD_THR_GAIN parameter. The maximum amount of forward pitch allowed is controlled by the Q_FWD_PIT_LIM parameter. Q_FWD_THR_USE = 0 disables the feature. Q_FWD_THR_USE = 1 enables the feature in all position controlled modes such as QLOITER, QLAND, QRTL and VTOL TAKEOFF. Q_FWD_THR_USE = 2 enables the feature in all Q modes except QAUTOTUNE and QACRO. When enabling the feature, the legacy method of controlling forward throttle use via velocity controller error should be disabled by setting Q_VFWD_GAIN to 0. Do not use this feature with tailsitters.

取值:
  0: Off
  1: On in all position controlled Q modes
  2: On in all Q modes except QAUTOTUNE and QACRO

Q_FW_LND_APR_RAD.n: 四翼固定翼着陆进近半径
Q_FW_LND_APR_RAD.d:
This provides the radius used, when using a fixed wing landing approach. If set to 0 then the WP_LOITER_RAD will be selected.

范围: 0 … 200

Q_GUIDED_MODE.n: 在 GUIDED 模式下启用 VTOL
Q_GUIDED_MODE.d:
This enables use of VTOL in guided mode. When enabled the aircraft will switch to VTOL flight when the guided destination is reached and hover at the destination.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled

Q_LAND_ALTCHG.n: 陆地检测高度变化阈值
Q_LAND_ALTCHG.d:
The maximum altitude change allowed during land detection. You can raise this value if you find that landing detection takes a long time to complete. It is the maximum change in altitude over a period of 4 seconds for landing to be detected

范围: 0.1 … 0.6

Q_LAND_FINAL_ALT.d:
The altitude at which we should switch to Q_LAND_FINAL_SPD descent rate

范围: 0.5 … 50

Q_LAND_FINAL_SPD.d:
The descent speed for the final stage of landing in m/s

范围: 0.3 … 2

Q_LAND_ICE_CUT.n: 着陆时切断内燃发动机
Q_LAND_ICE_CUT.d:
This controls stopping an internal combustion engine in the final landing stage of a VTOL. This is important for aircraft where the forward thrust engine may experience prop-strike if left running during landing. This requires the engine controls are enabled using the ICE_* parameters.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled

Q_MAV_TYPE.d:
This controls the mavlink type given in HEARTBEAT messages. For some GCS types a particular setting will be needed for correct operation.

取值:
  0: AUTO
  1: FIXED_WING
  10: GROUND_ROVER
  11: SURFACE_BOAT
  12: SUBMARINE
  16: FLAPPING_WING
  17: KITE
  19: VTOL_DUOROTOR
  2: QUADROTOR
  20: VTOL_QUADROTOR
  21: VTOL_TILTROTOR
  3: COAXIAL
  4: HELICOPTER
  7: AIRSHIP
  8: FREE_BALLOON
  9: ROCKET

Q_NAVALT_MIN.d:
This is the altitude in meters above which navigation begins in auto takeoff. Below this altitude the target roll and pitch will be zero. A value of zero disables the feature

范围: 0 … 5

Q_OPTIONS.d:
See description for each bitmask bit description

位定义:
  bit0: Level Transition-keep wings within LEVEL_ROLL_LIMIT and only use forward motor(s) for climb during transition
  bit1: Allow FW Takeoff-if bit is not set then NAV_TAKEOFF command on quadplanes will instead perform a NAV_VTOL takeoff
  bit2: Allow FW Land-if bit is not set then NAV_LAND command on quadplanes will instead perform a NAV_VTOL_LAND
  bit3: Vtol Takeoff Frame-command NAV_VTOL_TAKEOFF alt set by the command's reference frame not above current location
  bit4: Always use FW spiral approach-always use Use a fixed wing spiral approach for VTOL landings
  bit5: USE QRTL-instead of QLAND for rc failsafe when in VTOL modes
  bit6: Use Governor-use ICE Idle Governor in MANUAL for forward motor
  bit7: Force Qassist-on always
  bit8: Mtrs_Only_Qassist-in tailsitters only uses VTOL motors and not flying surfaces for QASSIST
  bit10: Disarmed Yaw Tilt-enable motor tilt for yaw when disarmed
  bit11: Delay Spoolup-delay VTOL spoolup for 2 seconds after arming
  bit12: Disable speed based Qassist when using synthetic airspeed estimates
  bit13: Disable Ground Effect Compensation-on baro altitude reports
  bit14: Ignore forward flight angle limits-in Qmodes and use Q_A_ANGLE_MAX exclusively
  bit15: ThrLandControl-enable throttle stick control of landing rate
  bit16: DisableApproach-disable use of approach and airbrake stages in VTOL landing
  bit17: EnableLandResposition-enable pilot controlled repositioning in AUTO land.Descent will pause while repositioning
  bit18: ARMVTOL-arm only in VTOL modes (or AUTO mode when current nav cmd is VTOL Takeoff)
  bit19: CompleteTransition-to fixed wing if Q_TRANS_FAIL timer times out instead of QLAND
  bit20: Force RTL mode-forces RTL mode on rc failsafe in VTOL modes overriding bit 5(USE_QRTL)
  bit21: Tilt rotor-tilt motors up when disarmed in FW modes (except manual) to prevent ground strikes.
  bit22: Scale FF by the ratio of VTOL to plane angle P gains in Position 1 phase of transition into VTOL flight as well as reducing VTOL angle P based on airspeed.

Q_PILOT_ACCEL_Z.d:
The vertical acceleration used when pilot is controlling the altitude

范围: 0.5 … 5

Q_PILOT_SPD_DN.n: 飞行员最大垂直下降速度
Q_PILOT_SPD_DN.d:
The maximum vertical velocity the pilot may request in m/s going down. If 0, uses Q_PILOT_SPD_UP value.

范围: 0.5 … 5

Q_PILOT_SPD_UP.d:
The maximum ascending vertical velocity the pilot may request in m/s

范围: 0.5 … 5

Q_PLT_Y_EXPO.d:
先导控制的偏航博览会可在粘在边缘时实现更快的旋转

范围：-0.5 … 1.0
取值：
  0：禁用
  0.1：非常低
  0.2：低
  0.3：中
  0.4：高
  0.5：非常高

Q_PLT_Y_RATE.d:
飞行员控制的最大偏航率用于除 QAcro 之外的所有先导控制模式

范围：1 … 360

Q_PLT_Y_RATE_TC.n: 飞行员偏航角速度控制输入时间常数
Q_PLT_Y_RATE_TC.d:
飞行员偏航角速度控制输入时间常数。数字越低，响应越敏锐，数字越大，响应越柔和。

范围：0 … 1
取值：
  0.05：非常清脆
  0.1：清脆
  0.15：中
  0.2：软
  0.5：非常柔软

Q_RC_SPEED.d:
This is the PWM refresh rate in Hz for QuadPlane quad motors

范围: 50 … 500

Q_RTL_ALT.d:
The altitude which QRTL mode heads to initially

范围: 1 … 200

Q_RTL_ALT_MIN.d:
如果 VTOL 电机处于活动 QRTL 模式，则 VTOL 在返回之前至少会爬升到此高度。如果超出 WP_LOITER_RAD 和 RTL_RADIUS 中较大者的 150%，飞行器将垂直起降爬升至 Q_RTL_ALT。如果飞行器向前飞行，则该参数无效。 Should be between Q_LAND_FINAL_ALT and Q_RTL_ALT

范围：1 … 200

Q_RTL_MODE.d:
如果设置为 1，则当 RTL 目的地的 RTL_RADIUS 米内时，RTL 将更改为 QRTL，VTOL 进近：车辆将以 RTL alt 进行 RTL 并以 Q_FW_LND_APR_RAD 为半径向下盘旋至 Q_RTL_ALT，然后过渡到风和 QRTL，请参阅“自动 VTOL 着陆”、QRTL 始终：执行 QRTL 而不是 RTL

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：启用
  2：垂直起降进近
  3：QRTL 始终

Q_THROTTLE_EXPO.d:
油门曲线曲率量：0为线性，1为三次

范围：0 … 1

Q_THRST_LOSS_OPT.d:
配置推力损失检测，这会导致“潜在 VTOL 推力损失”警告。这种检测还允许电机混合器忽略故障电机，从而更好地使用剩余电机。

位定义：
  bit0：禁用推力损失检测。
  bit1：禁用转换和固定翼模式下的推力损失检测。推力损失检测仅在 VTOL 模式下运行。

Q_TKOFF_ARSP_LIM.d:
起飞时的空速限制。如果空速超过此水平，车辆将切换到 QLAND。这对于确保您不会在强风中起飞非常有用。如果设置为 0，则起飞期间空速不受限制。

范围：0 … 20

Q_TKOFF_FAIL_SCL.d:
Scalar for how long past the expected takeoff time a takeoff should be considered as failed and the vehicle will switch to QLAND. If set to 0 there is no limit on takeoff time.

范围: 1.1 … 5.0

Q_TKOFF_RPM_MAX.n: 自动起飞检查最大转速
Q_TKOFF_RPM_MAX.d:
在电机报告不超过此转速之前，不允许自动起飞（自动或引导）。设置为零以禁用检查。 Q_TKOFF_RPM_MIN 还必须设置为非零值才能启用此检查。

范围：0 … 10000

Q_TKOFF_RPM_MIN.n: 自动起飞检查最低转速
Q_TKOFF_RPM_MIN.d:
在电机报告至少此 RPM 之前，不允许自动起飞（自动或引导）。设置为零以禁用检查（这也会禁用 Q_TKOFF_RPM_MAX）。

范围：0 … 10000

Q_TRANSITION_MS.d:
Transition time in milliseconds after minimum airspeed is reached

范围: 500 … 30000

Q_TRANS_DECEL.d:
This is deceleration rate that will be used in calculating the stopping distance when transitioning from fixed wing flight to multicopter flight.

范围: 0.2 … 5

Q_TRANS_FAIL.d:
允许向前过渡的最大时间，超过此时间将取消过渡，飞行器将立即更改为 Q_TRANS_FAIL_ACT 设置的模式或完成过渡，具体取决于 Q_OPTIONS 位 19。0 表示无限制。

范围：0 … 20

Q_TRANS_FAIL_ACT.d:
This sets the mode that is changed to when Q_TRANS_FAIL time elapses, if set. See also Q_OPTIONS bit 19: CompleteTransition if Q_TRANS_FAIL

取值:
  -1: Warn only
  0: QLand
  1: QRTL

Q_TRAN_PIT_MAX.d:
过渡到自动固定翼飞行期间的最大俯仰角

范围：0 … 30

Q_TRIM_PITCH.n: 四平面 AHRS 调整节距
Q_TRIM_PITCH.d:
This sets the compensation for the pitch angle trim difference between calibrated AHRS level and vertical flight pitch. NOTE! this is relative to calibrated AHRS trim, not forward flight trim which includes PTCH_TRIM_DEG. For tailsitters, this is relative to a baseline of 90 degrees in AHRS.

范围: -10 … +10

Q_VFWD_ALT.n: 前进速度 alt 截止
Q_VFWD_ALT.d:
控制高度以在低于此相对高度时禁用前进速度辅助。这对于防止前进速度螺旋桨撞击地面很有用。如果有测距仪高度数据，则将其纳入其中。

范围：0 … 10

Q_VFWD_GAIN.d:
The use of this parameter is no longer recommended and has been superseded by a method that works in all VTOL modes with the exception of QAUTOTUNE which is controlled by the Q_FWD_THR_USE parameter. This Q_VFD_GAIN parameter controls use of the forward motor in VTOL modes that use the velocity controller. Set to 0 to disable this function. A value of 0.05 is a good place to start if you want to use the forward motor for position control. No forward motor will be used in QSTABILIZE or QHOVER modes. Use with QLOITER for position hold with the forward motor.

范围: 0 … 0.5

Q_YAW_RATE_MAX.d:
This is the maximum yaw rate for pilot input on rudder stick in degrees/second and weathervaning is limited to half of this value

范围: 50 … 500

Q_AUTOTUNE_AGGR.d:
自动调节攻击性。定义用于检测 D 项大小的反弹。

范围：0.05 … 0.10

Q_AUTOTUNE_AXES.d:
要自动调谐的轴的 1 字节位图

位定义：
  bit0：滚动
  bit1：音高
  bit2：偏航
  bit3：YawD

Q_AUTOTUNE_GMBK.n: 自动调谐增益裕度退避
Q_AUTOTUNE_GMBK.d:
速率和角度自动调谐步骤完成后，调谐 P 和 D 增益减少的分数。这通过稍微减少调整过程中发现的最佳值的增益来提供额外的稳定性裕度。值为 0.0 时不应用任何减少。值为 0.25 会使调谐增益降低 25%。

范围：0.0 … 0.5

Q_AUTOTUNE_MIN_D.d:
定义最小 D 增益

范围：0.0001 … 0.005

Q_A_ACC_P_MAX.d:
俯仰轴最大加速度

范围：0 … 1800
取值：
  0：禁用
  1080：中
  1620：快
  300：非常慢
  720：慢

Q_A_ACC_R_MAX.d:
横滚轴最大加速度

范围：0 … 1800
取值：
  0：禁用
  1080：中
  1620：快
  300：非常慢
  720：慢

Q_A_ACC_Y_MAX.d:
偏航轴最大加速度

范围：0 … 720
取值：
  0：禁用
  180：慢
  360：中
  540：快
  90：非常慢

Q_A_ANGLE_BOOST.d:
当车辆倾斜时，角度提升会增加输出油门，以减少高度损失

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：启用

Q_A_ANGLE_MAX.d:
所有飞行模式下的最大倾斜角度

范围：10.0 … 80.0

Q_A_ANG_LIM_TC.n: 角度限制（维持高度） 时间常数
Q_A_ANG_LIM_TC.d:
角度限制（维持高度） 时间常数

范围：0.5 … 10.0

Q_A_ANG_PIT_P.n: 俯仰轴角度控制器 P 增益
Q_A_ANG_PIT_P.d:
俯仰轴角度控制器 P 增益。  将所需俯仰角与实际角度之间的误差转换为所需俯仰角速度

范围：3.000 … 12.000

Q_A_ANG_RLL_P.n: 横滚轴角度控制器 P 增益
Q_A_ANG_RLL_P.d:
横滚轴角度控制器 P 增益。  将所需横滚角度与实际角度之间的误差转换为所需横滚速率

范围：3.000 … 12.000

Q_A_ANG_YAW_P.n: Yaw axis angle controller P gain
Q_A_ANG_YAW_P.d:
Yaw axis angle controller P gain.  Converts the error between the desired yaw angle and actual angle to a desired yaw rate

范围: 3.000 … 12.000

Q_A_INPUT_TC.n: 姿态控制输入时间常数
Q_A_INPUT_TC.d:
姿态控制输入时间常数。  数字越低，响应越敏锐，数字越大，响应越柔和

范围：0 … 1
取值：
  0.05：非常清脆
  0.1：清脆
  0.15：中
  0.2：软
  0.5：非常柔软

Q_A_LAND_P_MULT.d:
落地时音调增益倍增器处于活动状态。系数 1.0 意味着着陆时增益不会减少。减小该系数可减少俯仰轴上的地面振荡。

范围：0.25 … 1.0

Q_A_LAND_R_MULT.d:
着陆时横滚增益倍增器处于活动状态。系数 1.0 意味着着陆时增益不会减少。减小该系数可减少横滚轴上的地面振荡。

范围：0.25 … 1.0

Q_A_LAND_Y_MULT.d:
Yaw gain multiplier active when landed. A factor of 1.0 means no reduction in gain while landed. Reduce this factor to reduce ground oscitation in the yaw axis.

范围: 0.25 … 1.0

Q_A_RATE_FF_ENAB.d:
控制是否启用或禁用身体帧速率前馈

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：启用

Q_A_RATE_P_MAX.d:
俯仰轴最大角速度

范围：0 … 1080
取值：
  0：禁用
  180：中
  360：快
  60：慢

Q_A_RATE_R_MAX.d:
横滚轴最大角速度

范围：0 … 1080
取值：
  0：禁用
  180：中
  360：快
  60：慢

Q_A_RATE_WPY_MAX.d:
在自动、引导、圆弧、跟随、RTL、SmartRTL、投掷和锯齿形飞行模式下可更新偏航目标的最大速率

范围：5 … 180

Q_A_RATE_Y_MAX.d:
偏航轴最大角速度

范围：0 … 1080
取值：
  0：禁用
  180：中
  360：快
  60：慢

Q_A_RAT_PIT_D.n: 俯仰轴速率控制器 D 增益
Q_A_RAT_PIT_D.d:
俯仰轴速率控制器 D 增益。  补偿所需俯仰速率与实际俯仰速率的短期变化

范围：0.0 … 0.05

Q_A_RAT_PIT_D_FF.d:
FF D 增益，产生与目标变化率成比例的输出

范围：0 … 0.02

Q_A_RAT_PIT_FF.n: 俯仰轴速率控制器前馈
Q_A_RAT_PIT_FF.d:
俯仰轴速率控制器前馈

范围：0 … 0.5

Q_A_RAT_PIT_FLTD.n: 俯仰轴速率控制器导数频率（以 Hz 为单位）
Q_A_RAT_PIT_FLTD.d:
俯仰轴速率控制器导数频率（以 Hz 为单位）

范围：5 … 100

Q_A_RAT_PIT_FLTE.n: 俯仰轴速率控制器错误频率（以 Hz 为单位）
Q_A_RAT_PIT_FLTE.d:
俯仰轴速率控制器错误频率（以 Hz 为单位）

范围：0 … 100

Q_A_RAT_PIT_FLTT.n: 俯仰轴速率控制器目标频率（以 Hz 为单位）
Q_A_RAT_PIT_FLTT.d:
俯仰轴速率控制器目标频率（以 Hz 为单位）

范围：5 … 100

Q_A_RAT_PIT_I.n: 俯仰轴速率控制器 I 增益
Q_A_RAT_PIT_I.d:
俯仰轴速率控制器 I 增益。  纠正所需俯仰速率与实际俯仰速率的长期差异

范围：0.01 … 2.0

Q_A_RAT_PIT_IMAX.n: 俯仰轴速率控制器 I 增益最大值
Q_A_RAT_PIT_IMAX.d:
俯仰轴速率控制器 I 增益最大。  限制 I 项输出的最大值

范围：0 … 1

Q_A_RAT_PIT_NEF.n: 音调误差陷波滤波器指数
Q_A_RAT_PIT_NEF.d:
音调误差陷波滤波器指数

范围：1 … 8

Q_A_RAT_PIT_NTF.n: 音调目标陷波滤波器指数
Q_A_RAT_PIT_NTF.d:
音调目标陷波滤波器指数

范围：1 … 8

Q_A_RAT_PIT_P.n: 俯仰轴速率控制器 P 增益
Q_A_RAT_PIT_P.d:
俯仰轴速率控制器 P 增益。  根据所需俯仰速率与实际俯仰速率输出之间的差异按比例进行校正

范围：0.01 … 0.50

Q_A_RAT_PIT_PDMX.n: 俯仰轴速率控制器 PD 总和最大值
Q_A_RAT_PIT_PDMX.d:
俯仰轴速率控制器 PD 总和最大值。  P和D项之和可以输出的最大/最小值

范围：0 … 1

Q_A_RAT_PIT_SMAX.d:
Sets an upper limit on the slew rate produced by the combined P and D gains. If the amplitude of the control action produced by the rate feedback exceeds this value, then the D+P gain is reduced to respect the limit. This limits the amplitude of high frequency oscillations caused by an excessive gain. The limit should be set to no more than 25% of the actuators maximum slew rate to allow for load effects. Note: The gain will not be reduced to less than 10% of the nominal value. A value of zero will disable this feature.

范围: 0 … 200

Q_A_RAT_RLL_D.n: 横滚轴速率控制器 D 增益
Q_A_RAT_RLL_D.d:
横滚轴速率控制器 D 增益。  补偿所需滚动速率与实际滚动速率的短期变化

范围：0.0 … 0.05

Q_A_RAT_RLL_D_FF.d:
FF D 增益，产生与目标变化率成比例的输出

范围：0 … 0.02

Q_A_RAT_RLL_FF.n: 横滚轴速率控制器前馈
Q_A_RAT_RLL_FF.d:
横滚轴速率控制器前馈

范围：0 … 0.5

Q_A_RAT_RLL_FLTD.n: 横滚轴速率控制器导数频率（以 Hz 为单位）
Q_A_RAT_RLL_FLTD.d:
横滚轴速率控制器导数频率（以 Hz 为单位）

范围：5 … 100

Q_A_RAT_RLL_FLTE.n: 横滚轴速率控制器错误频率（以 Hz 为单位）
Q_A_RAT_RLL_FLTE.d:
横滚轴速率控制器错误频率（以 Hz 为单位）

范围：0 … 100

Q_A_RAT_RLL_FLTT.n: 横滚轴速率控制器目标频率（以 Hz 为单位）
Q_A_RAT_RLL_FLTT.d:
横滚轴速率控制器目标频率（以 Hz 为单位）

范围：5 … 100

Q_A_RAT_RLL_I.n: 横滚轴速率控制器 I 增益
Q_A_RAT_RLL_I.d:
横滚轴速率控制器 I 增益。  纠正所需滚动速率与实际滚动速率的长期差异

范围：0.01 … 2.0

Q_A_RAT_RLL_IMAX.n: 横滚轴速率控制器 I 增益最大值
Q_A_RAT_RLL_IMAX.d:
横滚轴速率控制器 I 增益最大。  限制 I 项输出的最大值

范围：0 … 1

Q_A_RAT_RLL_NEF.n: 滚动误差陷波滤波器指数
Q_A_RAT_RLL_NEF.d:
滚动误差陷波滤波器指数

范围：1 … 8

Q_A_RAT_RLL_NTF.n: 滚动目标陷波滤波器指数
Q_A_RAT_RLL_NTF.d:
滚动目标陷波滤波器指数

范围：1 … 8

Q_A_RAT_RLL_P.n: 横滚轴速率控制器 P 增益
Q_A_RAT_RLL_P.d:
横滚轴速率控制器 P 增益。  根据所需侧倾速率与实际侧倾速率之间的差异按比例进行校正

范围：0.01 … 0.5

Q_A_RAT_RLL_PDMX.n: 横滚轴速率控制器 PD 总和最大值
Q_A_RAT_RLL_PDMX.d:
横滚轴速率控制器 PD 总和最大值。  P和D项之和可以输出的最大/最小值

范围：0 … 1

Q_A_RAT_RLL_SMAX.d:
Sets an upper limit on the slew rate produced by the combined P and D gains. If the amplitude of the control action produced by the rate feedback exceeds this value, then the D+P gain is reduced to respect the limit. This limits the amplitude of high frequency oscillations caused by an excessive gain. The limit should be set to no more than 25% of the actuators maximum slew rate to allow for load effects. Note: The gain will not be reduced to less than 10% of the nominal value. A value of zero will disable this feature.

范围: 0 … 200

Q_A_RAT_YAW_D.n: Yaw axis rate controller D gain
Q_A_RAT_YAW_D.d:
Yaw axis rate controller D gain.  Compensates for short-term change in desired yaw rate vs actual yaw rate

范围: 0.000 … 0.02

Q_A_RAT_YAW_D_FF.d:
FF D 增益，产生与目标变化率成比例的输出

范围：0 … 0.02

Q_A_RAT_YAW_FF.n: Yaw axis rate controller feed forward
Q_A_RAT_YAW_FF.d:
Yaw axis rate controller feed forward

范围: 0 … 0.5

Q_A_RAT_YAW_FLTD.n: Yaw axis rate controller derivative frequency in Hz
Q_A_RAT_YAW_FLTD.d:
Yaw axis rate controller derivative frequency in Hz

范围: 5 … 50

Q_A_RAT_YAW_FLTE.n: Yaw axis rate controller error frequency in Hz
Q_A_RAT_YAW_FLTE.d:
Yaw axis rate controller error frequency in Hz

范围: 0 … 20

Q_A_RAT_YAW_FLTT.n: Yaw axis rate controller target frequency in Hz
Q_A_RAT_YAW_FLTT.d:
Yaw axis rate controller target frequency in Hz

范围: 1 … 50

Q_A_RAT_YAW_I.n: Yaw axis rate controller I gain
Q_A_RAT_YAW_I.d:
Yaw axis rate controller I gain.  Corrects long-term difference in desired yaw rate vs actual yaw rate

范围: 0.010 … 1.0

Q_A_RAT_YAW_IMAX.n: Yaw axis rate controller I gain maximum
Q_A_RAT_YAW_IMAX.d:
Yaw axis rate controller I gain maximum.  Constrains the maximum that the I term will output

范围: 0 … 1

Q_A_RAT_YAW_NEF.d:
Yaw Error notch filter index

范围: 1 … 8

Q_A_RAT_YAW_NTF.d:
Yaw Target notch filter index

范围: 1 … 8

Q_A_RAT_YAW_P.n: Yaw axis rate controller P gain
Q_A_RAT_YAW_P.d:
Yaw axis rate controller P gain.  Corrects in proportion to the difference between the desired yaw rate vs actual yaw rate

范围: 0.10 … 2.50

Q_A_RAT_YAW_PDMX.n: Yaw axis rate controller PD sum maximum
Q_A_RAT_YAW_PDMX.d:
Yaw axis rate controller PD sum maximum.  The maximum/minimum value that the sum of the P and D term can output

范围: 0 … 1

Q_A_RAT_YAW_SMAX.d:
Sets an upper limit on the slew rate produced by the combined P and D gains. If the amplitude of the control action produced by the rate feedback exceeds this value, then the D+P gain is reduced to respect the limit. This limits the amplitude of high frequency oscillations caused by an excessive gain. The limit should be set to no more than 25% of the actuators maximum slew rate to allow for load effects. Note: The gain will not be reduced to less than 10% of the nominal value. A value of zero will disable this feature.

范围: 0 … 200

Q_A_THR_G_BOOST.d:
Throttle-gain boost ratio. A value of 0 means no boosting is applied, a value of 1 means full boosting is applied. Describes the ratio increase that is applied to angle P and PD on pitch and roll.

范围: 0 … 1

Q_A_THR_MIX_MAN.d:
Throttle vs attitude control prioritisation used during manual flight (higher values mean we prioritise attitude control over throttle)

范围: 0.1 … 0.9

Q_A_THR_MIX_MAX.d:
Throttle vs attitude control prioritisation used during active flight (higher values mean we prioritise attitude control over throttle)

范围: 0.5 … 0.9

Q_A_THR_MIX_MIN.d:
Throttle vs attitude control prioritisation used when landing (higher values mean we prioritise attitude control over throttle)

范围: 0.1 … 0.25

Q_LOIT_ACC_MAX_M.d:
徘徊最大校正加速度（以 m/s/s 为单位）。  较高的值会使直升机更积极地纠正位置错误。

范围：1 … 9.81

Q_LOIT_ANG_MAX.d:
徘徊飞行员要求的最大倾斜角度。将 Q_P_ANGLE_MAX/Q_A_ANGLE_MAX 的 2/3 设置为零。最大车辆倾斜角度仍受 Q_P_ANGLE_MAX/Q_A_ANGLE_MAX 限制

范围：0 … 45

Q_LOIT_BRK_ACC_M.d:
徘徊制动加速度，单位为 m/s/s。当摇杆居中时，值越高，飞行器停止得越快。

范围：0.25 … 2.5

Q_LOIT_BRK_DELAY.n: 徘徊制动启动延迟（以秒为单位）
Q_LOIT_BRK_DELAY.d:
徘徊制动启动延迟（以秒为单位）

范围：0 … 2

Q_LOIT_BRK_JRK_M.d:
徘徊制动急动度（m/s/s/s）。如果飞行员在制动操作期间移动操纵杆，则较高的值将更快地消除制动。

范围：5 … 50

Q_LOIT_OPTIONS.d:
启用可选的徘徊模式行为

位定义：
  bit0：启用协调转弯

Q_LOIT_SPEED_MS.d:
定义飞机在徘徊模式下水平飞行的最大速度（以米/秒为单位）

范围：0.20 … 35

Q_M_BAT_CURR_MAX.d:
限制最大油门的最大电流（0 = 禁用）

范围：0 … 200

Q_M_BAT_CURR_TC.n: 电机电流最大时间常数
Q_M_BAT_CURR_TC.d:
Time constant used to limit the maximum current

范围: 0 … 10

Q_M_BAT_IDX.d:
Which battery monitor should be used for doing compensation

范围: 0 … 15
取值:
  0: First battery
  1: Second battery

Q_M_BAT_VOLT_MAX.n: 电池电压补偿最大电压
Q_M_BAT_VOLT_MAX.d:
电池电压补偿最大电压（高于此电压不会对推力产生额外的缩放效果）。  推荐 4.2 * 细胞计数，0 = 禁用

范围：6 … 53

Q_M_BAT_VOLT_MIN.n: 电池电压补偿最小电压
Q_M_BAT_VOLT_MIN.d:
电池电压补偿最小电压（低于此电压不会对推力产生额外的缩放效果）。  推荐 3.3 * 细胞计数，0 = 禁用

范围：6 … 42

Q_M_BOOST_SCALE.d:
助力电机输出比例因子与主油门。  BoostThrottle 伺服系统的输出将是主油门乘以该比例因子。比例因子越高，助力电机上的负载就越大。值为 1 会将 BoostThrottle 设置为等于主油门。

范围：0 … 5

Q_M_HOVER_LEARN.d:
启用/禁用悬停油门自动学习

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：学习
  2：学习并保存

Q_M_IDLE_SEC.d:
准备好后达到地面空闲状态以允许 ESC 启动完成后的延迟。

范围：0 … 5

Q_M_OPTIONS.d:
电机选项

位定义：
  bit0：电压补偿使用原始电压

Q_M_PWM_MAX.d:
This sets the max PWM value in microseconds that will ever be output to the motors

范围: 0 … 2000

Q_M_PWM_MIN.d:
This sets the min PWM output value in microseconds that will ever be output to the motors

范围: 0 … 2000

Q_M_PWM_TYPE.d:
This selects the output PWM type, allowing for normal PWM continuous output, OneShot, brushed or DShot motor output.PWMRange and PWMAngle are PWM special/rare cases for ESCs that dont calibrate normally (some Sub motors) or where each ESC must have its PWM range set individually using the Servo params instead of PWM_MIN/MAX parameters.

取值:
  0: Normal
  1: OneShot
  2: OneShot125
  3: Brushed
  4: DShot150
  5: DShot300
  6: DShot600
  7: DShot1200
  8: PWMRange
  9: PWMAngle

Q_M_SAFE_DISARM.n: 撤防时电机 PWM 输出禁用
Q_M_SAFE_DISARM.d:
撤防时禁用电机 PWM 输出

取值：
  0：撤防时使能 PWM
  1：撤防时禁用 PWM

Q_M_SAFE_TIME.n: 当禁用 PWM 撤防时，布防后 PWM 重新启用延迟
Q_M_SAFE_TIME.d:
允许线轴转换之前布防后的延迟，用于在撤防期间禁用 PWM 时让 ESC/伺服系统完成启动。

范围：0 … 5

Q_M_SLEW_DN_TIME.n: 减小油门的输出转换时间
Q_M_SLEW_DN_TIME.d:
Time in seconds to slew output from full to zero. This is used to limit the rate at which output can change.  Range is constrained between 0 and 0.5.

范围: 0 … 0.5

Q_M_SLEW_UP_TIME.n: 增加油门的输出转换时间
Q_M_SLEW_UP_TIME.d:
Time in seconds to slew output from zero to full. This is used to limit the rate at which output can change. Range is constrained between 0 and 0.5.

范围: 0 … 0.5

Q_M_SPIN_ARM.d:
电机开始旋转的点，在整个输出范围内用 0 到 1 的数字表示。  应低于 MOT_SPIN_MIN。

范围：0.0 … 0.2
取值：
  0.0：低
  0.1：默认
  0.2：高

Q_M_SPIN_MAX.d:
在整个输出范围内推力饱和的点，用 0 到 1 的数字表示

范围：0.9 … 1.0
取值：
  0.9：低
  0.95：默认
  1.0：高

Q_M_SPIN_MIN.d:
推力开始的点在整个输出范围内表示为 0 到 1 之间的数字。  应高于 MOT_SPIN_ARM。

范围：0.0 … 0.25
取值：
  0.0：低
  0.15：默认
  0.25：高

Q_M_SPOOL_TIME.d:
Time in seconds to spool up the motors from zero to min throttle.

范围: 0.05 … 2

Q_M_SPOOL_TIM_DN.d:
Time to ramp the throttle ceiling down toward zero. If 0, SPOOL_TIME is used.

范围: 0 … 2

Q_M_THST_EXPO.d:
电机推力曲线指数（0.0 表示线性，1.0 表示二阶曲线）

范围：-1.0 … 1.0

Q_M_THST_HOVER.d:
悬停所需的电机推力以 0 到 1 之间的数字表示

范围：0.125 … 0.6875

Q_M_YAW_HEADROOM.d:
Yaw control is given at least this pwm in microseconds range

范围: 0 … 500

Q_M_YAW_SV_ANGLE.d:
Yaw servo's maximum lean angle (Tricopter only)

范围: 5 … 80

Q_P_ANGLE_MAX.d:
自动驾驶仪可以请求的最大倾斜角。设置为零以使用 ANGLE_MAX 参数值

范围：0 … 45

Q_P_D_ACC_D.n: 加速度（垂直）控制器D增益
Q_P_D_ACC_D.d:
加速度（垂直）控制器 D 增益。补偿所需垂直加速度与实际加速度的短期变化。如果从 4.6 升级，则为 _ACCZ_D * 0.1。

范围：0.000 … 0.100

Q_P_D_ACC_D_FF.n: 加速（垂直）微分前馈增益
Q_P_D_ACC_D_FF.d:
FF D 增益，产生与目标变化率成比例的输出。如果从 4.6 升级，则为 _ACCZ_P * 0.1。

范围：0.000 … 0.050

Q_P_D_ACC_FF.n: 加速度（垂直）控制器前馈
Q_P_D_ACC_FF.d:
加速度（垂直）控制器前馈。如果从 4.6 升级，则为 _ACCZ_FF * 0.1。

范围：0.000 … 0.100

Q_P_D_ACC_FLTD.n: 加速度（垂直）控制器导数频率（以 Hz 为单位）
Q_P_D_ACC_FLTD.d:
加速度（垂直）控制器导数频率（以 Hz 为单位）。以前是_ACCZ_FLTD。

范围：1 … 100

Q_P_D_ACC_FLTE.n: 加速度（垂直）控制器错误频率（以 Hz 为单位）
Q_P_D_ACC_FLTE.d:
加速度（垂直）控制器错误频率（以 Hz 为单位）。以前是_ACCZ_FLTE。

范围：1 … 100

Q_P_D_ACC_FLTT.n: 加速度（垂直）控制器目标频率（以 Hz 为单位）
Q_P_D_ACC_FLTT.d:
加速度（垂直）控制器目标频率（以 Hz 为单位）。以前是_ACCZ_FLTT。

范围：1 … 50

Q_P_D_ACC_I.n: 加速度（垂直）控制器 I 增益
Q_P_D_ACC_I.d:
加速度（垂直）控制器 I 增益。纠正所需垂直加速度和实际加速度的长期差异。如果从 4.6 升级，则为 _ACCZ_I * 0.1。

范围：0.000 … 0.500

Q_P_D_ACC_IMAX.n: 加速度（垂直）控制器 I 增益最大值
Q_P_D_ACC_IMAX.d:
加速度（垂直）控制器 I 增益最大。限制 I 项将生成的最大 pwm。如果从 4.6 升级，则为 _ACCZ_IMAX * 0.001。

范围：0.0 … 1.0

Q_P_D_ACC_NEF.n: 加速度（垂直） 误差陷波滤波器索引
Q_P_D_ACC_NEF.d:
Accel（垂直） 误差陷波滤波器索引。如果从 4.6 升级，则为以前的 _ACCZ_NEF。

范围：1 … 8

Q_P_D_ACC_NTF.n: Accel（垂直） 目标陷波滤波器索引
Q_P_D_ACC_NTF.d:
Accel（垂直） 目标陷波滤波器索引。如果从 4.6 升级，则为以前的 _ACCZ_NTF。

范围：1 … 8

Q_P_D_ACC_P.n: 加速度（垂直）控制器 P 增益
Q_P_D_ACC_P.d:
加速度（垂直）控制器 P 增益。将所需垂直加速度与实际加速度之间的差值转换为电机输出。如果从 4.6 升级，则为 _ACCZ_P * 0.1。

范围：0.010 … 0.250

Q_P_D_ACC_PDMX.n: 加速度（垂直）控制器 PD 总和最大值
Q_P_D_ACC_PDMX.d:
加速度（垂直）控制器 PD 总和最大值。 P和D项之和可以输出的最大/最小值。如果从 4.6 升级，则为 _ACCZ_P * 0.1。

范围：0.00 … 1.00

Q_P_D_ACC_SMAX.n: 加速度（垂直）转换速率限制
Q_P_D_ACC_SMAX.d:
Sets an upper limit on the slew rate produced by the combined P and D gains. If the amplitude of the control action produced by the rate feedback exceeds this value, then the D+P gain is reduced to respect the limit. This limits the amplitude of high frequency oscillations caused by an excessive gain. The limit should be set to no more than 25% of the actuators maximum slew rate to allow for load effects. Note: The gain will not be reduced to less than 10% of the nominal value. A value of zero will disable this feature.

范围: 0 … 100

Q_P_D_POS_P.n: 位置（垂直）控制器 P 增益
Q_P_D_POS_P.d:
位置（垂直）控制器 P 增益。将所需高度与实际高度之间的差异转换为爬升或下降速率，并将其传递到油门速率控制器。以前的_POSZ_P。

范围：0.50 … 4.00

Q_P_D_VEL_D.d:
Velocity (vertical) controller D gain. Corrects short-term changes in velocity. Previously _VELZ_D.

范围: 0.00 … 2.00

Q_P_D_VEL_FF.d:
Velocity (vertical) controller Feed Forward gain. Produces an output that is proportional to the magnitude of the target. Previously _VELZ_FF.

范围: 0.00 … 2.00

Q_P_D_VEL_FLTD.n: Velocity (vertical) input filter for D term
Q_P_D_VEL_FLTD.d:
Velocity (vertical) input filter for D term. This filter (in Hz) is applied to the input for D terms. Previously _VELZ_FLTD.

范围: 0 … 100

Q_P_D_VEL_FLTE.d:
Velocity (vertical) error filter. This filter (in Hz) is applied to the input for P and I terms. Previously _VELZ_FLTE.

范围: 0 … 100

Q_P_D_VEL_I.d:
Velocity (vertical) controller I gain. Corrects long-term difference in desired velocity to a target acceleration. Previously _VELZ_I.

范围: 0.00 … 10.0

Q_P_D_VEL_IMAX.d:
Velocity (vertical) controller I gain maximum. Constrains the target acceleration that the I gain will output. If upgrading from 4.6 this is _VELZ_IMAX * 0.01.

范围: 1.000 … 10.000

Q_P_D_VEL_P.d:
Velocity (vertical) controller P gain. Converts the difference between desired vertical speed and actual speed into a desired acceleration that is passed to the throttle acceleration controller. Previously _VELZ_P.

范围: 1.0 … 10.0

Q_P_JERK_D.n: 垂直运动输入整形的加加速度限制
Q_P_JERK_D.d:
垂直运动路径生成的急动度限制用于确定飞机改变加速度目标的速度

范围：1 … 50

Q_P_JERK_NE.n: 水平运动输入整形的加加速度限制
Q_P_JERK_NE.d:
水平运动路径生成的急动度限制用于确定飞机改变加速度目标的速度

范围：1 … 50

Q_P_NE_POS_P.d:
位置控制器 P 增益。将到目标位置的距离（纬度方向）转换为所需速度，然后将其传递给徘徊纬度速率控制器。以前的_POSXY_P。

范围：0.50 … 4.00

Q_P_NE_VEL_D.d:
Velocity (horizontal) D gain. Corrects short-term changes in velocity. Previously _VELXY_D.

范围: 0.00 … 1.00

Q_P_NE_VEL_FF.d:
Velocity (horizontal) feed forward gain. Converts the difference between desired velocity to a target acceleration. Previously _VELXY_FF.

范围: 0.10 … 10.00

Q_P_NE_VEL_FLTD.d:
Velocity (horizontal) input filter. This filter (in Hz) is applied to the input for D term. Previously _VELXY_FLTD.

范围: 0 … 100

Q_P_NE_VEL_FLTE.d:
Velocity (horizontal) input filter. This filter (in Hz) is applied to the input for P and I terms. Previously _VELXY_FLTE.

范围: 0 … 100

Q_P_NE_VEL_I.d:
Velocity (horizontal) I gain. Corrects long-term difference between desired and actual velocity to a target acceleration. Previously _VELXY_I.

范围: 0.10 … 10.00

Q_P_NE_VEL_IMAX.d:
Velocity (horizontal) integrator maximum. Constrains the target acceleration that the I gain will output. If upgrading from 4.6 this is _VELXY_IMAX * 0.01.

范围: 0 … 10

Q_P_NE_VEL_P.d:
Velocity (horizontal) P gain. Converts the difference between desired and actual velocity to a target acceleration. Previously _VELXY_P.

范围: 0.10 … 10.00

Q_TAILSIT_ANGLE.d:
This is the pitch angle at which tailsitter aircraft will change from VTOL control to fixed wing control.

范围: 5 … 80

Q_TAILSIT_ANG_VT.d:
This is the pitch angle at which tailsitter aircraft will change from fixed wing control to VTOL control, if zero Q_TAILSIT_ANGLE will be used

范围: 5 … 80

Q_TAILSIT_DSKLD.d:
This is the vehicle weight in kg divided by the total disk area of all propellers in m^2. Only used with Q_TAILSIT_GSCMSK = 4

范围: 0 … 50

Q_TAILSIT_ENABLE.d:
This enables Tailsitter functionality. A value of 2 forces Qassist active and always stabilize in forward flight with airmode for stabilisation at 0 throttle, for use on vehicles with no control surfaces, vehicle will not arm in forward flight modes, see also Q_OPTIONS "Mtrs_Only_Qassist"

取值:
  0: Disable
  1: Enable
  2: Enable Always

Q_TAILSIT_GSCMAX.d:
尾随 Q_TAILSIT_GSCMSK 选项的最大增益缩放

范围：1 … 5

Q_TAILSIT_GSCMIN.d:
尾随 Q_TAILSIT_GSCMSK 选项的最小增益缩放

范围：0.1 … 1

Q_TAILSIT_GSCMSK.d:
要应用的增益缩放方法的位掩码： Throttle：用油门缩放增益，ATT_THR：在高油门/倾斜时减少增益，2：磁盘理论速度计算，需要设置 Q_TAILSIT_DSKLD，不得设置 ATT_THR，3：高度校正，用空气密度缩放

位定义：
  bit0：油门
  位 1：ATT_THR
  bit2：磁盘理论
  bit3：海拔高度修正

Q_TAILSIT_INPUT.d:
This controls whether stick input when hovering as a tailsitter follows the conventions for fixed wing hovering or multicopter hovering. When PlaneMode is not enabled (bit0 = 0) the roll stick will roll the aircraft in earth frame and yaw stick will yaw in earth frame. When PlaneMode input is enabled, the roll and yaw sticks are swapped so that the roll stick controls earth-frame yaw and rudder controls earth-frame roll. When body-frame roll is enabled (bit1 = 1), the yaw stick controls earth-frame yaw rate and the roll stick controls roll in the tailsitter's body frame when flying level.

位定义:
  bit0: PlaneMode
  bit1: BodyFrameRoll

Q_TAILSIT_MIN_VO.n: Tailsitter Disk loading minimum outflow speed
Q_TAILSIT_MIN_VO.d:
Use in conjunction with disk theory gain scaling and Q_TAILSIT_DSKLD to specify minimum airspeed over control surfaces, this will be used to boost throttle, when descending for example, 0 disables

范围: 0 … 15

Q_TAILSIT_MOTMX.d:
电机位掩码在“直升机”尾翼向前飞行时保持活动状态。非零表示机身是直升机尾翼，并使用由 Q_FRAME_CLASS 和 Q_FRAME_TYPE 确定的直升机式电机布局。对于非直升机尾座来说，该值应该为零。

位定义：
  位0：电机1
  位1：电机2
  位2：电机3
  位3：电机4
  位4：电机5
  位5：电机6
  位6：电机7
  位7：电机8
  位8：电机9
  位9：电机10
  位10：电机11
  位11：电机12

Q_TAILSIT_RAT_FW.n: Tailsitter VTOL to forward flight transition rate
Q_TAILSIT_RAT_FW.d:
The pitch rate at which tailsitter aircraft will pitch down in the transition from VTOL to forward flight

范围: 10 … 500

Q_TAILSIT_RAT_VT.n: Tailsitter forward flight to VTOL transition rate
Q_TAILSIT_RAT_VT.d:
The pitch rate at which tailsitter aircraft will pitch up in the transition from forward flight to VTOL

范围: 10 … 500

Q_TAILSIT_RLL_MX.d:
尾随者允许的最大侧倾角度。如果为零，则使用 Q_A_ANGLE_MAX。

范围：0 … 80

Q_TAILSIT_THR_VT.n: Tailsitter forward flight to VTOL transition throttle
Q_TAILSIT_THR_VT.d:
Throttle used during FW->VTOL transition, -1 uses hover throttle

范围: -1 … 100

Q_TAILSIT_VFGAIN.n: Tailsitter vector thrust gain in forward flight
Q_TAILSIT_VFGAIN.d:
This controls the amount of vectored thrust control used in forward flight for a vectored tailsitter

范围: 0 … 1

Q_TAILSIT_VHGAIN.n: Tailsitter vector thrust gain in hover
Q_TAILSIT_VHGAIN.d:
This controls the amount of vectored thrust control used in hover for a vectored tailsitter

范围: 0 … 1

Q_TAILSIT_VHPOW.d:
This controls the amount of extra pitch given to the vectored control when at high pitch errors

范围: 0 … 4

Q_TAILSIT_VT_P_P.n: Tailsitter VTOL control surface pitch gain
Q_TAILSIT_VT_P_P.d:
Scale from PID output to control surface, for use where a single axis is actuated by both motors and Tilt/control surface on a copter style tailsitter, increase to favor control surfaces and reduce motor output by reducing gains

范围: 0 … 2

Q_TAILSIT_VT_R_P.n: Tailsitter VTOL control surface roll gain
Q_TAILSIT_VT_R_P.d:
Scale from PID output to control surface, for use where a single axis is actuated by both motors and Tilt/control surface on a copter style tailsitter, increase to favor control surfaces and reduce motor output by reducing gains

范围: 0 … 2

Q_TAILSIT_VT_Y_P.n: Tailsitter VTOL control surface yaw gain
Q_TAILSIT_VT_Y_P.d:
Scale from PID output to control surface, for use where a single axis is actuated by both motors and Tilt/control surface on a copter style tailsitter, increase to favor control surfaces and reduce motor output by reducing gains

范围: 0 … 2

Q_TILT_ENABLE.d:
This enables Tiltrotor functionality

取值:
  0: Disable
  1: Enable

Q_TILT_FIX_ANGLE.d:
This is the angle the motors tilt down when at maximum output for forward flight. Set this to a non-zero value to enable vectoring for roll/pitch in forward flight on tilt-vectored aircraft

范围: 0 … 30

Q_TILT_FIX_GAIN.d:
This is the gain for use of tilting motors in fixed wing flight for tilt vectored quadplanes

范围: 0 … 1

Q_TILT_MASK.d:
This is a bitmask of motors that are tiltable in a tiltrotor (or tiltwing). The mask is in terms of the standard motor order for the frame type.

位定义:
  bit0: Motor 1
  bit1: Motor 2
  bit2: Motor 3
  bit3: Motor 4
  bit4: Motor 5
  bit5: Motor 6
  bit6: Motor 7
  bit7: Motor 8
  bit8: Motor 9
  bit9: Motor 10
  bit10: Motor 11
  bit11: Motor 12

Q_TILT_MAX.d:
This is the maximum angle of the tiltable motors at which multicopter control will be enabled. Beyond this angle the plane will fly solely as a fixed wing aircraft and the motors will tilt to their maximum angle at the TILT_RATE

范围: 20 … 80

Q_TILT_RATE_DN.d:
This is the maximum speed at which the motor angle will change for a tiltrotor when moving from hover to forward flight. When this is zero the Q_TILT_RATE_UP value is used.

范围: 10 … 300

Q_TILT_RATE_UP.d:
This is the maximum speed at which the motor angle will change for a tiltrotor when moving from forward flight to hover

范围: 10 … 300

Q_TILT_TYPE.d:
This is the type of tiltrotor when TILT_MASK is non-zero. A continuous tiltrotor can tilt the rotors to any angle on demand. A binary tiltrotor assumes a retract style servo where the servo is either fully forward or fully up. In both cases the servo can't move faster than Q_TILT_RATE. A vectored yaw tiltrotor will use the tilt of the motors to control yaw in hover, Bicopter tiltrotor must use the tailsitter frame class (10)

取值:
  0: Continuous
  1: Binary
  2: VectoredYaw
  3: Bicopter

Q_TILT_WING_FLAP.n: Tiltrotor tilt angle that will be used as flap
Q_TILT_WING_FLAP.d:
用于倾斜机翼时，机翼将倾斜至此角度进行襟翼，当机翼从前向战斗位置到达此角度时，过渡将完成，0 禁用

范围：0 … 15

Q_TILT_YAW_ANGLE.n: Tilt minimum angle for vectored yaw
Q_TILT_YAW_ANGLE.d:
This is the angle of the tilt servos when in VTOL mode and at minimum output (fully back). This needs to be set in addition to Q_TILT_TYPE=2, to enable vectored control for yaw in tilt quadplanes. This is also used to limit the forward travel of bicopter tilts(Q_TILT_TYPE=3) when in VTOL modes.

范围: 0 … 30

Q_WP_ACC.d:
任务期间使用的水平加速度（以 m/s/s 为单位）

范围：0.50 … 5.00

Q_WP_ACC_CNR.d:
任务期间使用的最大转弯加速度（以 m/s/s 为单位）。  如果为零，则使用 2x 加速值。

范围：0 … 5.00

Q_WP_ACC_Z.d:
Vertical acceleration in m/s/s used during missions

范围: 0.50 … 5.00

Q_WP_JERK.d:
定义任务期间使用的水平加加速度（以 m/s/s 为单位）

范围：1 … 20

Q_WP_RADIUS_M.d:
距航路点的距离，交叉时表示已到达 wp。

范围：0.05 … 10.00

Q_WP_RFND_USE.n: Waypoint missions use rangefinder for terrain following
Q_WP_RFND_USE.d:
This controls if waypoint missions use rangefinder for terrain following

取值:
  0: Disable
  1: Enable

Q_WP_SPD.d:
Speed in m/s which the aircraft will attempt to maintain horizontally during a WP mission

范围: 0.10 … 20.00

Q_WP_SPD_DN.d:
Speed in m/s which the aircraft will attempt to maintain while descending during a WP mission

范围: 0.10 … 10.00

Q_WP_SPD_UP.d:
Speed in m/s which the aircraft will attempt to maintain while climbing during a WP mission

范围: 0.10 … 10.00

Q_WP_TER_MARGIN.d:
Waypoint Terrain following altitude margin.  Vehicle will stop if distance from target altitude is larger than this margin (in meters)

范围: 0.1 … 100

Q_WVANE_ANG_MIN.d:
The minimum target roll/pitch angle before active weathervaning will start.  This provides a dead zone that is particularly useful for poorly trimmed quadplanes.

范围: 0 … 10

Q_WVANE_ENABLE.d:
启用天气风向。  激活后，飞机将在 VTOL 位置控制模式下自动迎风偏航。飞行员偏航命令优先于风向标动作。

取值：
  -1：仅在起飞或着陆期间使用，参见风向标起飞和着陆覆盖参数
  0：禁用
  1：鼻子进风
  2：机头或机尾迎风
  3：侧面迎风
  4：尾随风

Q_WVANE_GAIN.d:
This converts the target roll/pitch angle of the aircraft into the correcting (into wind) yaw rate. e.g. Gain = 2, roll = 30 deg, pitch = 0 deg, yaw rate = 60 deg/s.

范围: 0.5 … 4

Q_WVANE_HGT_MIN.d:
高于这个高度是允许风向标的。  如果启用了 RNGFND_LANDING 或启用了地形，则此参数设置高度 AGL。否则，此参数设置高于家庭的高度。  设置为零以忽略激活风向标的最低高度要求

范围：0 … 50

Q_WVANE_LAND.d:
覆盖着陆时的天气风向行为

取值：
  -1：无覆盖
  0：禁用
  1：鼻子进风
  2：机头或机尾迎风
  3：侧面迎风
  4：尾随风

Q_WVANE_OPTIONS.d:
影响风向行为的选项

位定义：
  bit0：当机头或机尾向内时使用俯仰角以获得更快的风向标

Q_WVANE_SPD_MAX.d:
低于这个地速是允许风向变化的。设置为 0 可在检查车辆是否应随风向标时忽略此条件。

范围：0 … 50

Q_WVANE_TAKEOFF.d:
起飞时忽略天气变化行为

取值：
  -1：无覆盖
  0：禁用
  1：鼻子进风
  2：机头或机尾迎风
  3：侧面迎风
  4：尾随风

Q_WVANE_VELZ_MAX.d:
The maximum climb or descent speed that the vehicle will still attempt to weathervane. Set to 0 to ignore this condition to get the aircraft to weathervane at any climb/descent rate.  This is particularly useful for aircraft with low disc loading that struggle with yaw control in decent.

范围: 0 … 5

RLL2SRV_RMAX.d:
This sets the maximum roll rate that the attitude controller will demand (degrees/sec) in angle stabilized modes. Setting it to zero disables this limit.

范围: 0 … 180

RLL2SRV_TCONST.d:
Time constant in seconds from demanded to achieved roll angle. Most models respond well to 0.5. May be reduced for faster responses, but setting lower than a model can achieve will not help.

范围: 0.4 … 1.0

RLL_RATE_D.n: 横滚轴速率控制器 D 增益
RLL_RATE_D.d:
横滚轴速率控制器 D 增益。  补偿所需滚动速率与实际滚动速率的短期变化

范围：0.001 … 0.03

RLL_RATE_D_FF.d:
FF D 增益，产生与目标变化率成比例的输出

范围：0 … 0.03

RLL_RATE_FF.n: 横滚轴速率控制器前馈
RLL_RATE_FF.d:
横滚轴速率控制器前馈

范围：0 … 3.0

RLL_RATE_FLTD.n: 横滚轴速率控制器导数频率（以 Hz 为单位）
RLL_RATE_FLTD.d:
横滚轴速率控制器导数频率（以 Hz 为单位）

范围：0 … 50

RLL_RATE_FLTE.n: 横滚轴速率控制器错误频率（以 Hz 为单位）
RLL_RATE_FLTE.d:
横滚轴速率控制器错误频率（以 Hz 为单位）

范围：2 … 50

RLL_RATE_FLTT.n: 横滚轴速率控制器目标频率（以 Hz 为单位）
RLL_RATE_FLTT.d:
横滚轴速率控制器目标频率（以 Hz 为单位）

范围：2 … 50

RLL_RATE_I.n: 横滚轴速率控制器 I 增益
RLL_RATE_I.d:
横滚轴速率控制器 I 增益。  纠正所需滚动速率与实际滚动速率的长期差异

范围：0.01 … 0.6

RLL_RATE_IMAX.n: 横滚轴速率控制器 I 增益最大值
RLL_RATE_IMAX.d:
横滚轴速率控制器 I 增益最大。  限制 I 项输出的最大值

范围：0 … 1

RLL_RATE_NEF.n: 滚动误差陷波滤波器指数
RLL_RATE_NEF.d:
滚动误差陷波滤波器指数

范围：1 … 8

RLL_RATE_NTF.n: 滚动目标陷波滤波器指数
RLL_RATE_NTF.d:
滚动目标陷波滤波器指数

范围：1 … 8

RLL_RATE_P.n: 横滚轴速率控制器 P 增益
RLL_RATE_P.d:
横滚轴速率控制器 P 增益。根据所需侧倾速率与实际侧倾速率之间的差异按比例进行校正

范围：0.08 … 0.35

RLL_RATE_PDMX.n: 横滚轴速率控制器 PD 总和最大值
RLL_RATE_PDMX.d:
横滚轴速率控制器 PD 总和最大值。  P和D项之和可以输出的最大/最小值

范围：0 … 1

RLL_RATE_SMAX.d:
Sets an upper limit on the slew rate produced by the combined P and D gains. If the amplitude of the control action produced by the rate feedback exceeds this value, then the D+P gain is reduced to respect the limit. This limits the amplitude of high frequency oscillations caused by an excessive gain. The limit should be set to no more than 25% of the actuators maximum slew rate to allow for load effects. Note: The gain will not be reduced to less than 10% of the nominal value. A value of zero will disable this feature.

范围: 0 … 200

SERVO_AUTO_TRIM.d:
This enables automatic servo trim in flight. Servos will be trimed in stabilized flight modes when the aircraft is close to level. Changes to servo trim will be saved every 10 seconds and will persist between flights. The automatic trim won't go more than 20% away from a centered trim.

取值:
  0: Disable
  1: Enable

SID_XY_CTRL_MUL.d:
在 VTOL 模式下使用 systemID 进行水平位置和速度控制时，XY 速度和位置控制器的乘数

范围：0.05 … 1.0

SOAR_ALT_CUTOFF.n: 最大功率高度，相对于家乡位置
SOAR_ALT_CUTOFF.d:
在此高度处切断油门。

范围：0 … 5000.0

SOAR_ALT_MAX.n: 相对于家乡位置的最大翱翔高度
SOAR_ALT_MAX.d:
温度不要高于此值。

范围：0 … 5000.0

SOAR_ALT_MIN.n: 相对于家乡位置的最低翱翔高度
SOAR_ALT_MIN.d:
不要低于这个。

范围：0 … 1000.0

SOAR_CRSE_ARSPD.n: Specific setting for airspeed when soaring in AUTO mode.
SOAR_CRSE_ARSPD.d:
如果非零，则在自动模式下在热气流之间巡航时将使用该空速。如果设置为 -1，将根据飞行速度理论选择空速。如果设置为 0，则在热气流之间巡航时将使用 AIRSPEED_CRUISE。

范围：-1 … 50

SOAR_DIST_AHEAD.d:
到热中心距离的初步猜测

范围：0 … 100

SOAR_ENABLE.d:
Toggles the soaring mode on and off

取值:
  0: Disable
  1: Enable

SOAR_MAX_DRIFT.n: （可选）热作用时允许的最大漂移距离。
SOAR_MAX_DRIFT.d:
The previous mode will be restored if the horizontal distance to the thermalling start location exceeds this value. -1 to disable.

范围: 0 … 1000

SOAR_MAX_RADIUS.d:
当热气流退出并且飞机离家的距离超过此距离时，将进入 RTL。 -1 禁用。

范围：0 … 1000

SOAR_MIN_CRSE_S.d:
巡航花费的最少秒数

范围：0 … 600

SOAR_MIN_THML_S.d:
花费热力的最少秒数

范围：0 … 600

SOAR_POLAR_B.d:
诱导阻力系数

范围：0.005 … 0.05

SOAR_POLAR_CD0.d:
Zero lift drag coefficient

范围: 0.005 … 0.5

SOAR_Q1.d:
Standard deviation of noise in process for strength

范围: 0.0001 … 0.01

SOAR_Q2.d:
Standard deviation of noise in process for position and radius

范围: 0.01 … 1

SOAR_R.d:
Standard deviation of noise in measurement

范围: 0.01 … 1

SOAR_THML_ARSPD.n: Specific setting for airspeed when soaring in THERMAL mode.
SOAR_THML_ARSPD.d:
如果不为零，则在热飞行时将使用该空速。值为 0 将使用 AIRSPEED_CRUISE。

范围：0 … 50

SOAR_THML_BANK.d:
This parameter sets the bank angle to use when thermalling. Typically 30 - 45 degrees works well.

范围: 20 … 50

SOAR_THML_FLAP.n: 热飞行期间使用的襟翼百分比。
SOAR_THML_FLAP.d:
This sets the flap when in LOITER with soaring active. Overrides the usual auto flap behaviour.

范围: 0 … 100

SOAR_VSPEED.d:
触发马尔林速度的爬升率

范围：0 … 10

STEER2SRV_D.d:
This adjusts the damping of the steering control loop. This gain helps to reduce steering jitter with vibration. It should be increased in 0.01 increments as too high a value can lead to a high frequency steering oscillation that could overstress the vehicle.

范围: 0 … 0.1

STEER2SRV_DRTFCT.d:
高于“降额速度”的速度每增加 m/s 时方向盘降额的度数。应进行设置，以便在较高速度下飞机不会轮流向机翼侧滚。

范围：0.0 … 50.0

STEER2SRV_DRTMIN.d:
The angle that limits smallest angle of steering wheel at maximum speed. Even if it should derate below, it will stop derating at this angle.

范围: 0 … 4500

STEER2SRV_DRTSPD.d:
Speed after that the maximum degree of steering will start to derate. Set this speed to a maximum speed that a plane can do controlled turn at maximum angle of steering wheel without rolling to wing. If 0 then no derating is used.

范围: 0.0 … 30.0

STEER2SRV_FF.d:
The feed forward gain for steering this is the ratio of the achieved turn rate to applied steering. A value of 1 means that the vehicle would yaw at a rate of 45 degrees per second with full steering deflection at 1m/s ground speed.

范围: 0.0 … 10.0

STEER2SRV_I.d:
This is the gain from the integral of steering angle. Increasing this gain causes the controller to trim out steady offsets due to an out of trim vehicle.

范围: 0 … 1.0

STEER2SRV_IMAX.d:
This limits the number of degrees of steering in centi-degrees over which the integrator will operate. At the default setting of 1500 centi-degrees, the integrator will be limited to +- 15 degrees of servo travel. The maximum servo deflection is +- 45 centi-degrees, so the default value represents a 1/3rd of the total control throw which is adequate unless the vehicle is severely out of trim.

范围: 0 … 4500

STEER2SRV_MINSPD.d:
This is the minimum assumed ground speed in meters/second for steering. Having a minimum speed prevents oscillations when the vehicle first starts moving. The vehicle can still drive slower than this limit, but the steering calculations will be done based on this minimum speed.

范围: 0 … 5

STEER2SRV_P.d:
The proportional gain for steering. This should be approximately equal to the diameter of the turning circle of the vehicle at low speed and maximum steering angle

范围: 0.1 … 10.0

STEER2SRV_TCONST.d:
This controls the time constant in seconds from demanded to achieved steering angle. A value of 0.75 is a good default and will work with nearly all rovers. Ground steering in aircraft needs a bit smaller time constant, and a value of 0.5 is recommended for best ground handling in fixed wing aircraft. A value of 0.75 means that the controller will try to correct any deviation between the desired and actual steering angle in 0.75 seconds. Advanced users may want to reduce this time to obtain a faster response but there is no point setting a time less than the vehicle can achieve.

范围: 0.4 … 1.0

TECS_APPR_SMAX.n: Sink rate max for landing approach stage
TECS_APPR_SMAX.d:
The sink rate max for the landing approach stage of landing. This will need to be large for steep landing approaches especially when using reverse thrust. If 0, then use TECS_SINK_MAX.

范围: 0.0 … 20.0

TECS_CLMB_MAX.d:
所需的最大爬升率。当电池电压较低时，请勿将 AIRSPEED_CRUISE 设置为高于 THR_MAX 的爬升速度。如果上升时无法保持空速，则减小该值。如果油门没有明显增加以上升，则增加该值。

范围：0.1 … 20.0

TECS_FLARE_HGT.d:
When height above ground is below this, the sink rate will be held at TECS_LAND_SINK. Use this to perform a hold-off manoeuvre when combined with small values for TECS_LAND_SINK.

范围: 0 … 15

TECS_HDEM_TCONST.d:
This sets the time constant of the low pass filter that is applied to the height demand input when bit 0 of TECS_OPTIONS is not selected.

范围: 1.0 … 5.0

TECS_HGT_OMEGA.n: 高度互补滤波器频率（弧度/秒）
TECS_HGT_OMEGA.d:
This is the cross-over frequency of the complementary filter used to fuse vertical acceleration and baro alt to obtain an estimate of height rate and height.

范围: 1.0 … 5.0

TECS_INTEG_GAIN.d:
积分器增益可消除长期速度和高度误差。

范围：0.0 … 0.5

TECS_LAND_ARSPD.d:
When performing an autonomous landing, this value is used as the goal airspeed during approach.  Max airspeed allowed is Trim Airspeed or AIRSPEED_MAX as defined by LAND_OPTIONS bitmask.  Note that this parameter is not useful if your platform does not have an airspeed sensor (use TECS_LAND_THR instead).  If negative then this value is halfway between AIRSPEED_MIN and AIRSPEED_CRUISE speed for fixed wing autolandings.

范围: -1 … 127

TECS_LAND_DAMP.n: 拉平期间控制器下沉速率至俯仰增益
TECS_LAND_DAMP.d:
This is the sink rate gain for the pitch demand loop when in final landing stage of flight. It should be larger than TECS_PTCH_DAMP to allow for better sink rate control during flare.

范围: 0.1 … 1.0

TECS_LAND_IGAIN.n: 着陆期间控制器积分器
TECS_LAND_IGAIN.d:
This is the integrator gain on the control loop during landing. When set to 0 then TECS_INTEG_GAIN is used. Increase to increase the rate at which speed and height offsets are trimmed out. Typically values lower than TECS_INTEG_GAIN work best

范围: 0.0 … 0.5

TECS_LAND_PDAMP.d:
This is the damping gain for the pitch demand loop during landing. Increase to add damping  to correct for oscillations in speed and height. If set to 0 then TECS_PTCH_DAMP will be used instead.

范围: 0.1 … 1.0

TECS_LAND_PMAX.n: 着陆最后阶段的最大俯仰角
TECS_LAND_PMAX.d:
This limits the pitch used during the final stage of automatic landing. During the final landing stage most planes need to keep their pitch small to avoid stalling. A maximum of 10 degrees is usually good. A value of zero means to use the normal pitch limits.

范围: -5 … 40

TECS_LAND_SINK.n: Sink rate for final landing stage
TECS_LAND_SINK.d:
The sink rate in meters/second for the final stage of landing.

范围: 0.0 … 2.0

TECS_LAND_SPDWGT.n: Weighting applied to speed control during landing.
TECS_LAND_SPDWGT.d:
Same as SPDWEIGHT parameter, with the exception that this parameter is applied during landing flight stages.  A value closer to 2 will result in the plane ignoring height error during landing and our experience has been that the plane will therefore keep the nose up -- sometimes good for a glider landing (with the side effect that you will likely glide a ways past the landing point).  A value closer to 0 results in the plane ignoring speed error -- use caution when lowering the value below 1 -- ignoring speed could result in a stall. Values between 0 and 2 are valid values for a fixed landing weight. When using -1 the weight will be scaled during the landing. At the start of the landing approach it starts with TECS_SPDWEIGHT and scales down to 0 by the time you reach the land point. Example: Halfway down the landing approach you'll effectively have a weight of TECS_SPDWEIGHT/2.

范围: -1.0 … 2.0

TECS_LAND_SRC.d:
When zero, the flare sink rate (TECS_LAND_SINK) is a fixed sink demand. With this enabled the flare sink rate will increase/decrease the flare sink demand as you get further beyond the LAND waypoint. Has no effect before the waypoint. This value is added to TECS_LAND_SINK proportional to distance traveled after wp. With an increasing sink rate you can still land in a given distance if you're traveling too fast and cruise passed the land point. A positive value will force the plane to land sooner proportional to distance passed land point. A negative number will tell the plane to slowly climb allowing for a pitched-up stall landing. Recommend 0.2 as initial value.

范围: -2.0 … 2.0

TECS_LAND_TCONST.n: 地面控制器时间常数（秒）
TECS_LAND_TCONST.d:
This is the time constant of the TECS control algorithm when in final landing stage of flight. It should be smaller than TECS_TIME_CONST to allow for faster flare

范围: 1.0 … 5.0

TECS_LAND_TDAMP.n: 着陆时控制器油门阻尼
TECS_LAND_TDAMP.d:
自动着陆期间油门需求回路的阻尼增益。与 TECS_THR_DAMP 相同，但仅在自动着陆期间有效。增加油门活动以抑制速度和高度的波动。当设置为 0 时，着陆油门阻尼由 TECS_THR_DAMP 控制。

范围：0.1 … 1.0

TECS_LAND_THR.n: 着陆进近时巡航油门（百分比）
TECS_LAND_THR.d:
Use this parameter instead of LAND_ARSPD if your platform does not have an airspeed sensor.  It is the cruise throttle during landing approach.  If this value is negative then it is disabled and TECS_LAND_ARSPD is used instead.

范围: -1 … 100

TECS_OPTIONS.d:
This allows the enabling of special features in the speed/height controller.

位定义:
  bit0: GliderOnly
  bit1: AllowDescentSpeedup

TECS_PITCH_MAX.d:
在自动油门模式下覆盖 PTCH_LIM_MAX_DEG 以降低爬升率。如果设置为 0，则使用 PTCH_LIM_MAX_DEG。为了正确调整 TECS，请设置为飞机可以以 AIRSPEED_CRUISE 和 THR_MAX 爬升的角度。

范围：0 … 45

TECS_PITCH_MIN.n: 自动飞行时的最小俯仰角
TECS_PITCH_MIN.d:
在自动油门模式下覆盖 PTCH_LIM_MIN_DEG 以降低下降率。如果设置为 0，则使用 PTCH_LIM_MIN_DEG。为了正确调整 TECS，请设置为飞机可以在不超速的情况下下降的角度。

范围：-45 … 0

TECS_PTCH_DAMP.d:
来自 TECS 控制的桨距控制的阻尼增益。  增加可以纠正速度和高度的振荡，但太多可能会导致额外的振荡和控制能力下降。

范围：0.1 … 1.0

TECS_PTCH_FF_K.d:
This parameter sets the gain between demanded airspeed and pitch. It has units of radians per metre per second and should generally be negative. A good starting value is -0.04 for gliders and -0.08 for draggy airframes. The default (0.0) disables this feed-forward.

范围: -5.0 … 0.0

TECS_PTCH_FF_V0.d:
This parameter sets the airspeed at which no feed-forward is applied between demanded airspeed and pitch. It should correspond to the airspeed in metres per second at which the plane glides at neutral pitch including STAB_PITCH_DOWN.

范围: 5.0 … 50.0

TECS_RLL2THR.d:
从坡度角度到油门的增益可补偿转弯时阻力造成的空速损失。设置为大约 10 倍 45 度转弯引起的下沉速率（以米/秒为单位）。高效率模型可能需要更少，而低效率飞机可能需要更多。应在航路点和转弯大于 90 度的自动任务中进行调整。使用 PTCH2SRV_RLL 和 KFF_RDDRMIX 进行调整，以实现恒定空速、恒定高度转弯。

范围：5.0 … 30.0

TECS_SINK_MAX.d:
最大要求下降率。请勿设置高于飞机可维持的垂直速度 THR_MIN、TECS_PITCH_MIN 和 AIRSPEED_MAX。

范围：0.0 … 20.0

TECS_SINK_MIN.d:
处于 THR_MIN 和 AIRSPEED_CRUISE 时的最小下沉速率。

范围：0.1 … 10.0

TECS_SPDWEIGHT.d:
混合俯仰和油门修正高度和空速误差。如果设置为 0，则俯仰控制高度，油门控制空速。如果设置为 2，则俯仰控制空速，油门控制高度（适合滑翔机）。如果设置为 1，则混合。

范围：0.0 … 2.0

TECS_SPD_OMEGA.d:
This is the cross-over frequency of the complementary filter used to fuse longitudinal acceleration and airspeed to obtain a lower noise and lag estimate of airspeed.

范围: 0.5 … 2.0

TECS_SYNAIRSPEED.d:
This enables the use of synthetic airspeed in TECS for aircraft that don't have a real airspeed sensor. This is useful for development testing where the user is aware of the considerable limitations of the synthetic airspeed system, such as very poor estimates when a wind estimate is not accurate. Do not enable this option unless you fully understand the limitations of a synthetic airspeed estimate. This option has no effect if a healthy airspeed sensor is being used for airspeed measurements.

取值:
  0: Disable
  1: Enable

TECS_THR_DAMP.d:
油门需求回路的阻尼增益。增加油门活动以抑制速度和高度的波动。

范围：0.1 … 1.0

TECS_THR_ERATE.n: 前进油门外部限制摆率
TECS_THR_ERATE.d:
The externally set forward throttle lower limit applied within TECS will be reduced by this many percentage points per second after being set. Set to a non positive value to hold the lower limit for one frame only.

范围: 0 … 100

TECS_TIME_CONST.d:
Time constant of the TECS control algorithm. Small values make faster altitude corrections but can cause overshoot and aggressive behavior.

范围: 3.0 … 10.0

TECS_TKOFF_IGAIN.n: 起飞期间的控制器积分器
TECS_TKOFF_IGAIN.d:
This is the integrator gain on the control loop during takeoff. Increase to increase the rate at which speed and height offsets are trimmed out.

范围: 0.0 … 0.5

TECS_VERT_ACC.d:
用于校正速度或高度误差的最大垂直加速度。

范围：1.0 … 10.0

TKOFF_ALT.d:
This is the target altitude for TAKEOFF mode

范围: 0 … 200

TKOFF_DIST.d:
This is the distance from the takeoff location where the plane will loiter. The loiter point will be in the direction of takeoff (the direction the plane is facing when the plane begins takeoff)

范围: 0 … 500

TKOFF_GND_PITCH.d:
在速度达到 TKOFF_ROTATE_SPD 之前起飞运行期间所需的俯仰角度数。对于尾拖机，设置为 3 点地面俯仰角并使用 TKOFF_TDRAG_ELEV 来防止机头翻倒。对于设置为地面俯仰角的前轮转向飞机，如果随着速度上升需要减少前轮负载，请在 TKOFF_GND_PITCH 中使用高于地面角度最多 5 度的正偏移，从测量的俯仰角开始并以 1 度的步长递增，同时检查每个增量是否过早旋转和起飞。要增加前轮负载，请使用负 TKOFF_TDRAG_ELEV，并在进行调整之前参阅 TKOFF_TDRAG_ELEV 的注释。

范围：-5.0 … 10.0

TKOFF_LVL_ALT.d:
This is the altitude below which the wings are held level for TAKEOFF and AUTO modes. Below this altitude, roll demand is restricted to LEVEL_ROLL_LIMIT. Normal-flight roll restriction resumes above TKOFF_LVL_ALT*3 or TKOFF_ALT, whichever is lower. Roll limits are scaled while between TKOFF_LVL_ALT and those altitudes for a smooth transition.

范围: 0 … 50

TKOFF_LVL_PITCH.d:
This is the target pitch during the takeoff.

范围: 0 … 30

TUNE_CHAN.d:
This sets the channel for transmitter tuning. This should be connected to a knob or slider on your transmitter. It needs to be setup to use the PWM range given by TUNE_CHAN_MIN to TUNE_CHAN_MAX

取值:
  0: Disable
  10: Chan10
  11: Chan11
  12: Chan12
  13: Chan13
  14: Chan14
  15: Chan15
  16: Chan16
  5: Chan5
  6: Chan6
  7: Chan7
  8: Chan8
  9: Chan9

TUNE_CHAN_MAX.d:
This sets the PWM upper limit for the tuning channel

范围: 900 … 2100

TUNE_CHAN_MIN.d:
This sets the PWM lower limit for the tuning channel

范围: 900 … 2100

TUNE_ERR_THRESH.d:
This sets the controller error threshold above which an alarm will sound and a message will be sent to the GCS to warn of controller instability while tuning. The error is the rms value of the P+D corrections in the loop. High values in hover indicate possible instability due to too high PID gains or excessively high D to P gain ratios.-1 will disable this message.

范围: 0 … 1

TUNE_MODE_REVERT.d:
This controls whether tuning values will revert on a flight mode change.

取值:
  0: Disable
  1: Enable

TUNE_PARAM.n: Transmitter tuning parameter or set of parameters
TUNE_PARAM.d:
This sets which parameter or set of parameters will be tuned. Values greater than 100 indicate a set of parameters rather than a single parameter. Parameters less than 50 are for QuadPlane vertical lift motors only.

取值:
  0: None
  1: RateRollPI
  10: RateYawP
  101: Set_RateRollPitch
  102: Set_RateRoll
  103: Set_RatePitch
  104: Set_RateYaw
  105: Set_AngleRollPitch
  106: Set_VelXY
  107: Set_AccelZ
  108: Set_RatePitchDP
  109: Set_RateRollDP
  11: RateYawI
  110: Set_RateYawDP
  12: RateYawD
  13: AngleRollP
  14: AnglePitchP
  15: AngleYawP
  16: PosXYP
  17: PosZP
  18: VelXYP
  19: VelXYI
  2: RateRollP
  20: VelZP
  21: AccelZP
  22: AccelZI
  23: AccelZD
  24: RatePitchFF
  25: RateRollFF
  26: RateYawFF
  3: RateRollI
  4: RateRollD
  5: RatePitchPI
  50: FixedWingRollP
  51: FixedWingRollI
  52: FixedWingRollD
  53: FixedWingRollFF
  54: FixedWingPitchP
  55: FixedWingPitchI
  56: FixedWingPitchD
  57: FixedWingPitchFF
  6: RatePitchP
  7: RatePitchI
  8: RatePitchD
  9: RateYawPI

TUNE_RANGE.d: This sets the range over which tuning will change a parameter. A value of 2 means the tuning parameter will go from 0.5 times the start value to 2x the start value over the range of the tuning channel

TUNE_SELECTOR.d:
This sets the channel for the transmitter tuning selector switch. This should be a 2 position switch, preferably spring loaded. A PWM above 1700 means high, below 1300 means low. If no selector is set then you won't be able to switch between parameters during flight or re-center the tuning knob

取值:
  0: Disable
  1: Chan1
  10: Chan10
  11: Chan11
  12: Chan12
  13: Chan13
  14: Chan14
  15: Chan15
  16: Chan16
  2: Chan3
  3: Chan3
  4: Chan4
  5: Chan5
  6: Chan6
  7: Chan7
  8: Chan8
  9: Chan9

YAW2SRV_DAMP.d:
从偏航率到方向舵的增益。对偏航阻尼最有效，应在 KFF_RDDRMIX 之后进行调整。如果设置为 0，还会禁用 YAW2SRV_INT。

范围：0 … 2

YAW2SRV_IMAX.d:
偏航积分器增益限制（以厘度为单位的伺服行程）。假定舵机具有 +/- 4500 摄氏度的行程，因此值为 1500 允许微调舵机行程范围的 1/3。

范围：0 … 4500

YAW2SRV_INT.d:
横向加速度误差的积分增益。有效修整舵，消除长期侧滑。

范围：0 … 2

YAW2SRV_RLL.d:
获得与协调转弯中的转弯速率保持一致所需的偏航速率。转弯建立后纠正偏航倾向。通过抬高来增加转弯时的偏航。通过减少来增加转弯时的偏航。值超出 0.9-1.1 范围表示空速校准存在问题。

范围：0.8 … 1.2

YAW2SRV_SLIP.d:
对于具有足够机身面积来检测横向加速度和侧滑的飞机，从横向加速度获得所需的偏航率。请勿启用飞翼和滑翔机。积极协调飞行而不仅仅是偏航阻尼。在调整 YAW2SRV_DAMP 和 YAW2SRV_INT 后设置。

范围：0 … 4

YAW_RATE_D.n: Yaw axis rate controller D gain
YAW_RATE_D.d:
Yaw axis rate controller D gain.  Compensates for short-term change in desired yaw rate vs actual yaw rate

范围: 0.001 … 0.03

YAW_RATE_D_FF.d:
FF D 增益，产生与目标变化率成比例的输出

范围：0 … 0.03

YAW_RATE_ENABLE.d:
为特技飞行启用偏航率控制器

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：启用

YAW_RATE_FF.n: Yaw axis rate controller feed forward
YAW_RATE_FF.d:
Yaw axis rate controller feed forward

范围: 0 … 3.0

YAW_RATE_FLTD.n: Yaw axis rate controller derivative frequency in Hz
YAW_RATE_FLTD.d:
Yaw axis rate controller derivative frequency in Hz

范围: 0 … 50

YAW_RATE_FLTE.n: Yaw axis rate controller error frequency in Hz
YAW_RATE_FLTE.d:
Yaw axis rate controller error frequency in Hz

范围: 2 … 50

YAW_RATE_FLTT.n: Yaw axis rate controller target frequency in Hz
YAW_RATE_FLTT.d:
Yaw axis rate controller target frequency in Hz

范围: 2 … 50

YAW_RATE_I.n: Yaw axis rate controller I gain
YAW_RATE_I.d:
Yaw axis rate controller I gain.  Corrects long-term difference in desired yaw rate vs actual yaw rate

范围: 0.01 … 0.6

YAW_RATE_IMAX.n: Yaw axis rate controller I gain maximum
YAW_RATE_IMAX.d:
Yaw axis rate controller I gain maximum.  Constrains the maximum that the I term will output

范围: 0 … 1

YAW_RATE_NEF.d:
Yaw Error notch filter index

范围: 1 … 8

YAW_RATE_NTF.d:
Yaw Target notch filter index

范围: 1 … 8

YAW_RATE_P.n: Yaw axis rate controller P gain
YAW_RATE_P.d:
Yaw axis rate controller P gain.  Corrects in proportion to the difference between the desired yaw rate vs actual yaw rate

范围: 0.08 … 0.35

YAW_RATE_PDMX.n: Yaw axis rate controller PD sum maximum
YAW_RATE_PDMX.d:
Yaw axis rate controller PD sum maximum.  The maximum/minimum value that the sum of the P and D term can output

范围: 0 … 1

YAW_RATE_SMAX.d:
Sets an upper limit on the slew rate produced by the combined P and D gains. If the amplitude of the control action produced by the rate feedback exceeds this value, then the D+P gain is reduced to respect the limit. This limits the amplitude of high frequency oscillations caused by an excessive gain. The limit should be set to no more than 25% of the actuators maximum slew rate to allow for load effects. Note: The gain will not be reduced to less than 10% of the nominal value. A value of zero will disable this feature.

范围: 0 … 200

ATC_ACCEL_MAX.n: Speed control acceleration (and deceleration) maximum in m/s/s
ATC_ACCEL_MAX.d:
Speed control acceleration (and deceleration) maximum in m/s/s.  0 to disable acceleration limiting

范围: 0.0 … 10.0

ATC_BAL_D.n: 音调控制 D 增益
ATC_BAL_D.d:
音调控制 D 增益。  补偿所需音高与实际音高的短期变化

范围：0.000 … 0.100

ATC_BAL_D_FF.n: 变桨控制 微分前馈增益
ATC_BAL_D_FF.d:
FF D 增益，产生与目标变化率成比例的输出

范围：0 … 0.03

ATC_BAL_FF.d:
桨距控制前馈

范围：0.000 … 0.500

ATC_BAL_FILT.d:
变桨控制输入滤波器。  较低的值会减少噪音，但会增加延迟。

范围：0.000 … 100.000

ATC_BAL_FLTD.n: 音调控制 微分项滤波器频率（以 Hz 为单位）
ATC_BAL_FLTD.d:
音调控制 微分滤波器频率（Hz）

范围：0.000 … 100.000

ATC_BAL_FLTE.n: 变桨控制 误差滤波器频率（Hz）
ATC_BAL_FLTE.d:
变桨控制 误差滤波器频率（Hz）

范围：0.000 … 100.000

ATC_BAL_FLTT.n: 变桨控制 目标滤波器频率（以 Hz 为单位）
ATC_BAL_FLTT.d:
变桨控制 目标滤波器频率（以 Hz 为单位）

范围：0.000 … 100.000

ATC_BAL_I.d:
我通过 BalanceBots 获得了音调控制。  纠正所需螺距（以弧度为单位）和实际螺距之间的长期误差

范围：0.000 … 2.000

ATC_BAL_IMAX.n: 桨距控制 I 增益最大
ATC_BAL_IMAX.d:
俯仰控制我获得最大。  限制 I 项将产生的最大电机输出（范围 -1 至 +1）

范围：0.000 … 1.000

ATC_BAL_LIM_TC.n: 变桨控制极限时间常数
ATC_BAL_LIM_TC.d:
变桨控制限制时间常数以防止跌落。  值越低限制音调越快，值越高限制越慢。  设置为 0 禁用

范围：0.0 … 5.0

ATC_BAL_LIM_THR.n: 变桨控制限制油门阈值
ATC_BAL_LIM_THR.d:
变桨控制限制油门阈值。  如果油门超过此阈值（从 0 到 1），俯仰角将受到限制

范围：0.0 … 1.0

ATC_BAL_NEF.n: 变桨控制 误差陷波滤波器指数
ATC_BAL_NEF.d:
变桨控制 误差陷波滤波器指数

范围：1 … 8

ATC_BAL_NTF.n: 音调控制 目标陷波滤波器指数
ATC_BAL_NTF.d:
音调控制 目标陷波滤波器指数

范围：1 … 8

ATC_BAL_P.n: 桨距控制 P 增益
ATC_BAL_P.d:
BalanceBots 的俯仰控制 P 增益。  将所需螺距（以弧度为单位）和实际螺距之间的误差转换为电机输出（范围 -1 到 +1）

范围：0.000 … 2.000

ATC_BAL_PDMX.n: 桨距控制 PD 总和最大值
ATC_BAL_PDMX.d:
桨距控制 PD 总和最大值。  P和D项之和可以输出的最大/最小值

范围：0.000 … 1.000

ATC_BAL_PIT_FF.n: 桨距控制从当前桨距角前馈
ATC_BAL_PIT_FF.d:
桨距控制从当前桨距角前馈

范围：0.0 … 1.0

ATC_BAL_SMAX.n: 变桨控制转换速率限制
ATC_BAL_SMAX.d:
由 P 和 D 增益组合产生的转换速率的变桨控制上限。如果速率反馈产生的控制动作的幅度超过该值，则 D+P 增益将减小以遵守该限制。这限制了由过量增益引起的高频振荡的幅度。该限制应设置为不超过执行器最大转换速率的 25%，以考虑负载效应。注：增益不会降低至标称值的10%以下。值为零将禁用此功能。

范围：0 … 200

ATC_BRAKE.d:
Speed control brake enable/disable. Allows sending a reversed output to the motors to slow the vehicle.

取值:
  0: Disable
  1: Enable

ATC_DECEL_MAX.n: Speed control deceleration maximum in m/s/s
ATC_DECEL_MAX.d:
Speed control and deceleration maximum in m/s/s.  0 to use ATC_ACCEL_MAX for deceleration

范围: 0.0 … 10.0

ATC_SAIL_D.d:
Sail Heel control D gain.  Compensates for short-term change in desired heel angle vs actual

范围: 0.000 … 0.100

ATC_SAIL_D_FF.d:
FF D 增益，产生与目标变化率成比例的输出

范围：0 … 0.03

ATC_SAIL_FF.d:
Sail Heel control feed forward

范围: 0.000 … 0.500

ATC_SAIL_FILT.d:
Sail Heel control input filter.  Lower values reduce noise but add delay.

范围: 0.000 … 100.000

ATC_SAIL_FLTD.n: Sail Heel Derivative term filter frequency in Hz
ATC_SAIL_FLTD.d:
微分滤波器频率（以 Hz 为单位）

范围：0.000 … 100.000

ATC_SAIL_FLTE.n: Sail Heel Error filter frequency in Hz
ATC_SAIL_FLTE.d:
误差滤波器频率（以 Hz 为单位）

范围：0.000 … 100.000

ATC_SAIL_FLTT.n: Sail Heel Target filter frequency in Hz
ATC_SAIL_FLTT.d:
Target filter frequency in Hz

范围: 0.000 … 100.000

ATC_SAIL_I.d:
Sail Heel control I gain for sailboats.  Corrects long term error between the desired heel angle (in radians) and actual

范围: 0.000 … 2.000

ATC_SAIL_IMAX.n: Sail Heel control I gain maximum
ATC_SAIL_IMAX.d:
Sail Heel control I gain maximum.  Constrains the maximum I term contribution to the main sail output (range -1 to +1)

范围: 0.000 … 1.000

ATC_SAIL_NEF.n: Sail Heel Error notch filter index
ATC_SAIL_NEF.d:
Sail Heel Error notch filter index

范围: 1 … 8

ATC_SAIL_NTF.n: Sail Heel Target notch filter index
ATC_SAIL_NTF.d:
Sail Heel Target notch filter index

范围: 1 … 8

ATC_SAIL_P.d:
Sail Heel control P gain for sailboats.  Converts the error between the desired heel angle (in radians) and actual heel to a main sail output (in the range -1 to +1)

范围: 0.000 … 2.000

ATC_SAIL_PDMX.n: Sail Heel control PD sum maximum
ATC_SAIL_PDMX.d:
Sail Heel control PD sum maximum.  The maximum/minimum value that the sum of the P and D term can output

范围: 0.000 … 1.000

ATC_SAIL_SMAX.d:
Sets an upper limit on the slew rate produced by the combined P and D gains. If the amplitude of the control action produced by the rate feedback exceeds this value, then the D+P gain is reduced to respect the limit. This limits the amplitude of high frequency oscillations caused by an excessive gain. The limit should be set to no more than 25% of the actuators maximum slew rate to allow for load effects. Note: The gain will not be reduced to less than 10% of the nominal value. A value of zero will disable this feature.

范围: 0 … 200

ATC_SPEED_D.d:
Speed control D gain.  Compensates for short-term change in desired speed vs actual

范围: 0.000 … 0.400

ATC_SPEED_D_FF.d:
FF D 增益，产生与目标变化率成比例的输出

范围：0 … 0.03

ATC_SPEED_FF.d:
Speed control feed forward

范围: 0.000 … 0.500

ATC_SPEED_FILT.d:
Speed control input filter.  Lower values reduce noise but add delay.

范围: 0.000 … 100.000

ATC_SPEED_FLTD.n: Speed control Derivative term filter frequency in Hz
ATC_SPEED_FLTD.d:
微分滤波器频率（以 Hz 为单位）

范围：0.000 … 100.000

ATC_SPEED_FLTE.n: Speed control Error filter frequency in Hz
ATC_SPEED_FLTE.d:
误差滤波器频率（以 Hz 为单位）

范围：0.000 … 100.000

ATC_SPEED_FLTT.n: Speed control Target filter frequency in Hz
ATC_SPEED_FLTT.d:
Target filter frequency in Hz

范围: 0.000 … 100.000

ATC_SPEED_I.d:
Speed control I gain.  Corrects long term error between the desired speed (in m/s) and actual speed

范围: 0.000 … 2.000

ATC_SPEED_IMAX.d:
Speed control I gain maximum.  Constrains the maximum motor output (range -1 to +1) that the I term will generate

范围: 0.000 … 1.000

ATC_SPEED_NEF.n: Speed control Error notch filter index
ATC_SPEED_NEF.d:
Speed control Error notch filter index

范围: 1 … 8

ATC_SPEED_NTF.n: Speed control Target notch filter index
ATC_SPEED_NTF.d:
Speed control Target notch filter index

范围: 1 … 8

ATC_SPEED_P.d:
Speed control P gain.  Converts the error between the desired speed (in m/s) and actual speed to a motor output (in the range -1 to +1)

范围: 0.010 … 2.000

ATC_SPEED_PDMX.d:
Speed control PD sum maximum.  The maximum/minimum value that the sum of the P and D term can output

范围: 0.000 … 1.000

ATC_SPEED_SMAX.d:
Sets an upper limit on the slew rate produced by the combined P and D gains. If the amplitude of the control action produced by the rate feedback exceeds this value, then the D+P gain is reduced to respect the limit. This limits the amplitude of high frequency oscillations caused by an excessive gain. The limit should be set to no more than 25% of the actuators maximum slew rate to allow for load effects. Note: The gain will not be reduced to less than 10% of the nominal value. A value of zero will disable this feature.

范围: 0 … 200

ATC_STOP_SPEED.d:
Speed control stop speed.  Motor outputs to zero once vehicle speed falls below this value

范围: 0.00 … 0.50

ATC_STR_ACC_MAX.d:
Steering control angular acceleration maximum (in deg/s/s).  0 to disable acceleration limiting

范围: 0 … 1000

ATC_STR_ANG_P.d:
Steering control angle P gain.  Converts the error between the desired heading/yaw (in radians) and actual heading/yaw to a desired turn rate (in rad/sec)

范围: 1.000 … 10.000

ATC_STR_DEC_MAX.d:
Steering control angular deceleration maximum (in deg/s/s).  0 to disable deceleration limiting

范围: 0 … 1000

ATC_STR_RAT_D.d:
Steering control D gain.  Compensates for short-term change in desired turn rate vs actual

范围: 0.000 … 0.400

ATC_STR_RAT_D_FF.d:
FF D 增益，产生与目标变化率成比例的输出

范围：0 … 0.03

ATC_STR_RAT_FF.d:
Steering control feed forward

范围: 0.000 … 3.000

ATC_STR_RAT_FILT.d:
Steering control input filter.  Lower values reduce noise but add delay.

范围: 0.000 … 100.000

ATC_STR_RAT_FLTD.n: Steering control Derivative term filter frequency in Hz
ATC_STR_RAT_FLTD.d:
微分滤波器频率（以 Hz 为单位）

范围：0.000 … 100.000

ATC_STR_RAT_FLTE.n: Steering control Error filter frequency in Hz
ATC_STR_RAT_FLTE.d:
误差滤波器频率（以 Hz 为单位）

范围：0.000 … 100.000

ATC_STR_RAT_FLTT.n: Steering control Target filter frequency in Hz
ATC_STR_RAT_FLTT.d:
Target filter frequency in Hz

范围: 0.000 … 100.000

ATC_STR_RAT_I.d:
Steering control I gain.  Corrects long term error between the desired turn rate (in rad/s) and actual

范围: 0.000 … 2.000

ATC_STR_RAT_IMAX.d:
Steering control I gain maximum.  Constrains the steering output (range -1 to +1) that the I term will generate

范围: 0.000 … 1.000

ATC_STR_RAT_MAX.d:
Steering control rotation rate maximum in deg/s.  0 to remove rate limiting

范围: 0 … 1000

ATC_STR_RAT_NEF.n: Steering control Error notch filter index
ATC_STR_RAT_NEF.d:
Steering control Error notch filter index

范围: 1 … 8

ATC_STR_RAT_NTF.n: Steering control Target notch filter index
ATC_STR_RAT_NTF.d:
Steering control Target notch filter index

范围: 1 … 8

ATC_STR_RAT_P.d:
Steering control rate P gain.  Converts the turn rate error (in radians/sec) to a steering control output (in the range -1 to +1)

范围: 0.000 … 2.000

ATC_STR_RAT_PDMX.d:
Steering control PD sum maximum.  The maximum/minimum value that the sum of the P and D term can output

范围: 0.000 … 1.000

ATC_STR_RAT_SMAX.d:
Sets an upper limit on the slew rate produced by the combined P and D gains. If the amplitude of the control action produced by the rate feedback exceeds this value, then the D+P gain is reduced to respect the limit. This limits the amplitude of high frequency oscillations caused by an excessive gain. The limit should be set to no more than 25% of the actuators maximum slew rate to allow for load effects. Note: The gain will not be reduced to less than 10% of the nominal value. A value of zero will disable this feature.

范围: 0 … 200

ATC_TURN_MAX_G.d:
The maximum turning acceleration (in units of gravities) that the rover can handle while remaining stable. The navigation code will keep the lateral acceleration below this level to avoid rolling over or slipping the wheels in turns

范围: 0.1 … 10

CIRC_DIR.d:
圆方向

取值：
  0：顺时针
  1：逆时针

CIRC_RADIUS.d:
Vehicle will circle the center at this distance

范围: 0 … 100

CIRC_SPEED.d:
Vehicle will move at this speed around the circle.  If set to zero WP_SPEED will be used

范围: 0 … 10

DOCK_DIR.d:
车辆应接近码头的指南针方向。 -1值表示未设置的参数

范围：0 … 360

DOCK_HDG_CORR_EN.n: 停靠模式航向校正启用/禁用
DOCK_HDG_CORR_EN.d:
When enabled, the autopilot modifies the path to approach the target head-on along desired line of approach in dock mode

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled

DOCK_HDG_CORR_WT.n: 停靠模式航向修正重量
DOCK_HDG_CORR_WT.d:
This value describes how aggressively vehicle tries to correct its heading to be on desired line of approach

范围: 0.00 … 0.90

DOCK_SPEED.d:
Vehicle speed limit in dock mode

范围: 0 … 100

DOCK_STOP_DIST.n: 当我们应该停止时与对接目标的距离
DOCK_STOP_DIST.d:
The vehicle starts stopping when it is this distance away from docking target

范围: 0 … 2

FLOW_HGT_OVR.n: 传感器距地面高度超控
FLOW_HGT_OVR.d:
This is used in rover vehicles, where the sensor is a fixed height above the ground

范围: 0 … 2

MOT_BAT_WATT_TC.n: 电池电量限制时间常数
MOT_BAT_WATT_TC.d:
Time constant used to limit the smooth power throttling.

范围: 0 … 10

MOT_PWM_FREQ.n: 有刷电机的电机输出 PWM 频率
MOT_PWM_FREQ.d:
有刷电机的电机输出 PWM 频率

范围：1 … 20

MOT_REV_DELAY.d:
对于在改变方向之前需要延迟的可逆电机。当大于零时，当所需的电机方向改变时，油门将在这段时间内归零，然后输出新的油门。

范围：0.1 … 1.0

MOT_SLEWRATE.d:
Throttle slew rate as a percentage of total range per second. A value of 100 allows the motor to change over its full range in one second.  A value of zero disables the limit.  Note some NiMH powered rovers require a lower setting of 40 to reduce current demand to avoid brownouts.

范围: 0 … 1000

MOT_SPD_SCA_BASE.d:
Speed above which steering is scaled down when using regular steering/throttle vehicles.  zero to disable speed scaling

范围: 0 … 10

MOT_STR_THR_MIX.n: 电机转向与油门优先顺序
MOT_STR_THR_MIX.d:
Steering vs Throttle priorisation.  Higher numbers prioritise steering, lower numbers prioritise throttle.  Only valid for Skid Steering vehicles

范围: 0.2 … 1.0

MOT_THR_MAX.d:
Throttle maximum percentage the autopilot will apply. This can be used to prevent overheating an ESC or motor on an electric rover

范围: 5 … 100

MOT_THR_MIN.d:
Throttle minimum percentage the autopilot will apply. This is useful for handling a deadzone around low throttle and for preventing internal combustion motors cutting out during missions. Must be less than MOT_THR_MAX.

范围: 0 … 20

MOT_THST_ASYM.d:
Thrust Asymmetry. Used for skid-steering. 2.0 means your motors move twice as fast forward than they do backwards.

范围: 1.0 … 10.0

MOT_VEC_ANGLEMAX.d:
The angle between steering's middle position and maximum position when using vectored thrust (boats only)

范围: 0 … 90

PLND_ORIENT.d:
相机/传感器在身体上的方向

取值：
  0：前进
  25：向下
  4：返回

PSC_POS_P.d:
位置控制器 P 增益。  将到目标位置的距离转换为所需速度，然后将其传递给徘徊纬度速率控制器

范围：0.500 … 2.000

PSC_VEL_D.d:
Velocity (horizontal) D gain.  Corrects short-term changes in velocity

范围: 0.00 … 1.00

PSC_VEL_FF.d:
Velocity (horizontal) feed forward gain.  Converts the difference between desired velocity to a target acceleration

范围: 0 … 6

PSC_VEL_FLTD.d:
Velocity (horizontal) input filter.  This filter (in Hz) is applied to the input for D term

范围: 0 … 100

PSC_VEL_FLTE.d:
Velocity (horizontal) input filter.  This filter (in Hz) is applied to the input for P and I terms

范围: 0 … 100

PSC_VEL_I.d:
Velocity (horizontal) I gain.  Corrects long-term difference between desired and actual velocity to a target acceleration

范围: 0.00 … 1.00

PSC_VEL_IMAX.d:
Velocity (horizontal) integrator maximum.  Constrains the target acceleration that the I gain will output

范围: 0 … 4500

PSC_VEL_P.d:
Velocity (horizontal) P gain.  Converts the difference between desired and actual velocity to a target acceleration

范围: 0.1 … 6.0

ACRO_TURN_RATE.n: Acro 模式最大转弯速率
ACRO_TURN_RATE.d:
Acro 模式最大转弯速率

范围：0 … 360

AUTO_KICKSTART.n: 自动模式触发启动加速
AUTO_KICKSTART.d:
X acceleration in meters/second/second to use to trigger the motor start in auto mode. If set to zero then auto throttle starts immediately when the mode switch happens, otherwise the rover waits for the X acceleration to go above this value before it will start the motor

范围: 0 … 20

AUTO_TRIGGER_PIN.d:
pin number to use to enable the throttle in auto mode. If set to -1 then don't use a trigger, otherwise this is a pin number which if held low in auto mode will enable the motor to run. If the switch is released while in AUTO then the motor will stop again. This can be used in combination with INITIAL_MODE to give a 'press button to start' rover with no receiver.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
  0: APM TriggerPin0
  1: APM TriggerPin1
  2: APM TriggerPin2
  3: APM TriggerPin3
  4: APM TriggerPin4
  5: APM TriggerPin5
  50: AUX1
  51: AUX2
  52: AUX3
  53: AUX4
  54: AUX5
  55: AUX6
  6: APM TriggerPin6
  7: APM TriggerPin7
  8: APM TriggerPin8

AUX_CH.d: RC 通道用于辅助功能，包括保存航路点

BAL_PITCH_MAX.d:
100% 油门时的俯仰角（以度为单位）

范围：0 … 15

BAL_PITCH_TRIM.n: 平衡机器人俯仰配平角
BAL_PITCH_TRIM.d:
平衡机器人音调修剪以实现平衡。这抵消了质心的倾斜。

范围：-2 … 2

CH7_OPTION.d:
What to do use channel 7 for

取值:
  0: Nothing
  1: SaveWaypoint
  10: SmartRTL
  11: Guided
  12: Loiter
  2: LearnCruiseSpeed
  3: ArmDisarm
  4: Manual
  5: Acro
  6: Steering
  7: Hold
  8: Auto
  9: RTL

CRASH_ANGLE.d:
用于碰撞检查的俯仰/滚动角度限制（以度为单位）。零禁用检查

范围：0 … 60

CRUISE_SPEED.n: Target cruise speed in auto modes
CRUISE_SPEED.d:
The target speed in auto missions.

范围: 0 … 100

CRUISE_THROTTLE.n: 自动时的基本油门百分比
CRUISE_THROTTLE.d:
The base throttle percentage to use in auto mode. The CRUISE_SPEED parameter controls the target speed, but the rover starts with the CRUISE_THROTTLE setting as the initial estimate for how much throttle is needed to achieve that speed. It then adjusts the throttle based on how fast the rover is actually going.

范围: 0 … 100

FS_ACTION.d:
What to do on a failsafe event

取值:
  0: Nothing
  1: RTL
  2: Hold
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Hold
  5: Terminate
  6: Loiter or Hold

FS_TIMEOUT.d:
The time in seconds that a failsafe condition must persist before the failsafe action is triggered

范围: 1 … 100

LOIT_RADIUS.d:
Vehicle will drift when within this distance of the target position

范围: 0 … 20

LOIT_SPEED_GAIN.d:
确定 LOITER 尝试纠正偏离徘徊点的漂移的积极程度。越高速度越快，但默认值应该可以接受。

范围：0 … 5

LOIT_TYPE.d:
移动到目标点时的徘徊行为

取值：
  0：前进或后退至目标点
  1：始终将弓面向目标点
  2：始终面朝目标点

MANUAL_OPTIONS.d:
手动模式特定选项

位定义：
  bit0：启用转向速度缩放

MANUAL_STR_EXPO.d:
手动转向博览会可在粘在边缘时实现更快的转向

范围：-0.5 … 0.95
取值：
  0：禁用
  0.1：非常低
  0.2：低
  0.3：中
  0.4：高
  0.5：非常高

任务完成后的行为

PILOT_STEER_TYPE.d:
飞行员 RC 输入解释

取值：
  0：默认
  1：两拨片输入
  2：备份时方向相反
  3：备份时方向不变

PIVOT_TURN_ANGLE.d:
切换到枢轴转向的导航角度阈值（以度为单位）。这允许您设置滑移转向流动站，当其需要转动的角度大于此角度时，以自动模式原地转动。角度为零意味着禁用枢轴转动。请注意，您可能还希望为 WP_RADIUS 设置较低的值以获得整齐的转弯。

范围：0 … 360

PIVOT_TURN_RATE.d:
所需的枢轴转动速率（以度/秒为单位）。

范围：0 … 360

RST_SWITCH_CH.d: 地理围栏接管后用于重置为上次飞行模式的 RC 通道。

RTL_SPEED.d:
返回默认启动速度。  如果为零，则使用 WP_SPEED 或 CRUISE_SPEED。

范围：0 … 100

SIMPLE_TYPE.d:
Simple mode types

取值:
  0: InitialHeading
  1: CardinalDirections

SPEED_MAX.d:
全油门时车辆可以获得的最大速度。如果为0，将根据CRUISE_SPEED和CRUISE_THROTTLE进行估计。

范围：0 … 30

TURN_RADIUS.d:
Turn radius of vehicle in meters while at low speeds.  Lower values produce tighter turns in steering mode

范围: 0 … 10

SAIL_ANGLE_IDEAL.d:
帆与视风之间的理想角度

范围：0 … 90

SAIL_ANGLE_MAX.d:
主板松动，中心线与吊杆之间形成角度。对于直接控制旋转桅杆，旋转角度为 SERVOx_MAX/_MIN；对于旋转桅杆，如果连杆可以物理地将桅杆旋转超过该角度，则该值可以超过 90 度。

范围：0 … 90

SAIL_ANGLE_MIN.d:
主板紧，中心线和吊杆之间的角度

范围：0 … 90

SAIL_ENABLE.d:
This enables Sailboat functionality

取值:
  0: Disable
  1: Enable

SAIL_HEEL_MAX.d:
When in auto sail trim modes the heel will be limited to this value using PID control

范围: 0 … 90

SAIL_LOIT_RADIUS.d:
When in sailing modes the vehicle will keep moving within this loiter radius

范围: 0 … 20

SAIL_NO_GO_ANGLE.d:
The typical closest angle to the wind the vehicle will sail at. the vehicle will sail at this angle when going upwind

范围: 0 … 90

SAIL_WNDSPD_MIN.n: Sailboat minimum wind speed to sail in
SAIL_WNDSPD_MIN.d:
Sailboat minimum wind speed to continue sail in, at lower wind speeds the sailboat will motor if one is fitted

范围: 0 … 5

SAIL_XTRACK_MAX.n: Sailing vehicle max cross track error
SAIL_XTRACK_MAX.d:
The sail boat will tack when it reaches this cross track error, defines a corridor of 2 times this value wide, 0 disables

范围: 5 … 25

SIM_SAIL_TYPE.d: 0: 主帆带帆板, 1: 直接驱动翼
