WP_ACCEL.d:
Waypoint acceleration.  If zero then ATC_ACCEL_MAX is used

范围: 0 … 100

WP_PIVOT_ANGLE.d:
当车辆航向与其目标航向之间的差异超过这么多度数时旋转。设置为零以禁用枢轴转动。  此参数应大于 5 度才能使枢轴转动发挥作用。

范围：0 … 360

WP_PIVOT_DELAY.d:
Vehicle waits this many seconds after completing a pivot turn before proceeding

范围: 0 … 60

WP_PIVOT_RATE.d:
Turn rate during pivot turns

范围: 0 … 360

WRC2_RATE_D.d:
Wheel rate control D gain.  Compensates for short-term change in desired rate vs actual

范围: 0.000 … 0.400

WRC2_RATE_D_FF.d:
FF D 增益，产生与目标变化率成比例的输出

范围：0.000 … 0.400

WRC2_RATE_FF.n: Wheel rate control feed forward gain
WRC2_RATE_FF.d:
Wheel rate control feed forward gain.  Desired rate (in radians/sec) is multiplied by this constant and output to output (in the range -1 to +1)

范围: 0.100 … 2.000

WRC2_RATE_FILT.d:
Wheel rate control input filter.  Lower values reduce noise but add delay.

范围: 1.000 … 100.000

WRC2_RATE_FLTD.n: Wheel rate control derivative frequency in Hz
WRC2_RATE_FLTD.d:
Wheel rate control derivative frequency in Hz

范围: 1 … 50

WRC2_RATE_FLTE.n: Wheel rate control error frequency in Hz
WRC2_RATE_FLTE.d:
Wheel rate control error frequency in Hz

范围: 1 … 50

WRC2_RATE_FLTT.n: Wheel rate control target frequency in Hz
WRC2_RATE_FLTT.d:
Wheel rate control target frequency in Hz

范围: 1 … 50

WRC2_RATE_I.d:
Wheel rate control I gain.  Corrects long term error between the desired rate (in rad/s) and actual

范围: 0.000 … 2.000

WRC2_RATE_IMAX.n: Wheel rate control I gain maximum
WRC2_RATE_IMAX.d:
Wheel rate control I gain maximum.  Constrains the output (range -1 to +1) that the I term will generate

范围: 0.000 … 1.000

WRC2_RATE_NEF.n: Wheel rate Error notch filter index
WRC2_RATE_NEF.d:
Wheel rate Error notch filter index

范围: 1 … 8

WRC2_RATE_NTF.n: Wheel rate Target notch filter index
WRC2_RATE_NTF.d:
Wheel rate Target notch filter index

范围: 1 … 8

WRC2_RATE_P.d:
Wheel rate control P gain.  Converts rate error (in radians/sec) to output (in the range -1 to +1)

范围: 0.100 … 2.000

WRC2_RATE_PDMX.n: Wheel rate control PD sum maximum
WRC2_RATE_PDMX.d:
Wheel rate control PD sum maximum.  The maximum/minimum value that the sum of the P and D term can output

范围: 0.000 … 1.000

WRC2_RATE_SMAX.d:
Sets an upper limit on the slew rate produced by the combined P and D gains. If the amplitude of the control action produced by the rate feedback exceeds this value, then the D+P gain is reduced to respect the limit. This limits the amplitude of high frequency oscillations caused by an excessive gain. The limit should be set to no more than 25% of the actuators maximum slew rate to allow for load effects. Note: The gain will not be reduced to less than 10% of the nominal value. A value of zero will disable this feature.

范围: 0 … 200

WRC_ENABLE.d:
启用或禁用车轮速率控制

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：启用

WRC_RATE_D.d:
Wheel rate control D gain.  Compensates for short-term change in desired rate vs actual

范围: 0.000 … 0.400

WRC_RATE_D_FF.d:
FF D 增益，产生与误差变化率成比例的输出

范围：0.000 … 0.400

WRC_RATE_FF.n: Wheel rate control feed forward gain
WRC_RATE_FF.d:
Wheel rate control feed forward gain.  Desired rate (in radians/sec) is multiplied by this constant and output to output (in the range -1 to +1)

范围: 0.100 … 2.000

WRC_RATE_FILT.d:
Wheel rate control input filter.  Lower values reduce noise but add delay.

范围: 1.000 … 100.000

WRC_RATE_FLTD.n: Wheel rate control derivative frequency in Hz
WRC_RATE_FLTD.d:
Wheel rate control derivative frequency in Hz

范围: 1 … 50

WRC_RATE_FLTE.n: Wheel rate control error frequency in Hz
WRC_RATE_FLTE.d:
Wheel rate control error frequency in Hz

范围: 1 … 50

WRC_RATE_FLTT.n: Wheel rate control target frequency in Hz
WRC_RATE_FLTT.d:
Wheel rate control target frequency in Hz

范围: 1 … 50

WRC_RATE_I.d:
Wheel rate control I gain.  Corrects long term error between the desired rate (in rad/s) and actual

范围: 0.000 … 2.000

WRC_RATE_IMAX.n: Wheel rate control I gain maximum
WRC_RATE_IMAX.d:
Wheel rate control I gain maximum.  Constrains the output (range -1 to +1) that the I term will generate

范围: 0.000 … 1.000

WRC_RATE_MAX.d:
Wheel max rotation rate

范围: 0 … 200

WRC_RATE_NEF.n: Wheel rate Error notch filter index
WRC_RATE_NEF.d:
Wheel rate Error notch filter index

范围: 1 … 8

WRC_RATE_NTF.n: Wheel rate Target notch filter index
WRC_RATE_NTF.d:
Wheel rate Target notch filter index

范围: 1 … 8

WRC_RATE_P.d:
Wheel rate control P gain.  Converts rate error (in radians/sec) to output (in the range -1 to +1)

范围: 0.100 … 2.000

WRC_RATE_PDMX.n: Wheel rate control PD sum maximum
WRC_RATE_PDMX.d:
Wheel rate control PD sum maximum.  The maximum/minimum value that the sum of the P and D term can output

范围: 0.000 … 1.000

WRC_RATE_SMAX.d:
Sets an upper limit on the slew rate produced by the combined P and D gains. If the amplitude of the control action produced by the rate feedback exceeds this value, then the D+P gain is reduced to respect the limit. This limits the amplitude of high frequency oscillations caused by an excessive gain. The limit should be set to no more than 25% of the actuators maximum slew rate to allow for load effects. Note: The gain will not be reduced to less than 10% of the nominal value. A value of zero will disable this feature.

范围: 0 … 200

MOT_FV_CPLNG_K.n: 前向/垂直至俯仰解耦系数
MOT_FV_CPLNG_K.d:
Used to decouple pitch from forward/vertical motion. 0 to disable, 1.2 normal

范围: 0.0 … 1.5

RCMAP_FORWARD.d:
前向通道数。当您的 RC 发射器无法轻松更改通道顺序时，这非常有用。转发通常在通道 5 上，但您可以使用此参数将其移动到任何通道。需要重新启动才能使更改生效。

范围：1 … 16

RCMAP_LATERAL.d:
横向通道数。当您的 RC 发射器无法轻松更改通道顺序时，这非常有用。横向通常位于通道 6 上，但您可以使用此参数将其移动到任何通道。需要重新启动才能使更改生效。

范围：1 … 16

ACRO_EXPO.d:
Acro 滚动/俯仰 Expo 可在粘在边缘时实现更快的旋转

范围：-0.5 … 0.95
取值：
  0：禁用
  0.1：非常低
  0.2：低
  0.3：中
  0.4：高
  0.5：非常高

ACRO_RP_P.n: Acro Roll 和 Pitch P 增益
ACRO_RP_P.d:
在 ACRO 和 SPORT 模式下将引导横滚和俯仰转换为所需的旋转速率。  值越高意味着旋转速度越快。

范围：1 … 10

ACRO_YAW_P.n: 特技偏航 P 增益
ACRO_YAW_P.d:
将飞行员偏航输入转换为所需的旋转速率。  值越高意味着旋转速度越快。

范围：1 … 10

FRAME_CONFIG.d:
Set this parameter according to your vehicle/motor configuration

取值:
  0: BlueROV1
  1: Vectored
  2: Vectored_6DOF
  3: Vectored_6DOF_90
  4: SimpleROV-3
  5: SimpleROV-4
  6: SimpleROV-5
  7: Custom

FS_LEAK_ENABLE.d:
控制检测到泄漏时采取的操作。

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：仅警告
  2：进入表面模式

FS_PILOT_INPUT.n: 先导输入故障安全动作
FS_PILOT_INPUT.d:
控制在 FS_PILOT_TIMEOUT 参数指定的超时期限后未收到飞行员输入时采取的操作

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：仅警告
  2：解除武装

FS_PILOT_TIMEOUT.n: Timeout for activation of pilot input failsafe
FS_PILOT_TIMEOUT.d:
控制触发故障安全操作之前接收到的先导输入之间的最大间隔

范围：0.1 … 3.0

FS_PRESS_ENABLE.n: 内部压力故障保护启用
FS_PRESS_ENABLE.d:
控制内部压力超过 FS_PRESS_MAX 参数时采取的操作。

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：仅警告

FS_PRESS_MAX.n: 内部压力故障安全阈值
FS_PRESS_MAX.d: The maximum internal pressure allowed before triggering failsafe. Failsafe action is determined by FS_PRESS_ENABLE parameter

FS_TEMP_ENABLE.n: 内部温度故障保护启用
FS_TEMP_ENABLE.d:
控制内部温度超过 FS_TEMP_MAX 参数时采取的操作。

取值：
  0：禁用
  1：仅警告

FS_TEMP_MAX.n: 内部温度故障安全阈值
FS_TEMP_MAX.d: The maximum internal temperature allowed before triggering failsafe. Failsafe action is determined by FS_TEMP_ENABLE parameter.

FS_TERRAIN_ENAB.d:
控制在自动模式期间丢失地形信息时采取的操作

取值：
  0：解除武装
  1：保持位置
  2：表面

JS_GAIN_DEFAULT.d:
启动时的默认增益必须在 [JS_GAIN_MIN , JS_GAIN_MAX] 范围内。当前增益值可通过名称为“PilotGain”的 NAMED_VALUE_FLOAT MAVLink 消息访问。

范围：0.1 … 1.0

JS_GAIN_MAX.d:
最大操纵杆增益

范围: 0.2 … 1.0

JS_GAIN_MIN.d:
最小操纵杆增益

范围：0.1 … 0.8

JS_GAIN_STEPS.d:
当使用按钮调整增益时，控制最小和最大操纵杆增益之间的步数。设置为 1 以始终使用 JS_GAIN_DEFAULT。

范围：1 … 10

JS_LIGHTS_STEPS.d:
最小和最大亮度之间的亮度级数

范围：1 … 10

JS_THR_GAIN.d:
Scalar for gain on the throttle channel. Gets scaled with the current JS gain

范围: 0.5 … 4.0

PILOT_ACCEL_Z.d:
The vertical acceleration used when pilot is controlling the altitude

范围: 50 … 500

PILOT_SPEED.d:
The maximum horizontal velocity the pilot may request in cm/s

范围: 10 … 500

PILOT_SPEED_DN.n: 飞行员最大垂直下降速度
PILOT_SPEED_DN.d:
The maximum vertical descending velocity the pilot may request in cm/s

范围: 20 … 500

PILOT_SPEED_UP.n: 飞行员最大垂直上升速度
PILOT_SPEED_UP.d:
The maximum vertical ascending velocity the pilot may request in cm/s

范围: 20 … 500

RNGFND_SQ_MIN.d:
获得良好测距仪读数的最低信号质量

范围：0 … 100

SFC_NOBARO_THST.n: Surface mode throttle output when no barometer is available
SFC_NOBARO_THST.d:
Surface mode throttle output when no borometer is available. 100% is full throttle. -100% is maximum throttle downwards

范围: -100 … 100

SURFACE_DEPTH.d:
The depth the external pressure sensor will read when the vehicle is considered at the surface (in centimeters)

范围: -100 … 0

SURFACE_MAX_THR.d:
车辆在水面时的最大油门值。当车辆接近地面时，该值用于将油门从 1（全）线性缩放到最小值。衰减从距表面 1 米处开始。  仅向上油门受到限制。

范围：0.0 … 1.0

SURFTRAK_DEPTH.d: 启用 SURFTRAK 模式的最小深度

THR_ARM_POS.d:
如果启用了 RC 检查和“0”油门的 RC_OPTION，则确定油门是否必须处于最小值或在调整值内才能启动。

位定义：
  bit0：油门等于或低于最小值
  bit1：油门在 RC 调整值死区内

XTRACK_ANG_LIM.d:
航路点导航期间当前航迹与所需航向之间允许的最大角度（以度为单位）

范围：10 … 90
